subject: Your support keeps us going.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Teran for Congress
body:
From the bottom of my heart, THANK YOU!
Hi Peter,
**Listen, I want to say thank you for all that you do for our campaign. **
I know myself and my team have been emailing you nonstop in the lead-up to our quarterly deadline (I promise we will give your inbox a little break now) but we wouldn’t do it if it weren’t necessary. We’re still crunching the numbers, but I feel really good that thanks to your generosity, we surpassed our goal. If you’ve contributed already, I am so thankful to you. If you haven’t had the opportunity, you can contribute at this link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70696620/430149756/-58528819?refcode=X_093023_EOQ_7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUxODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGFlNjI5NzEtZWQ1Zi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_mJr_Bh9FcaUMAUanOAxPBgy4XOrTveTSaGZZkVouIw=)
Beyond the deadlines and the fundraising, I want to express my genuine gratitude that you decided to be on our team. We’ve been running for Congress for about six months now and let me tell you, it’s had its ups and downs.
Running for Congress is hard, but what makes it all worth it is to know that there are folks who are in it with me. I said this when we first launched, and it still rings true, this campaign is going to be like a quinceañeara. It will take all of us, family and friends from far and wide coming together and pitching in to celebrate together at a fabulous party.
**Our party will be a victory party next year.** I know we can do it because, together, we can accomplish anything. So thank you again for your support. It’s what gives this campaign energy and what motivates us forward.
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70696622/430149758/-58528819?refcode=X_093023_EOQ_7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUxODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGFlNjI5NzEtZWQ1Zi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_mJr_Bh9FcaUMAUanOAxPBgy4XOrTveTSaGZZkVouIw=)
Si sé puede,
Raquel Terán

Paid for by Teran for Congress
Terán for Congress
PO Box 1041
Glendale, AZ 85311
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/quHjdOlmTESlm5aDEC5Smg2?unsubscribedata=WgVRuz5muO7JmhSmWTHAlDkNnvNErTXjUIyYJQyvBAHQiMjk3Fcvf56qc8nyUvXwkmTAd6JeywgNW3VaXeLB%2F3fd8YQL5Xz4qPeNsWIqLpLGBmB3wMfWIsi%2BNbpNI6ekyIb8k2ry%2BVyXZWyCT7os38wGyaSoJlB3sPkB6npzE9KbzbW4Vo9TgF7NdkA96AeU2lGpcsz2Zxc5vtOQCfdhhGJqUxrmyOZUgc%2FBtfSO5bOhJgGl0K2Zkfip3kBT%2BJhwxpFxcozTMV7zcW5K5xInej4xTfxN7%2FPm3MUzkjG8D6xi7XWaS2XC1rl%2FG%2FwhoFG0YZFrm3Q0PRGRmvEp7mipLjpLIEjC1kgxl9zd4jo4tfj1DNve0Zw6DTlPQ0BScH1KlRFQJI961KUSk4bovkTBdShe5TbJ7WDfRB6qaTaip%2BvCwqJnPKWM00Ycq5ELMUsf).

name: Laura Friedman
subject: What tonight’s FEC deadline means to our campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70696702/430150230/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2MwNzQzOGQtZWQ1Zi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pJS1R7rodU72kTZSKXOJM-lyDVhcpooQvMhxlMH6PGE=) Hi friend, At the end of this email, I’m going to ask you for a [**$3 donation**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70696703/430150231/-1241314520?refcode=em-9.30.23-all-2-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2MwNzQzOGQtZWQ1Zi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pJS1R7rodU72kTZSKXOJM-lyDVhcpooQvMhxlMH6PGE=) ahead of tonight’s quarterly FEC fundraising deadline. I hope you’ll read the entire message so I can explain what this deadline represents, and why your early support is crucial. As you may know, every three months all federal campaigns must submit a fundraising report – one that goes public – which will show how much they’ve raised. And political pundits, some undecided voters, and especially our opponents will be poring over these numbers to assess our ability to win. **Like it or not, it’s going to set the tone for the race.** As someone who’s rejected any corporate cash, every donor to my campaign matters, and I need your continued support more than ever to build our winning campaign. [So having said all of that, will you chip in $3 to bolster my campaign for Congress before this deadline hits at midnight ET? This is a people-powered movement, so I’d appreciate anything you can give to help us finish strong before September comes to a close.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70696708/430150232/-1241314520?refcode=em-9.30.23-all-2-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2MwNzQzOGQtZWQ1Zi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pJS1R7rodU72kTZSKXOJM-lyDVhcpooQvMhxlMH6PGE=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__ | ****[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70696710/430150238/-1241314520?refcode=em-9.30.23-all-2-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2MwNzQzOGQtZWQ1Zi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pJS1R7rodU72kTZSKXOJM-lyDVhcpooQvMhxlMH6PGE=)**** | ****[$35](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70696712/430150240/-1241314520?refcode=em-9.30.23-all-2-b&express_lane=true&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2MwNzQzOGQtZWQ1Zi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pJS1R7rodU72kTZSKXOJM-lyDVhcpooQvMhxlMH6PGE=)****

name: Linda
subject: I know you’re busy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
My campaign has an FEC quarterly deadline in a few hours, and I need your support to hit the mark.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70696775/430150487/2074316475?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230930-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTdiNGQ5NC1lZDVmLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rdNas6blduv_LJ5Hpa0UrpXagTzZ5sI5k-eJX_hxpr8=)
---

name: Stefanie
subject: the last email you'll get from us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
there's still time — but the clock is ticking

---
Friend, did you see Kirsten's email from the other day? She asked committed supporters like you to step up with a donation before her end-of-quarter deadline.
But there are just four hours left to hit her $100,000 goal, and _you still haven't answered her call._

This is the last email you'll get from our team before tonight's deadline. **So please, can you rush a gift now to help Kirsten make up the gap and hit this critical goal? Here's a personalized link to make your donation:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70697542/430154093/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4469-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjRjYTIyMy1lZTVmLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ObnlWCoL9ZqgC75qVw2OTEqIdIZO-ALSSDNwB-ORA9M=)**
This election cycle is already shaping up to be one of the most expensive in history — _and New York is on the GOP's list of top-targeted seats._ Because Kirsten refuses to accept a cent from corporate PACs, she's counting on strong, early support from grassroots donors to compete with the GOP's massive war chest of dark money.
There's still time to answer Kirsten's call and stand with her — but the clock is ticking. **Please, can you chip in anything you can spare before midnight tonight? Here's that ActBlue link again:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70697543/430154094/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4469-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjRjYTIyMy1lZTVmLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ObnlWCoL9ZqgC75qVw2OTEqIdIZO-ALSSDNwB-ORA9M=)**
All of our fundraising numbers will become public after this deadline, friend. We really can't let Kirsten come up short.

Thanks,

Stefanie
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Kirsten Gillibrand**
Date: Thurs, Sept 28, 2023
Subject: our Senate majority is at stake
| | |
---
Friend,
My end-of-quarter deadline is just around the corner. **With the GOP prepared to invest millions of dollars into flipping New York red, I’ve set an ambitious $100,000 goal.**
I rely on donations from grassroots supporters like you to hit these goals — not corporate PACs. That’s why I’m about to ask you to make a donation to help me close out this quarter on the strongest possible footing. **[_(If you’re ready to give now, you can chip in here.)_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70697544/430154095/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4469-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjRjYTIyMy1lZTVmLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ObnlWCoL9ZqgC75qVw2OTEqIdIZO-ALSSDNwB-ORA9M=)**
But first, I want to personally thank you for standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington.
Thank you for never giving up the fight to **make gun trafficking a federal crime.** After 13 years, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns across the nation.
Thank you for having my back as I lead the fight to protect **Social Security and Medicare** and ensure that seniors can retire in dignity.

Thank you for proudly standing with me in my fight to **certify the Equal Rights Amendment.** Today, we’re so close to finally establishing gender equality in our Constitution — giving us a legal basis to restore reproductive rights.
**But here's the bad news: If Republicans flip even one Senate seat, they could retake the majority and _undo all of our progress_. With 23 Democratic seats on the ballot, our grassroots resources will be stretched thin. Especially after the GOP’s historic gains in New York last year, I need your help to defend my must-win seat.**
**[That's why I have to ask: Please, will you rush $5 or more before midnight tonight to help me hit my end-of-quarter goal and defend our Senate majority? subject: What can we say?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we know
it’s a Saturday night so we’ll get right to the point.

We’re down to the wire to reach our goal before midnight tonight. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138441?refcode=ema20230930-31093&t=1001&akid=31093%2E1203867%2EAQJcgk ]What
can we say to inspire you to make another contribution to support our
work?

What if we told you that AIPAC is recruiting challengers against Jamaal
Bowman, Summer Lee, and Ilhan Omar?

What if we told you that we recruited AOC, Jamaal Bowman, and Cori Bush to
run for Congress in the first place? We supported their campaigns from
start to finish and helped all of them defeat entrenched incumbents.

Or what if we said that our average contribution this month is just $17?
We are truly a grassroots funded organization and every donation – whether
it’s $5 or $50 – really makes a difference.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138441?refcode=ema20230930-31093&t=1002&akid=31093%2E1203867%2EAQJcgk ]When thousands of people come together to chip in what they can afford,
we then have the resources to help our candidates win. Will you make a
$3 contribution before midnight tonight?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138441?refcode=em20230930-31093&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=31093%2E1203867%2EAQJcgk ]Contribute $3

Thank you so much for your support,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=31093%2E1203867%2EAQJcgk ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=31093%2E1203867%2EAQJcgk ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230930-31093-footer&t=1024&refcode2=31093_1203867_AQJcgk&akid=31093%2E1203867%2EAQJcgk

Heading into another presidential election year, we have to work even harder to turn out voters. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvKZdPNvMnNlSaWh_D0l1JSbqkNAI3S2T4RTbvQXXCgdq6XVEcSRKCTOf2g17wzSfJTIEz6oXxt17Hnwagd_9lqG8lfd7vrYs_qQLEbDzB6wVmCBLvn4qtkCgs0dEMfhiFH3gGL_EYdXiv3x7LumFnFaJ779Gesb9DH-rVkCjc4m8ECput_x7hFsa9wC_5s4gVT6wS0AKz1Xiwd5AGnVT30VV-wwH12hO7CtsK73kQ3x_k8_Cy3m9zrAYJK2yn9HuCsRZUHpOSK8-kvsQdVlYMU-JiZo-xQhXEk5z5f7hGewKHlUEuQeH90pOWone792Rl/402/2wDXFfRZRsuRPlzCQ91f_Q/h0/qL3pQK_sSItBdZZ4b17s0vIhAkdCNzYDfI6xphCm6yw)

Friend, As the daughter of Palestinian immigrants and a proud UAW worker, Rashida understands the struggles of working people and marginalized communities. Growing up in the shadows of the Marathon Oil refinery, Rashida thought that corporate pollution and greed were normal and that every neighborhood suffered from violations of clean air standards. Rashida has lived the struggles of everyday people and she brings those lived experiences with her to the halls of Congress every day. **Because she isn’t afraid to speak truth to power―holding billionaire bullies, corporate polluters, and Wall Street banks accountable―she’s under relentless attack from those who seek to maintain the unjust status quo.** That’s why, as Rashida prepares for her re-election campaign, she needs our help to fight back against the unlimited resources of millionaires, billionaires, and greedy corporations. [**Make an urgent donation before our midnight fundraising deadline to have Rashida’s back and show the power of our progressive movement for change.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xoJa3wg1j84OjtinTpxYP8bfEAfUf5W3ZikwLvBuX55bxh-A9v0wJua3DRy95FjsAhREF2zXeAWai5UgGrlyQGyS3h0NnUeiKOQUgqbmF_hTZMXw2EEH7YLhx5XCBj7CvdY0i4TlsW9OJCCz7yEE1macRKkoXxBC1Ly-C69jehh5ErVG6dDFImxqVbQAtRFsiILMaryxPbmZ_4r_tIAQ6LBT_avhY9REDWvVV9arW5RGp5E2plibf3TpBNaeuvTJpKjyEfsZfK6lpaDYP0ysRCZ84N5nWpNzYDIrFhskb3Um9hGq79pXTeAspx4rUsMD5n9XoOk8gKM-xMAOIXl-3x9rXRGoEk-jw1HdcXUSEtGzvLrVKmtWWMMbsnnk81XYNEAo-q6X4G7bSljo-7dN_gkDmry0ZGiu2LVcFJ7ImekLzekwj934x5rLICT5JO-LuSzSqd0mz3dzwdlJSNtSCc/402/2wDXFfRZRsuRPlzCQ91f_Q/h1/VQ5ZEjvgbQ_ynMa8W5bfK_7D3zHDfCTFnJVZ41YM0DY) | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xoJa3wg1j84OjtinTpxYP8bfEAfUf5W3ZikwLvBuX55VminHJHVBpH2CVa67Uqx5fi7DHwh-2WWLxx5pitJNevzXVHIXEbd5AriE15LSMpDL1OEeEOi7YtC0IkyYrncizp-v6uHDUq6Lb9EIV4HAJaWAjks2v8h2cWKMYK61rMq1dwPFYtgKiOgWlUPIzar1v1xYzH8HLFeoHS4aHMbLdqOazRH95YlHfLb5UthpBV_Yk_2THLQMSCrtnN3Tl0TM8LgpllsnAhCLVoRZOiFT_7MUBPK8YNn_LbTEZGRM8OAY_KnkKXubT4zDD4S9HB7pyValeNj2X30iMA-DVhtaHaNlem8JDjOewWFxb2WrUd0L-1yLqzdU482G7Ysdmg-colrMO7WqZwwk9wtgIPwsxXqdLx6oGwBfKWQnzoBOvOe5scVP2YZ5pWbtG5wEleTdcZchWODEYMJonwQ6I7yLnm/402/2wDXFfRZRsuRPlzCQ91f_Q/h2/WHGMx_93uPiGP_Nh5FbpHQ-AYC6HHjk_9F-L1GX0c8w)

After today, we’ll report to the Federal Election Commission our latest quarterly fundraising report showing how much we’ve raised and spent, and how much cash on hand we have for the fight ahead.
Rashida prioritizes meeting with constituents and crafts legislation in partnership with members of her district to ensure everyday people have the resources to not only survive but thrive. **Your support today will mean more in-person events, more doors knocked, and more direct communication with voters and constituents.**
**During the 2020 election, Rashida’s Get Out the Vote operation was critical to delivering victories to progressives and Democrats up and down the ballot in Michigan, including defeating Donald Trump.** Now, heading into another presidential election year, and at a time of decreased enthusiasm among critical Democratic voting blocs, we have to work even harder to turn out voters, win back the House of Representatives, and protect the Democratic-controlled Senate and White House.

clean_body: Heading into another presidential election year, we have to work even harder to turn out voters. | | | Friend, As the daughter of Palestinian immigrants and a proud UAW worker, Rashida understands the struggles of working people and marginalized communities. Growing up in the shadows of the Marathon Oil refinery, Rashida thought that corporate pollution and greed were normal and that every neighborhood suffered from violations of clean air standards. Rashida has lived the struggles of everyday people and she brings those lived experiences with her to the halls of Congress every day. Because she isn’t afraid to speak truth to power―holding billionaire bullies, corporate polluters, and Wall Street banks accountable―she’s under relentless attack from those who seek to maintain the unjust status quo. That’s why, as Rashida prepares for her re-election campaign, she needs our help to fight back against the unlimited resources of millionaires, billionaires, and greedy corporations. | After today, we’ll report to the Federal Election Commission our latest quarterly fundraising report showing how much we’ve raised and spent, and how much cash on hand we have for the fight ahead. Rashida prioritizes meeting with constituents and crafts legislation in partnership with members of her district to ensure everyday people have the resources to not only survive but thrive. Your support today will mean more in-person events, more doors knocked, and more direct communication with voters and constituents. During the 2020 election, Rashida’s Get Out the Vote operation was critical to delivering victories to progressives and Democrats up and down the ballot in Michigan, including defeating Donald Trump. Now, heading into another presidential election year, and at a time of decreased enthusiasm among critical Democratic voting blocs, we have to work even harder to turn out voters, win back the House of Representatives, and protect the Democratic-controlled Senate and White House. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for all that you do. Together, we’re fighting for a future that includes all of us, not just the wealthy and powerful. -Team Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Friend,
I want you to know that your support doesn’t go unnoticed. In the final days and hours within a major goal, our whole team is grateful for every single contribution that comes in through the door.
This grassroots team is the only thing that powers my work. There are no billionaires rushing to bail us out like some of my opponents. So, when we reach our goals, I know exactly who got us there.
Tonight, we have our critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. We’ve come a long way, but we’re still falling a little short.
According to our records, you’re still eligible to use your PCR. That means you can make a $50 contribution (or $100 for couples) and receive a refund from the State of Minnesota.

clean_body: # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # | | | Friend, After four sham arrests, indictments, and even a mugshot failed to break me, a Democrat judge is now trying to destroy my Family Business. Democrats are seeking to bring down the world-famous "Trump Tower" and impose what some are calling " the corporate death penalty" upon me. The trial could begin as early as Monday... The Left is hoping that if they can hurt me financially, that I will shut down my campaign and forever surrender our country to the radical Left Democrats and the Deep State. They want to take away my freedom, my finances, and harass my family. But they can never take away my resilience, my courage, and my determination to save this country. | As I've said before, I will NEVER SURRENDER our mission - no matter how bad things get. After every single attack against us, our movement has emerged stronger than ever before. Now, the upcoming FEC-mandated deadline is our chance to prove just how strong our movement truly is. When our report is released, there will be no question that the American people stand by the one and only movement that gives a voice to the forgotten citizens of our country, puts the needs of America first, and sets our nation on the path to GREATNESS! If you 're doing poorly right now due to the very sinister and corrupt people running our country, then just hit the back button and go about your day. I mean it! | | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. body:
We’re just a few hours away from our end-of-quarter FEC deadline.
#
We’re currently just a few hours away from our critical fundraising deadline when the clock strikes midnight. At this moment, we’re 96% of the way to our $400,000 goal for the quarter, and we’re hoping you can help us close the gap!
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230930.9wJK7L&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=em20230930-5078-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5078%2E2526796%2Eq2FdCi)
Like every quarterly FEC deadline, our campaign’s fundraising numbers will go public for everyone — including our biggest far-right opponents — to see. We need to show that our grassroots movement continues to have Alexandria’s back as she challenges the status quo and fights for real progress.
**With just a few hours left, this is your last chance to chip in and help us reach our goal before time runs out. Will you make a contribution of $5 or more right now?**

name: Team Cori
subject: We will never back down from white supremacist hate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
As the first activist from the movement for Black lives to be elected to Congress, Cori is lifting up the movement’s demands into policy changes. | |
---
Peter, Tonight at midnight we’ll close the books on a critical fundraising deadline and report dollars raised and spent to the Federal Election Commission (FEC). **This report will not only show the strength of Cori’s re-election campaign, but also our progressive movement for change**. Cori is leading in Congress on the critical issues of our time, introducing the **Reparations Now Resolution** that tells the truth about how slavery and discrimination have been integral in our country’s development. It would provide reparations to descendants of enslaved Black people and people of African descent, and outlines the various forms those reparations should take. In Congress, Cori is fighting for workers’ rights and wages, introducing numerous worker safety bills while also **standing with striking workers** demanding a fair contract from corporations that put the profits of their CEOs and shareholders over workers’ wages. Last weekend, Cori helped organize a UAW rally in Wentzville, MO where she was joined by her sister-in-service Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, local UAW presidents and workers in a powerful statement of solidarity. As the first activist from the movement for Black lives to be elected to Congress, Cori is lifting up the movement’s demands into policy changes. But, because she unapologetically advocates for her constituents and marginalized people everywhere, **Cori is under relentless attack by white supremacists and the right wing who threaten her with violence and intimidation on a daily basis.** [**Will you donate before midnight tonight to show Cori that you have her back as we work together toward an inclusive future where we not only survive but thrive?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_3_6q7pxG0RDApdDqptJRutV5sU_ZuLgdBZ7sDI_VCOirA7Gm74Je1PQNGyd-cBIHgJkac0lJtenq9T0VE9n6peCb-v0aqVxrT4GWW2qqPfFBPP_0vooukUS90ibLAzOl88VG_1_6EhSbcD6BVA8SV0isO2AAU7xD5sZHBeoBu2D9Msojxk7X773cAla2yXPjjdlOcEFKedH_px5ids6v7o0q_8UXwS0T6mxYz2QL1wuTWiN667GuPajU5cFj84SWffhe_riGTJefH-6vmNCc2GSYXNu5mm97LV84x6GBvhYBNXu8g2RL39IOdY5elBSh5C015GbGBkTNG8k6J7ZRidnZPwUE-o3nws2CZRm5I8Mh7hi5biaARRWkpskEpVM/402/EBCkLMYZQsaBUVD-t1DPiw/h0/APJXGx9wSRMrp0tQu45cI6iyg5Uyewsfoq0-5RJABsg)**** **[DONATE >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_3_6q7pxG0RDApdDqptJRutV5sU_ZuLgdBZ7sDI_VCEFLILoeFso7uPubVYdPTYLku2A5QKPMwGtUYtG0Wlf18NDZtNTHMCSVg5mc-ogV8i0TOvkhHeIoV0McDbkxOTDt11OUbO3EDer564WMQSgQAeYaup65QTWHqoYaP9dpTYiHLVE6h6wHrQL1i7hVNg2vK0-M9r-Ko0_IJ8oXk47NWyL4wU8NlNWfwCF3GNi-J4310njfsZ5t9imeXsQECCd88esP1fYA87rSPp9cj7QOKW9zAd2lH_vv6ceEuYiaFKpWIiGyuYxRSNBf4eeCInt7HZ9ZEdbeh7l57gFz8pY28becM1k2tpQIV1pmUn_1OH3EnIRJtIQd5AW3DsJ3Whc/402/EBCkLMYZQsaBUVD-t1DPiw/h1/KwwWPMx7esHWpd-vBB3_Fh164cBSjWQc70s6O9UkOOE) ** After tonight, our opponents will comb through our FEC report looking for a weakness. But, because she unapologetically advocates for her constituents and marginalized people everywhere, Cori is under relentless attack by white supremacists and the right wing who threaten her with violence and intimidation on a daily basis. ** After tonight, our opponents will comb through our FEC report looking for a weakness. Will we have the resources we need to respond to the attacks and send Cori back to Congress where she’ll continue to speak truth to power? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Together, we will never back down from right-wing white supremacist hate that seeks to undermine our progressive movement for change. # ABOUT ERIC EARLY
---
Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. Friend,
The minute I announced my 2024 campaign the Fake News hacks began claiming that the Democrats "want to run against Trump."
These clowns couldn't be any more full of it.
But now, with the evidence so irrefutable, even the failing _New York Times_ is forced to _finally_ admit what the American people knew from the start...
_**"...Mr. Biden's top aides and advisers have believed... Mr. Trump would be a tougher general-election opponent than Mr. DeSantis or any of the other Republican presidential candidates."**_
With poll after poll showing us CRUSHING the RINOs' Deep State-approved puppet candidate, the primary is _effectively_ over.
And the nightmare scenario that Crooked Joe and the Left thought they could pretend did not exist, is now very much their _REALITY_...
_**" Trump would comfortably beat Biden by 49 percent to 45 percent."**_
[Source:_Daily Express_]
With 2024 _ALREADY_ shifting to the general election, we can't afford to waste a moment as a truly desperate Crooked Joe will go to unimaginable lengths to try and stop us.
**Which is exactly why I recently set a new goal for our campaign ahead of the 9/30 FEC-mandated quarterly deadline of 100,000 grassroots contributions ... **
_**... Even if it's $1 at a time!**_
Between you and me, Friend, I might actually enjoy seeing the $1 contributions the most! There's no greater reminder than a $1 donation that our movement truly is a movement of _THE PEOPLE_.

clean_body: Crooked Joe is terrified to face us. Crooked Joe is terrified to face us. | | | Friend, The minute I announced my 2024 campaign the Fake News hacks began claiming that the Democrats "want to run against Trump." These clowns couldn't be any more full of it. But now, with the evidence so irrefutable, even the failing New York Times is forced to finally admit what the American people knew from the start... "...Mr. Biden's top aides and advisers have believed... Mr. Trump would be a tougher general-election opponent than Mr. DeSantis or any of the other Republican presidential candidates." With poll after poll showing us CRUSHING the RINOs' Deep State-approved puppet candidate, the primary is effectively over. And the nightmare scenario that Crooked Joe and the Left thought they could pretend did not exist, is now very much their REALITY... " Trump would comfortably beat Biden by 49 percent to 45 percent." [Source:Daily Express] With 2024 ALREADY shifting to the general election, we can't afford to waste a moment as a truly desperate Crooked Joe will go to unimaginable lengths to try and stop us. Which is exactly why I recently set a new goal for our campaign ahead of the 9/30 FEC-mandated quarterly deadline of 100,000 grassroots contributions ... ... Even if it's $1 at a time! Between you and me, Friend, I might actually enjoy seeing the $1 contributions the most! There's no greater reminder than a $1 donation that our movement truly is a movement of THE PEOPLE. If you 're struggling right now due to Crooked Joe's moronic and disastrous policies, believe me, I understand. And I don't want you to even think about donating! Just hit the back button and go about your day. | | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. body:
Jirair is running for Congress because there is so much at stake to ensure everyone in our community has equal opportunities and a fair shot to chase their own dream. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/zXToNFXV4kioy6WMrocbTQ2?unsubscribedata=LEluJByfECU6cGj3YlEUb8s4bfA6wtO9MWLNlMzhCdFyv4Ls85P7ulBuJZfwb7pZUeHjfYZGZ%2FyXJHupLb4TNBUe75N8%2Frok6BuMbQqmqP%2FpL%2BPstMJd2WR2wcDFrKVIRfpyK%2BjITGYhc5SEI8bEpiPbalMtDnCdnHCTkcY6hAn6kuBKeDQdQ%2BgoS07HirlSBndaXKwSIMzjo7ifnIX4IOovEWLlogXJ9USlJJcei0r07G4eiyxeJbM0W1hOPt5QSpD2QVPPdWtp5q4flpXf4Yo4MHHk6KdQJ%2F240DYXEbF3%2F6erpWTGXNeE3vVCVO0tGfjEgn%2BqG2g2Teh2snJk3sPanmwr6f%2BcklaGChjLKwTf9J5oglwuqY7RuyqziZcBe9H8tDKBL98H71jhukS%2B8zxVGWPb9vFq%2FpgN7%2FhcWge6RGprE0UoCqs%2BHNM%2FRkda)

| |
---
Happy Saturday, Peter!

I just got back from a walk with my fiancé Micheal and our dog Jozi.

I won’t lie, it was a tough week. Last weekend, my fiancé and I were at Burbank Pride where I was accosted by a Trump extremist who said that gay Armenians like me shouldn’t exist. I’m still fired up.

I’m running to represent California’s 30th Congressional District because I’m sick of the bigotry, and I’m sick of marginalized communities getting left behind. I want to make the American Dream attainable again.

**[Here’s the thing, Peter — tonight at midnight is my critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, but I’m 6% behind where I should be. It’s the last chance before time runs out for me to meet my goal so that I can hire staff, pay for yard signs, and stand out in my crowded primary. clean_body: Jirair is running for Congress because there is so much at stake to ensure everyone in our community has equal opportunities and a fair shot to chase their own dream. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Happy Saturday, Peter! I just got back from a walk with my fiancé Micheal and our dog Jozi. I won’t lie, it was a tough week. Last weekend, my fiancé and I were at Burbank Pride where I was accosted by a Trump extremist who said that gay Armenians like me shouldn’t exist. I’m still fired up. I’m running to represent California’s 30th Congressional District because I’m sick of the bigotry, and I’m sick of marginalized communities getting left behind. I want to make the American Dream attainable again. = | = I want to make California livable again so we can get back to the things that matter. Things like walks with Micheal and Jozi. Have a wonderful weekend, Jirair * | = Meet Jirair An experienced federal policy leader, public health doctor and progressive voice for change, Jirair has dedicated his life to helping others and spent his career bringing diverse communities together to solve big challenges. Let's Build A Campaign Together That Lifts Up Every Californian. | = Paid for and authorized by Jirair Ratevosian for Congress Jirair Ratevosian for Congress 321 N. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70699632/430178232/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDA1NzhkNy1mNTVmLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g0oGH-2zlHOI4XNE5G6w15RmS2NmYhuHyrflOqZjuos=&emci=a7814c6f-b25f-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=5d0578d7-f55f-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
In a few hours, I’m facing my most important end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign so far. **After midnight tonight, we're required by federal law to show everyone how much our people-powered campaign has raised to defeat Lauren Boebert and finally kick her out of Congress.**
**Right now, we’re only a few thousand dollars short of our $2.2 million online goal, so I have to ask:** **[Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – before our end-of-quarter FEC deadline at midnight tonight – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70699633/430178233/1610638071?refcode=em20230930pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=5d0578d7-f55f-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDA1NzhkNy1mNTVmLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g0oGH-2zlHOI4XNE5G6w15RmS2NmYhuHyrflOqZjuos=)**
Unlike Lauren Boebert, I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. Too many politicians have been corrupted by special interests who buy votes and buy access. That’s not our campaign.
Our campaign is funded by people, like you, giving an average of just $31. A people-powered campaign is what will help us counter the Super PAC lies and hold Boebert accountable. But I’m counting on your support now if we’re going to win.

clean_body: Our critical deadline is at midnight tonight. | | = Team — there are just a few hours left before our major fundraising deadline tonight. We know your inbox is probably full of end-of-quarter emails, so we'll make this brief. We're counting on our grassroots supporters to help power Sepi's fight for civil rights, climate action, affordable housing, universal healthcare access, economic and racial justice, and reproductive rights. We still need to raise $5,918 to meet our goal. = = Thank you, friend. — Team Sepi \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Sepi HQ <mailto:info@sepishyne.com> Date: Sat, Sep 30, 2023 at 11:33 AM Subject: Important update for you To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Tonight, we'll close the books on our fundraising numbers for this quarter and submit our report to the FEC. This is a major deadline and a huge test of the strength of our movement. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = Deadlines like this may seem arbitrary, but they're critical barometers of the state of our race. Meeting our fundraising goal means we'll have the resources to hire more organizers, ramp up our digital mobilization efforts, and plan for the months ahead. = = Thank you so much. — Team Sepi HQ | Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today. Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress? = = PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Sepi Shyne For Congress 8149 Santa Monica Blvd #280 West Hollywood, CA 90046 United States

Friend, A little over a week ago, I pushed my team to set an ambitious goal for the final week of this fundraising quarter, and since then we have seen a massive surge of support. People from all over the country—from Ohio, Alabama, California, New York, Montana, Colorado and nearly every other state—has donated and have sent us messages of support for our **mission to take out one of the most extreme and reckless MAGA extremists in Congress, Jim Jordan.** However, our donations have slowed heading into the weekend, and my team isn’t sure we’re going to get there before midnight. Right now, we are so close— _**only $382 away from hitting our goal.**_
__

clean_body: Can you push us over the edge?| | | = Friend, A little over a week ago, I pushed my team to set an ambitious goal for the final week of this fundraising quarter, and since then we have seen a massive surge of support. People from all over the country—from Ohio, Alabama, California, New York, Montana, Colorado and nearly every other state—has donated and have sent us messages of support for our mission to take out one of the most extreme and reckless MAGA extremists in Congress, Jim Jordan. However, our donations have slowed heading into the weekend, and my team isn’t sure we’re going to get there before midnight. Right now, we are so close— only $382 away from hitting our goal. = = | | = | | = | | And if you can be a hero for us and help close the gap by donating the entire $382 we have left to meet our goal, here is a custom link made just for you where you can do so: = We truly appreciate all that you do for us and for Democrats everywhere. -Tamie | | | | | = | Tamie Wilson Candidate for Congress (OH-4) | | | = Tamie for US To contribute via check, please address to: 273 SARATOGA ST. Hey, it’s Olivia again. Did you see my last message? **[Isaiah needs you now more than ever. Your support could be what makes the difference in electing Isaiah to be the youngest member of Congress! Read my message below and please rush a donation before midnight. >>](http://clicksp.isaiahmartin.org/f/a/XbW8_0MBXnFj0DuC0I848w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm-~)** | | [END-OF-QUARTER DEADLINE AT MIDNIGHT: RUSH A DONATION NOW >>](http://clicksp.isaiahmartin.org/f/a/fTjTbvA8xEg77aXha28tgw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm-~~)
---
\--- _Begin Forwarded Message_ \---
Hi, it’s Olivia Julianna. You may know me as the 20 year old abortion rights activist who was bullied by Matt Gaetz on Twitter... and raised over $2 million for abortion funds off of it.

Now, I’m reaching out on behalf of my best friend Isaiah, whose FIRST FEC end-of-quarter deadline is tomorrow night.

Isaiah is running for an OPEN Congressional seat, and if elected, he will be the youngest member of Congress. But he can only get there and fight for us if grassroots Democrats like you step up to power our movement.
**[Can you take 60 seconds to rush a donation to Isaiah’s campaign right now, before his end-of-quarter fundraising goes public? >>](http://clicksp.isaiahmartin.org/f/a/XwcdGHF9Byk_6kRgeBygvA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm-~)**
| [RUSH A DONATION NOW >>](http://clicksp.isaiahmartin.org/f/a/2iLpNaET7_gQi_thmEBX-A~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm-~~)
---
Gen Z has proven that when given the chance to lead, we can get big things done.

And Isaiah has proven time after time that he can bring real results to Houston. Whether it was helping to open a new polling location or working to get more Houstonians vaccinated against COVID-19, Isaiah has NEVER backed down from a challenge.

**Now, he wants to take his fight for our democracy, for abortion rights, and for our future to Washington... but this is only possible with you by our side!**
**[Can you step up right now and rush $25, or $15, or even $5 to Isaiah’s campaign? Every single dollar counts! >>](http://clicksp.isaiahmartin.org/f/a/wSQ4oJffArcEoqU65_hRUA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm-~)**

body:

_Andrea_

body:
MAGA Republicans are making voters lose faith in every last democratic institution...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20253%2E4449941%2EoiWH4G)
---
**Donald Trump said he WILL investigate media outlets like _MSNBC_ for TREASON if he retakes the White House in 2024!** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20230930_EMPOLL_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=20253%2E4449941%2EoiWH4G) _He thinks they should be PUNISHED for following the evidence and reporting truthfully about our democratic elections!_ | **So we’re conducting an _URGENT_ poll to see how Democrats feel about news outlets' performance under the pressure of Trump’s RELENTLESS ATTACKS:**

**[_How would you grade _MSNBC_?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20230930_EMPOLL_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=20253%2E4449941%2EoiWH4G)** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20230930_EMPOLL_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=20253%2E4449941%2EoiWH4G) | [A: ABSOLUTELY TERRIFIC! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20230930_EMPOLL_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=20253%2E4449941%2EoiWH4G)
---
[B: GREAT! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20230930_EMPOLL_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=20253%2E4449941%2EoiWH4G)
[C: ADEQUATE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20230930_EMPOLL_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=20253%2E4449941%2EoiWH4G)
[D: UNSATISFACTORY »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20230930_EMPOLL_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=13&akid=20253%2E4449941%2EoiWH4G)
[F: TERRIBLE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20230930_EMPOLL_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=14&akid=20253%2E4449941%2EoiWH4G)
****__500 POLL RESPONSES NEEDED BY 11:59 PM__ TO MAKE THIS POLL VIABLE FOR REFERENCE IN OUR 2024 ELECTION STRATEGY. _ONLY MAGA REPUBLICANS HAVE GIVEN MSNBC AN F RATING AS OF YET._ ****
_Listen, Donald Trump and his MAGA army are trying to make voters lose faith in every last democratic institution!_

...and media watchdogs like _MSNBC_ are just their latest target!

We need to know that their plan to overtake this country is NOT impacting the minds of our most loyal Democratic supporters!

[_**So PLEASE: submit your poll response quickly! »**_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20230930_EMPOLL_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=15&akid=20253%2E4449941%2EoiWH4G)
**500 POLL RESPONSES NEEDED BY 11:59 PM**
Thank you for your commitment to upholding democracy,

-FFR Polling Team
_MSNBC_ is not associated or affiliated with Fight for Reform and has not sponsored or approved of this communication.

**Hi Everyone,**
Today is the end of the fundraising quarter. If you are thinking of supporting our campaign and can make a donation of any size, it will be greatly appreciated. As the only candidate willing to oppose Bob Menendez before the indictments, we have received an outpouring of support that has been truly humbling. We’re just getting started, but we can’t wait to see what the coming months will bring. As I vowed when I got into this race, I will be in this to the end to stand up and fight for the people on New Jersey.
Thank you for all of the support and big things are coming! Best,
Kyle JaseyUS Senate Candidate [www.jaseyforjersey.com](https://jaseyforjersey.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5671f227bdee226bbef9f77be&id=e241944abf&e=aa183c8d4d)

# Our Movement for a Brighter Future: Your Support Needed Now!

**Peter** , to effectively bring about positive change, I need your help and support.
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=9a480ad61a&e=a2a46ff12c)

I want to start by expressing my gratitude for the incredible support I have received so far, but **the journey is far from over.**
Campaign contributions play a vital role in ensuring our message reaches every voter and allows us to run a strong and competitive campaign. By contributing, you become an integral part of the movement we are building together.
If you believe in a brighter future for our district and a government that truly represents its people, **I kindly ask for your contribution** to help us continue fighting for what matters most.

[](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=27b10cba9089440b82d9a623dae2df6d&_e=v11dZeLc_6fx2_r7hPbpmE9OlJELYCTYjZuBw5L77WL-vGPIU-EEhLkIkp_n1Gx7CJBTO_rCjN67NP9qT9mbd1hr--FW_b5P8hJrHbaGmhqCAuQt672LDhw8v7VzRh1qFrrDmTLgJRBS382UmgqnPxLZ3RL6xB07eyjIb313rzdgemRJGrrXgqKLYMqfDndGF68gbD4BSXqvENNYhwcsUbLCx_qRGopI5WJ5eQlLgqlxNEXc7pAXe9B8oYKH68DKPbzHcisJbdryf1ZrJ2DxA2CakksFZXLLonlNT232PQpTq3bhlMTPciH2FYLQcgaJEyoQ81crWnXBeeAavT33_8bTXglCIpDlsi2OE8AmG6inyeQ0O0Afrgy81MIgHum8)

---
Peter,

We have just hours until our midnight deadline, [**and I want to ensure your name is on my quarterly donor list.**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=27b10cba9089440b82d9a623dae2df6d&_e=v11dZeLc_6fx2_r7hPbpmE9OlJELYCTYjZuBw5L77WL-vGPIU-EEhLkIkp_n1Gx7CJBTO_rCjN67NP9qT9mbd1hr--FW_b5P8hJrHbaGmhqCAuQt672LDhw8v7VzRh1qFrrDmTLgJRBS382UmgqnPxLZ3RL6xB07eyjIb313rzdgemRJGrrXgqKLYMqfDndGF68gbD4BSXqvENNYhwcsUbLCx_qRGopI5WJ5eQlLgqmLzCTo0_vZ99lpj0uwsnxSpPK8ytalErd1yIgoR0agaHGOFptYXvyAuDZVHmoU0u_cevQvsM3Nvfjf06uF-tioRN-Sy6DrxrAPmURu_HzvQu6BfyKRkeNHfUvEHynTRv63n5qPb2o0aPCSvxCgz6lX)

[**Can you correct the record by making an urgent donation ahead of tonight’s deadline?**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=27b10cba9089440b82d9a623dae2df6d&_e=v11dZeLc_6fx2_r7hPbpmE9OlJELYCTYjZuBw5L77WL-vGPIU-EEhLkIkp_n1Gx7CJBTO_rCjN67NP9qT9mbd1hr--FW_b5P8hJrHbaGmhqCAuQt672LDhw8v7VzRh1qFrrDmTLgJRBS382UmgqnPxLZ3RL6xB07eyjIb313rzdgemRJGrrXgqKLYMqfDndGF68gbD4BSXqvENNYhwcsUbLCx_qRGopI5WJ5eQlLgqkZYJx1SRrVwc1NkxmRKQFkq23jxSDeDFGAUQQRWBE0lnGgHUZWDYLMwn-OT0QFo-ZcfmIOr8gIvPNq49Rbz_ZL6Ccj7cuTL2w9FN1FlapDz59wRGrA_NnuYaxx_CNV12quRvevKcynwQeUs7ydOpW3)

[** CORRECT THE RECORD ➞ **](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=27b10cba9089440b82d9a623dae2df6d&_e=v11dZeLc_6fx2_r7hPbpmE9OlJELYCTYjZuBw5L77WL-vGPIU-EEhLkIkp_n1Gx7CJBTO_rCjN67NP9qT9mbd1hr--FW_b5P8hJrHbaGmhqCAuQt672LDhw8v7VzRh1qFrrDmTLgJRBS382UmgqnPxLZ3RL6xB07eyjIb313rzdgemRJGrrXgqKLYMqfDndGF68gbD4BSXqvENNYhwcsUbLCx_qRGopI5WJ5eQlLgqmoZCxzkJqlxzhPWdn6gBXNsYBnZf-2oTUduKs6Ib_7cns0CIf_YVjHWWSj-a_9BTKatxC3bAWbMVbuNXV9nf7imyghhN8KojyzcyCjZNL30ZiKiZVBOB9STYxPcLc2qoFQMGdzoYkaWVmInoVoNpr1)

I don’t mean to alarm you, but my Finance Director let me know that we’re short of our goal. We’re running out of time before midnight, and unless you step forward immediately, I don’t know what we’re going to do.

Please Peter, your donation is critical to the fight to restore Conservative leaders up and down the ballot. [**I can’t win the Governor's election without you.**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=27b10cba9089440b82d9a623dae2df6d&_e=v11dZeLc_6fx2_r7hPbpmE9OlJELYCTYjZuBw5L77WL-vGPIU-EEhLkIkp_n1Gx7CJBTO_rCjN67NP9qT9mbd1hr--FW_b5P8hJrHbaGmhqCAuQt672LDhw8v7VzRh1qFrrDmTLgJRBS382UmgqnPxLZ3RL6xB07eyjIb313rzdgemRJGrrXgqKLYMqfDndGF68gbD4BSXqvENNYhwcsUbLCx_qRGopI5WJ5eQlLgqkGnLZJSCFeLxY5zLmAdJLg2gdX-Vn00SsjTPiBxseIIIk7fi_TIJ7sgHUI3xo_ikkMtdVq6Rzjvd_7rzPk4b6Pf-Dy8fYaJBYlCpaLQggnkhzj-qm-TImylhFAqOL1BesYy5NwBX3_12uRj_BTZi2i)

Thanks,
Mark

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

subject: They tell me the same thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | With just a few hours left before tonight’s FEC deadline, I’m asking for your help. Can you please pitch in to help us reach our goal?

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kbn-2309-fr](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70703293/430188282/786111081?contactdata=+T3mt+OyXCVIMlyhW0aZHdRGx+tuIbo0L4IRrgOUHGVhCZH/piPHZFo6ZTWXo5YWhBLwp4Z++q9Hlblf3COnc/snfw8AkX5X3ug6WBvW3yo=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_WL_230930_2_11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjBjNjgwZGEtZmE1Zi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cjJ15cf9pyogJMUCGFkVhqeMaHMLxpcGfH5fLOtSJhY=)

We can’t afford to fall short right now.

Look, I’ve had so many conversations with people who are excited about my campaign and who know I’m our best shot at defeating Michelle Steel.

They want to support our grassroots movement, but they all tell me the same thing: “I’m worried that Democrats can’t raise enough to take on Michelle’s millions”. Well, this FEC deadline is our opportunity to prove our strength and make it clear that we’re in it to win it.

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Emailing for $5
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Why do we ask for the equivalent of a cup of fancy coffee?
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=725%2E135344%2ENzme2v)

Hey there — we're asking you to make a $5 donation today to support Elissa Slotkin’s campaign for Senate in Michigan.
Sometimes people ask us why we ask for the equivalent of a cup of fancy coffee. They question whether small donations actually matter. They do. It takes a village to get this done, and it’s so important that we maintain a steady pace of support.
Earlier this month, we had our first serious Republican opponent enter the race. Mike Rogers, or whomever the Republican nominee is, will no doubt see a flood of support from deep-pocketed Republican donors like Betsy DeVos, corporate PACs, and Super PACs who will all spend millions of dollars on their behalf in order to flip Michigan red. Because they know that their path to control the Senate runs right through Michigan.
With public polling showing our race in a dead heat, we have to be prepared to match our Republican opponent dollar-for-dollar so we can defend this open seat and protect our slim Democratic Senate majority.
**We know that $5 may not sound like a lot on its own, but trust us, we wouldn’t keep asking if it didn’t add up when there are hundreds of people chipping in and showing their support. It’s how we’ve won our past campaigns and it’s how we plan to keep up the momentum to win this race too.**
[**If you are able, will you make a $5 contribution to our campaign for Senate before our FEC deadline at midnight tonight? It’s not as much about how much you give, but how many people are coming together to show their support for Elissa and this campaign.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/925?c0=ebs-em-sep23.NuniU5&refcode=em230930-4-15&t=2&akid=725%2E135344%2ENzme2v)**
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/564?c0=ebs-em-sep23.bL9WxX&refcode=em230930-4-15&t=3&akid=725%2E135344%2ENzme2v)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-sep23.ftxq_S&refcode=em230930-4-15&t=4&akid=725%2E135344%2ENzme2v)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-sep23.hxG7bS&refcode=em230930-4-15&t=5&akid=725%2E135344%2ENzme2v)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-sep23.Buc2ei&refcode=em230930-4-15&t=6&akid=725%2E135344%2ENzme2v)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-sep23.CyJnvg&refcode=em230930-4-15&t=7&akid=725%2E135344%2ENzme2v)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-sep23.owjc7j&refcode=em230930-4-15&t=8&akid=725%2E135344%2ENzme2v)**
---
****
Thank you,
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=9&akid=725%2E135344%2ENzme2v).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

body:
| Hi. I’m reaching out because we’re just a few hours away from our FEC deadline, and **we only need to raise another $1,500 to hit our goal.**

Can I count on you to help out and prove our grassroots strength in our first report since National Republicans launched the first attack ads against us of the election cycle and publicly backed one of my three opponents?

name: Yadira
subject: quick note for Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hi Peter, with just hours until my biggest deadline yet, I’m reaching out with a personal request: **[Will you pitch in $10 or whatever you can afford to help me win reelection next November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70706525/430189131/535544092?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.09.30_b2_y_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDQxY2JlZi1mZDVmLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-F8zAiENCCRSgSkQ2vyjjfGTxlqtnIE3D4PFExI5HpY=)**

As a freshman Congresswoman, I’m so proud of the strides my Democratic colleagues and I have made towards helping working families on important issues like affordable housing, accessible healthcare, and abortion rights.

But Republicans want to grow their majority to enact their extreme agenda. The reality is an entrenched MAGA majority can undo all of our progress in the blink of an eye - _and they’re hellbent on winning my seat next November._

**[That’s why I’m asking for your help. With just hours to go, I need all the grassroots support I can get to help move our work forward and protect this vulnerable seat. clean_body: This is the last time we’ll email you about our end-of-quarter deadline. | | | | | This is the last email we’ll send you about our end-of-quarter deadline. Thanks to the unwavering support of grassroots supporters like you over these last few days, we were able to close in on our fundraising gap, bringing us to 94% of our end-of-quarter goal. But here’s the thing: There are TWO HOURS left before our September deadline. We still need to raise $7,254 if we want to hit our goal. And as the fight for battleground Virginia intensifies, we need the strength of dedicated Democrats in your community to help steer our party toward victory. When we launched our QUINTUPLE-MATCH offer last week, something incredible happened. Thousands of Democrats joined our movement to defeat extreme Republicans. This is the energy we need to propel Democrats forward: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Let's be clear: failing to meet tonight's goal could give extreme Republicans an edge as we head into October. With Election Day less than two months away , hitting our target is an absolute must. If Republicans win, so does their hateful, racist, and xenophobic far-right agenda. Donations from supporters like you allow us to build winning campaigns, strengthen our on-the-ground efforts, and mobilize voters. But, our strategy to defeat the right-wing agenda hinges on your commitment. We’ve witnessed the incredible achievements we can accomplish when we unite behind a common cause, and with you by our side, there's no challenge we can't overcome. We're relying on you in this critical hour, Team DLCC ** | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. In this race for governor, **I proudly stand as the only woman with state executive leadership** , and this personal perspective fuels my commitment to addressing the challenges faced by Washington families.

For over seven years, I've been on the ground, working tirelessly to understand our family's needs and deliver real solutions as commissioner of public lands.

I utilized the Department of Natural Resources and our public lands to uplift Washington families like never before. From ensuring our children have an environment to grow up in and enjoy to creating sustainable jobs and lowering energy costs, _**I'm determined to invest in our future.**_

Now, I'm running for governor to build on our progress and make Washington the shining example of a pro-worker, pro-family, pro-choice, and pro-environment state. [_**With my critical September deadline tonight at midnight, I urgently need your support to bolster our resources. [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3552b1955dec43b89eaa8d67a8a7cf51&_e=SPWO_tiEk81b7fxofDE1ciX92f-NvQrHrV0I0i-qtrrJP7VxZAY-mh38XXQxwtwTh8gfmIsgMASfP0fXft1HcUuq-HomID4Z7IlAPuxwwPHN2bhAOHic6lNXpxnNwGmtkbvumDhoS7iwLDa7MDJW2cEYBI-XV3DtizBCrGQAVTNI0wUV9EjYYJ0Nhl4UQS2BGyurTIrgK8w91HfyhR3QGNwNzHMCD8nuJc-cOgoklZw7z-JAnOXxULl-X8Q309yOMIRNqF28xv-p__ilrRWHhYh4quFgD65ISmr2sb2xmnzcLY3DHYsWNYFYU0M4D6fN_-_vIjZT1MiL02InCtnPF83Rtd4TuLKK6s6Bb1jTpfAV189dax9CSTqs5JAOp3PvR7V-NirUv51dUHCNcF0d2oWUxIvmE4zL0jyNtY0zaBrS5Xensh912mu5-xbNQifv)
2024 is the most important election of our life, and electing a strong Republican nominee for President is ESSENTIAL if we’re going to win. It’s no longer Republican vs. Democrat.

**– It’s freedom vs. government control
– It’s secure borders vs. unchecked ILLEGAL immigration
– It’s a future for our children vs. a draconian world of LOCKDOWNS, mask mandates, and climate hoaxes.**

body:
I wanted to quickly bump John’s message in case you missed it earlier today. I think it’s helpful to hear directly from him why we need to hit this $5,000 goal by tonight.
__ | | | Hi there, friend! We wanted to quickly bump John’s message in case you missed it earlier today. I think it’s helpful to hear directly from him why we need to hit this $5,000 goal by tonight. And the good news for us is that we’re only $295 away, and we’ve still got a few hours to get there. **[So if you haven’t been able to chip in yet, please make sure you do before midnight tonight!](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=e85bf5493e4b4b1a94e853e66be39adf&_e=IMyKArseshvkOPwT9Y8S3dzTmucaSfS8XoEvpgVURpvZNAu4g3ct7JsoSR7BQF8t4tz8XsRAY4ImOKqbRLc1ntROp7oiIYJIbSLRXaS8D-StCDuNjQc8L0V14cYgan46dDq_FSDSMEjC23pi_2xSGYbEcWMxJEKbipDFFHEBwPaUAIN87AbeoMTv46XmczlZ5keid-227ZbN28lET-5hBf1uXsQ82kdr1VimnxvXCf9poUXZGYHg3TKUvwrCRVXEMoS2Rrx7d7QhM8crVaMLC2LmFDFebA_3PKoqYhvld6uYLRtECF6AgZq5Bl6ZbVwSk1KtjPwGixZXDUs459J2HZkJsCRSelybKKikQvIRL07eC_YDL6HwFFiHHmA0Zo_SIPUJCIEAuHmtSlqsdnb5ZWfFkr1aXZRCeewp_3L35hY%3D)** Thank you so much for your support. – Padora Finance Team [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=e85bf5493e4b4b1a94e853e66be39adf&_e=IMyKArseshvkOPwT9Y8S3dzTmucaSfS8XoEvpgVURpvZNAu4g3ct7JsoSR7BQF8t4tz8XsRAY4ImOKqbRLc1ntROp7oiIYJIbSLRXaS8D-StCDuNjQc8L0V14cYgan46dDq_FSDSMEjC23pi_2xSGYbEcWMxJEKbipDFFHEBwPaUAIN87AbeoMTv46XmczlZ5keid-227ZbN28lET-5hBf1uXsQ82kdr1VimnxvXCf9poUXZGYHg3TKUvwrCRVXEFgqnqcI8XxNFZljoHa4L7DiFsx7vX22bInCSsZ1Uzr-bzBtifXuNzofEcs9zu7AvmRPUdNYbOSA4SaeNtZd-MXbvi_G3Kb_mZm6htt_etcarENJFzMhfKKp0TFMpwd_olKIPaCwxOinKl7NblB-zXxc4KkocRe2BqudYdkrGEAY%3D) Good afternoon, friend, I don’t need to re-hash for you just how important it is for our team to reach our $5,000 FEC fundraising goal. I know our team has reached out a few times and I’m sure ours isn’t the only campaign flooding your inbox. **But I hope you’ll take a moment to let me explain why it is so important.** Our team has set an incredibly ambitious fundraising push for this quarter. This is our chance to get ahead of the game because we already know that 2024 will be expensive considering there will be a presidential election to work around. **If you help us get over the hump now, we will be in a strong position heading into the end of the year.** **[So can you take a moment to chip in what you can to my campaign to help us hit this critical goal?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=e85bf5493e4b4b1a94e853e66be39adf&_e=IMyKArseshvkOPwT9Y8S3dzTmucaSfS8XoEvpgVURpvZNAu4g3ct7JsoSR7BQF8t4tz8XsRAY4ImOKqbRLc1ntROp7oiIYJIbSLRXaS8D-StCDuNjQc8L0V14cYgan46dDq_FSDSMEjC23pi_2xSGYbEcWMxJEKbipDFFHEBwPaUAIN87AbeoMTv46XmczlZ5keid-227ZbN28lET-5hBf1uXsQ82kdr1VimnxvXCf9poUXZGYHg3TKUvwrCRVXERaIP8V9XrlekmlEqGxzzP6wxvH5apOwEwzqYOzQP6Qy9d2MMZ1vEAKQ__2b0xRaFqhSFIHWmlR6qyGCmth4ZT4L6J5Kp157rnZQFrqGQfJ1joCivMVV2mEQP720MrPGDs5taYMLhwdBT8xMXupdhDlKEU9CUTWoxWAiei1RPJMc%3D)** You’ve proven time and again that I can count on this grassroots team, and I’m so thankful for all you do. **[If you can, please help us exceed our $5,000 goal before the FEC deadline tonight by chipping in right away!](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=e85bf5493e4b4b1a94e853e66be39adf&_e=IMyKArseshvkOPwT9Y8S3dzTmucaSfS8XoEvpgVURpvZNAu4g3ct7JsoSR7BQF8t4tz8XsRAY4ImOKqbRLc1ntROp7oiIYJIbSLRXaS8D-StCDuNjQc8L0V14cYgan46dDq_FSDSMEjC23pi_2xSGYbEcWMxJEKbipDFFHEBwPaUAIN87AbeoMTv46XmczlZ5keid-227ZbN28lET-5hBf1uXsQ82kdr1VimnxvXCf9poUXZGYHg3TKUvwrCRVXECc3VU3HhnP-blKhO7UPsE-FiSNjqAE0nNfenSFj8LE8zDJbB3sXmk0fSgHfJjz91WzXX8pX9Jwy2HzDYg6SWDzDElsWc8FQRWRUoNlp97gtmMy6BpXnHrmI5CQg7NtYUhV4YwLfioSIy5RmUqnTozkzhgdXbeA4RK1WWDPrWETE%3D)** Thanks for being on my team, John **My story is not unique.** I was born and raised in Pennsylvania in rural, blue-collar, and old coal mining communities. I'm a proud husband and father to three amazing children. I witnessed firsthand how both major political parties have neglected rural communities and left behind working families. I'm running to build a movement and a government that works for working families. [**Join me.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=e85bf5493e4b4b1a94e853e66be39adf&_e=IMyKArseshvkOPwT9Y8S3Tt0FbnsC0zYxqWmQhhjTH2owaFEKu14wbZCF57Rgs7xMhZVO1DsfmXZGvJ-_wu-oWnTImWURFeZF3o3qgpkJAwNH3AFklFZZcmvulfaZt0ZJr0PP3IXSWrAGqry9e93ZiR2xJziN6uuaSkh22FKpqdLJXbwxciPJ7iJE4_IS1FsCgO7nHXtU6mBhmWTCOkYzA%3D%3D) [DONATE MONTHLY](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=e85bf5493e4b4b1a94e853e66be39adf&_e=IMyKArseshvkOPwT9Y8S3dzTmucaSfS8XoEvpgVURpvZNAu4g3ct7JsoSR7BQF8t4tz8XsRAY4ImOKqbRLc1ntROp7oiIYJIbSLRXaS8D-StCDuNjQc8L0V14cYgan46dDq_FSDSMEjC23pi_2xSGYbEcWMxJEKbipDFFHEBwPaUAIN87AbeoMTv46XmczlZ5keid-227ZbN28lET-5hBf1uXsQ82kdr1VimnxvXCf_-asuHks3vJ9N7TTIv9tMKhL9DsJAyL7CHF4bYvXKv0i_EopjaHdAJyRxJEBU7i1foXP558jV7HRSvfJNj82p_w5-sfMfKms1j6L1QvCwcY9P7lL_hQIzxriLnILRlCBLri3_H9cLZUt39E_1gqV1oSBN-bPom0o0ou_5ZYoD-i_7W8ZI1ypu-do8TCcItqXXNT8OHO-yKXkrDnuyP24pK) Paid for by Padora for Colorado

name: Team Kennedy
subject: NOW is the time, just a few hours to go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
The clock is quickly winding down on Q3 and the FEC deadline

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=countdown_to_q3_deadline_unope&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, Our campaign is gaining momentum. People across America are looking to RFK, Jr. as a new Hope, a courageous leader, a man who will defend our economic interests because he cannot be bought. This is why we rely on YOU to help fund the Campaign. The clock is quickly winding down on **Q3 and the FEC deadline at Midnight Tonight**. **If you haven’t already donated, this is our final appeal before reporting our fundraising numbers.** [**You can help us reach our End-of-Quarter fundraising goal by Midnight Tonight**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate_momentum?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=countdown_to_q3_deadline_unope&n=2). We’re so appreciative of the incredible support so far. But the work has really just begun and the funds we raise are a show of the strength of this movement. Folks, you know that we’re headed into a nail-biter of an election year, and Arizona has been proclaimed one of the most contentious battleground states to watch. We’ve got to show how strong support is for Democratic candidates in Arizona and stand up to the GOP.

name: Lucas
subject: Down to the wire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I just checked ActBlue. Here’s where we’re at:
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas. I’ve been on the road most of the day, but I just checked ActBlue and wanted to reach out one last time before our deadline tonight.
**As of right now, we’re only a few dozen donations away from hitting our end-of-quarter goal.**
I’m so grateful that I’ve always been able to count on supporters like you in times like these. But we’re getting down to the wire and most people probably aren’t checking their email on a Saturday night, so I’m counting on you, Peter:
**[Can you rush your first donation of $10 or anything at all to my campaign right now? Hitting this goal means we’ll have the resources to keep reaching voters with our message and standing up to the GOP insiders doing everything in their power to tear down what we’re building together.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37579?refcode=em20230930-3884&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3884%2E614464%2Eg4Mmo-)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37580?refcode=em20230930-3884&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=3884%2E614464%2Eg4Mmo-) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37580?refcode=em20230930-3884&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=3884%2E614464%2Eg4Mmo-) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37580?refcode=em20230930-3884&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=3884%2E614464%2Eg4Mmo-) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37580?refcode=em20230930-3884&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=3884%2E614464%2Eg4Mmo-) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37580?refcode=em20230930-3884&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=3884%2E614464%2Eg4Mmo-) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37580?refcode=em20230930-3884&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=3884%2E614464%2Eg4Mmo-) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/37579?refcode=em20230930-3884&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3884%2E614464%2Eg4Mmo-)
---
Whether you donate $10, $100, or even just $1 — your contribution will help us keep building a historic grassroots movement that can defeat Josh Hawley and finally take back Missouri’s Senate seat for working people across our state.
I’ll never take your support for granted, Peter.
Thanks for everything. Now let’s hit this goal!
— Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230930-3884-footer&t=9&refcode2=3884_614464_g4Mmo-&akid=3884%2E614464%2Eg4Mmo-)**

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=3884%2E614464%2Eg4Mmo-). We’ll make this quick. With all of our last-minute asks, we’re only $741 from hitting our end-of-quarter goal. But now, we’ve got less than an hour left to push this thing over the finish line.

So, let us ask one final time: will YOU help us hit our goal and fully fund our rural races during this essential final month of campaigning? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urdemail]

United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. body:

Peter, Look around. **Millions of Illegals are _waltzing across our border_ while the door is held open for them. ** **Our _cities are collapsing_ under the weight and swarming with crime. ** **Mothers are _losing their children_ to fentanyl poisoning. ** **Democrat Governors are finally admitting this is a crisis and _calling on the National Guard_. ** **Children are being told to memorize _sexually-explicit garbage_ in schools. ** **_Biden is saluting a Pride flag_ on the White House Lawn. ** **The lie that men can get pregnant is being _shoved down the throats of kids_. ** **Women and girls --_my daughters_ --are _losing the chance to compete_ in sports fairly. ** **_Parents are losing their rights_ to raise their kids as they see fit and choose what school is best for them. ** **Families are struggling to put food on the table because _Biden has prioritized the benefit of the elite class_ and bent the knee to the woke mob by embracing environmental, social governance mandates over the DIRE needs of average Americans. ** Why am I running for President, Peter? **This is why.** How could the radical Left, the DC swamp establishment, and the legacy media ever expect me to back down? When they're reigning down irrecoverable harm across the country because they're not willing to do what it takes to stand up for our values and fight for our way of life? **These are my kids...**

On Day One in office as President of the United States, I will be ushering in a RECKONING to Washington, D.C. We have let them cause our nation to spiral for far too long. The Left took every advantage of a weak executive in office and unleashed a radical social agenda to explode across our nation because of it. Not anymore. We do not have to accept the decline when success IS attainable. We just have to **[fight for it](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a5306be5b1b24cca8cc5a636e280341a&_e=uc00QTRtZWQw9sbsfAHoBXfuBSPAvy5yoej2rzNaZP471fEOQbNR7ZNsGUiwieZwa551XOweN2_WUhlXsgTu5hb5gJPLSQQERsseJTlCMtat-wSQrQwR7irXtZxQ6Tg1kmc909DeNzCKS8lZkoH6h1ZwpEj2tBoGa4f6PJFa5C4kR4GHoVgjIi1q1jYzCMG-h5fVIMFxdpNRS0dKVl4D1tJlNRm2wWRuVOu79JTaWdOwbeGoU6GPPleDpPKqdhCjsea1mM2xjNT8R97gkUbR5H8Z4ECI2LaSEU6LJ3SFR8QTbe-uoRUU35G26spUMbRc9LpmQsNbh1XVKJpJnC58eYpbK3AUv4nRCB97l5syXBR3wzgwSBoYabEZfivyIBT-UdhDCposTgtw9uw6DF32nC-ZW66y60wvUwjzPms4MPjYJ9N4yP-AKb-DRkglOi7o)**. Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a5306be5b1b24cca8cc5a636e280341a&_e=uc00QTRtZWQw9sbsfAHoBXfuBSPAvy5yoej2rzNaZP471fEOQbNR7ZNsGUiwieZwa551XOweN2_WUhlXsgTu5hb5gJPLSQQERsseJTlCMtat-wSQrQwR7irXtZxQ6Tg1kmc909DeNzCKS8lZkoH6h1ZwpEj2tBoGa4f6PJFa5C4kR4GHoVgjIi1q1jYzCMG-h5fVIMFxdpNRS0dKVl4D1tJlNRm2wWRuVOu79JTaWdOwbeGoU6GPPleDpPKqdhCjsea1mM2xjNT8R97gkUbR5OPNYMki1Tnwy_gG3TOeD9vIpeIBqs7GUg8G-trjqL-mPlvOcsyiwo0bbRDSWC-uSeZi2N9UJMC01MrpdFu7XGIdP08DqZwtaNnSmeUJwwVL0UbIlrrSirSJJwpkL6ugEOVPFdV_MQ0Z8SQJ9EZbnKUaJVaEvdSpWSSxq7Iz4nEY)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|

Millions of Illegals are waltzing across our border while the door is held open for them. Our cities are collapsing under the weight and swarming with crime. Mothers are losing their children to fentanyl poisoning. Democrat Governors are finally admitting this is a crisis and calling on the National Guard. Children are being told to memorize sexually-explicit garbage in schools. Biden is saluting a Pride flag on the White House Lawn. The lie that men can get pregnant is being shoved down the throats of kids. Women and girls --my daughters --are losing the chance to compete in sports fairly. Parents are losing their rights to raise their kids as they see fit and choose what school is best for them. Families are struggling to put food on the table because Biden has prioritized the benefit of the elite class and bent the knee to the woke mob by embracing environmental, social governance mandates over the DIRE needs of average Americans.
