subject: NEW Solar-Powered "King of Coolers" Never Needs Ice!
body:
This revolutionary fridge on wheels keeps your food and drinks ice cold.

**NEW Solar-Powered
"King of Coolers"
Never Needs Ice!** [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrbj8lb63adc1ccvs7l7kg7ib6lbpq2v3v7thmog_rp22sh2s8i66p73chgmeoj6c1h2bs) **No More Soggy Food!** This revolutionary fridge on wheels keeps your food and drinks ice cold... **But it NEVER needs ice!** It may look like an ordinary cooler, but you've never seen anything like this... Instead of ice, it uses advanced technology to keep all your important food and drinks ice cold. So you'll never have to stop for ice every couple of hours... And you'll never have to dip your hands into soggy food or gross puddles of water. And since you'll never need ice, you'll have all that precious cooler space available for MORE of your favorite food and drinks. **And it's super flexible.** This revolutionary Solar Go-Fridge is **not JUST a cooler - it's a refrigerator, freezer, and deep freezer** all in one! It can work as a fridge for hot dogs and drinks, or as a freezer for ice cream, popsicles and frozen meats... And it can even go down to subzero temperatures! **The Solar Go-Fridge
Charges For FREE With
The Power of the Sun!** Unlike other run-of-the-mill coolers, your Solar Go-Fridge... **Charges for FREE in the Sun!** Yes, you can recharge your Solar Go-Fridge using the FREE power of the sun. After all, we couldn’t call it a "Solar" Go-Fridge if it wasn't solar powered... And that's why... **You get a FREE 40-Watt Solar Panel with your Solar Go-Fridge.** [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo0goseofpb8rn4kvrns5t4uq6qejf6t4fkjpq28_rp22sh2s8i66p73chgmeoj6c1h2bs) You can use your solar panel to power your Solar Go-Fridge on the go... So you can take it to campsites, sporting events, RV trips, tailgates, backyard BBQs, pool parties and so much more... Or use it to power your critical devices. It's like a mini power cell in its own right. It works with phones, tablets and your other critical electronic devices. Plus, if a tree falls on some power lines and cuts the power to your neighborhood, you don't have to worry about the food in your fridge spoiling. **Look What You Can Fit
In Your Solar Go-Fridge** Your Solar Go-Fridge can take any kind of frozen supplies with you. And when we say _any kind of supplies_ , we mean it. It has a small footprint, but has spacious capacity. **You get 42 quarts of space** for your critical items - that's like 46 cans or bottles of water. And no bulky ice bags! [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvroufigh3evalmbfk50a1m69ogeski383f5vg50_rp22sh2s8i66p73chgmeoj6c1h2bs) Its compact size and all-terrain wheels make it easy to throw in the trunk. Or to bring with you to tailgates. It's truly small, but mighty. Drinks, hot dogs, medicine and more. It can all fit in your Solar Go-Fridge. **[Limited Time] Get
Exclusive Introductory
Pricing, Plus 11 Bonus
Gifts Worth $388 And
FREE Shipping!** Order now to take advantage of our special introductory pricing, 11 free bonus gifts worth $388, and free shipping. Your exclusive 11 FREE Bonus Gifts package includes:
* **FREE** 40-Watt Solar Panel
* **FREE** 72-Hour Survival Food Kit
* **FREE** Survival Coffee
* **FREE** Survival Cocoa
* **FREE** StarFire Camp Stove
* **FREE** Freedom Flame
* **FREE** Multi-Use Flashlight
* **FREE** Solar Power Digital Report
* **FREE** $25 Certificate
* **FREE** Shipping & Handling
* **FREE** VIP Phone Line

Plus there's an easy payment plan available with no credit check... [**Order Now To Lock In Your
Low Pricing, FREE Bonus
Gifts and FREE Shipping!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkhme0hgtk4lape461n0ste8cj382s4tjphe6tgg_rp22sh2s8i66p73chgmeoj6c1h2bs) [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zak4tbci6990hult4rd28qlkeaidto80ev4irmog_rp22sh2s8i66p73chgmeoj6c1h2bs) **But Hurry... Last Time
The Solar Go-Fridge
SOLD OUT In 24 Hours** **There is one catch:** We can't reserve any Solar Go-Fridges or give out any IOUs. You'll need to ACT FAST... Because the last version of the Solar Go-Fridge sold out in 24 hours after only a couple of text messages... And that version couldn't do half the things this NEW model can. So when people find out about this space-age ice chest, there could be a mad rush. **So don't wait...** If you miss out on this special Introductory Pricing, there's nothing we can do. There's only one way to guarantee your Introductory Pricing, FREE gifts and FREE shipping... And that's by clicking the link below to grab your Solar Go-Fridge while they're in stock and ready to ship: [**Order Now To Lock In Your
Low Pricing, FREE Bonus
Gifts and FREE Shipping!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoj722a72lsd751e7tts4ij580j1i95r9hhpbhro_rp22sh2s8i66p73chgmeoj6c1h2bs) So make sure to grab yours now. **I know you'll love it!** Stay safe and have fun out there,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Customers Are
Raving About Their
Solar Go-Fridge** **Kristen G.**
"It was super fun to use. We were gone for four nights, and didn't have to get ice at all. Not having to deal with ice the whole time was amazing. I was worried that it wasn't big enough. But it held absolutely everything I was planning to take because I didn't have to put any ice in there. It didn't have to be as big as my regular cooler." **Randy M.**
"You cannot beat it. It is awesome. No running around, looking for drinks. No more opening up your drink and setting it on the tractor and coming back 20 minutes later and it's warm. Everything's cold. Everything's cold all the time. Just a wonderful, wonderful unit. I am a Type 1 diabetic. It's been keeping my insulin cold to the point where I don't worry about my insulin. I know it's good." **Damon H.**
"We all have lots of coolers. But this is a cooler extraordinaire. Not only is it a cooler, it's a fully-functioning refrigerator. It's great for me being a fisherman and an outdoor guy. I can put a bunch of fish in here and set it at freezing temperatures. And when I get home, my fish will stay frozen and I don't need any ice. It's a great tool. It's absolutely a must for campers and fisherman. It looks like a cooler, but it's actually a refrigerator which makes it a really special thing." **Lisa W.**
"You don't have to stop and get ice anymore. That was one thing I hated to do early in the morning when we had to leave to go out of town to play in a baseball tournament. name: American Action News
subject: Citizenship requires vigilance
body:
Are you proud to be an American citizen?

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1lks4qbcl6g2b7ik23cuhgov0f4nggjflgh1uo8_rp22sh2s8i66p73chgmeoj6c1h2bs)
---
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| |
Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you’re like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can’t say the same thing—in fact, most people in the world can’t say the same thing even today. You don’t have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It’s one of our nation’s great achievements. But there’s a catch—citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That’s why today I hope you’ll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znlfeba85log97k7b2irntdm0imchlq8sl2n3e6g_rp22sh2s8i66p73chgmeoj6c1h2bs)**_
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7974ut2ddkomcsb6vg8nk6hv5i7s0r0sk5q3tlo_rp22sh2s8i66p73chgmeoj6c1h2bs)
---
| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal** of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses—free of charge. We already reach millions—we must reach hundreds of thousands more.
* **The second vital goal** is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal** is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K–12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY—to remain proudly independent. This means that _your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we’ll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zor1mtmn81l8p2fvd2ucmfrs51jmqpnnm470u6lg_rp22sh2s8i66p73chgmeoj6c1h2bs)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you’ll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson’s book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America._ Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He’s also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, “In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure.”** Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgtlrojfhrltq3juf79d56q2r2gpnr95vqbveu4o_rp22sh2s8i66p73chgmeoj6c1h2bs)**
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfj8df8s075mb8gu2tr9481q2vlomlunu9rm45og_rp22sh2s8i66p73chgmeoj6c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34ctj6cp33c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5evb6ir42q8l7nhb67fb1g5ekdamngs40gkgleo_rp22sh2s8i66p73chgmeoj6c1h2bs)_

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdpnf66n6s5hlfk9ji1iptd57j68ke3h95rk6beg_rp22sh2s8i66p73chim0o72c1h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zudupdhslmogmnjmjonbcpnkhlt2cug21m0b0tko_rp22sh2s8i66p73chim0o72c1h2bs).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state—that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt5ctdelc55ddhq919uu38joeapbm3m1l2o5q0hg_rp22sh2s8i66p73chim0o72c1h2bs) [NO](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6501re664oaidip946llb1d85ap7rns9nbbma20_rp22sh2s8i66p73chim0o72c1h2bs) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqmlvdb6rmucb5j4gk90sa9ie50b2o3bgmvdgtm0_rp22sh2s8i66p73chim0o72c1h2bs)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Why America Matters
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| |
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger.-Pe89A4iVA)| |
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country.[](http://trk.libertyledger._VFssDjAo0u5MHsCPjQ)
__But, in order to keep this curriculum**free of charge** , I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](http://trk.libertyledger._smAR5WiyRWA). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](http://trk.libertyledger._0byLQ)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|

| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources. Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, Why America Matters , and help us reach more children with the truth. Sincerely, Dr. Ben Carson Founder and Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About The Coming Crisis** **This might be your only warning...** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **" Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zds5719c2k3kdk8fufmdlsq1fau700rs5u6psk50_rp22sh2s8i66p73chim2ob1c9h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z07n3h3ei0v4boh0j761h76lqunhn5p6lli4gsco_rp22sh2s8i66p73chim2ob1c9h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.
---

|
My very capable and also "no nonsense" fellow veteran brother, Louisa County Commonwealth Attorney Rusty McGuire, is one of the hardest working and genuine people I know. It is a huge honor to be on the ballot with him this year. Recently he made the news for successfully prosecuting a murder case others thought was unsolvable.

Rusty's quote:

"Twenty years ago, she would have gotten away with murder," Louisa Commonwealth Attorney Rusty McGuire told Law&Crime in a phone interview Friday. "The victim may have fit the stereotype in the sense that he had never had much income, just did tree work and kind of looked a bit rough, and she's just this little old lady who said he attacked her, choked her, and she had no choice but to shoot him."

[Click here for the story](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IyVGF8XgzkBqwHrQkmFB-Cz8q3NcSXiSeYxNAUWpZCt4dlwqP79XWdm1z6KhRBKtQ23K_pq8OzQ9l6UZB2fmKZkNPShbWYLaij8Nsf7Pf6cgYdGAA8-MsOSNFit9_AMVeRpqgUJptrLg-JQiZTDgtfjJVrpPy6kROQIYBpZuic5srJiVIeIu4MAbEwXINczgWgHGdvUMjwz-DiwDJXzN75Uo4MwYE7r9-xJBqxd54e5a6l1yKecuOQCLoENrB0luiU3-34zxAWqv6-LB-S1JFg52sPjwEeh1YdTB9RTd98Uk2jQQmqUPDD_PgT_wSRhgTPwpI_XGitU=&c=_pfx2shEMH37MdywmWroJWGDt1-BA5avMsvzUtdsTNoRWYz8D0d3jg==&ch=V18ENuv7zr0jVYIF9nn1Pod2axZEl1ThShobZxyj4XzwE8GvvTtKPA==)

| Goochland
---

|
---
| I stopped by the Goochland GOP tent and the Republican Goochland Tea Party tent this week. Here is a lesson/ example why it recommended legislators stay out of local elections:
2 Independents: We all know choice is the American way. I love you regardless of who you support, but I do not love bullying tactics. We all know politics is messy. In case you didn't know, there are two candidates running for Goochland Commonwealth Attorney. Upfront, I respect whatever choice you make and I have friends on both sides. Emotions are high and I've tried staying out of this thing, but it is getting ridiculous. These two candidates include the Republican incumbent Mike Caudill, now running as an independent, who is running against John Lumpkins, also running as an independent. It is our prerogative to endorse whoever we want, but so far I have not endorsed either candidate. That said, the same team of people running one campaign are the same team of people who ran my opponents campaign at the convention and the same people who thought it was a good idea to tell everyone I was a liberal democrat. Obviously people are smart and it didn't work, because we had a record win with 63% of the vote in a four way race on the first ballot. Unfortunately, these folks will say or do anything to get your vote because they are smarter than you. Go figure, they are now calling the current Republican incumbent commonwealth attorney a democrat, they are also saying he will defund the police, and they have called me on the phone and threatened to remove my signs because I told them I'm staying out of it and I said I will not endorse their candidate. How crazy can you get? By the way, I said no problem and we put those signs in another place. And on top of all of that they have now resorted to calling me names, I guess to get me to do what they want? Are we back in high school? Isn't this the behavior we see every day all over the media from Democrats? If you are sick and tired of being sick and tired, let them know. If you have a better candidate just run on policy and character not intimidation. This behavior is childish and more than embarrassing. I have no idea who will win this race, but I've heard it said how you campaign is how you will govern.

Please spread the word. | McGuire Brothers Share Ballot/ Who's On Your Ballot? | | | | ---|--- | My very capable and also "no nonsense" fellow veteran brother, Louisa County Commonwealth Attorney Rusty McGuire, is one of the hardest working and genuine people I know. It is a huge honor to be on the ballot with him this year. Recently he made the news for successfully prosecuting a murder case others thought was unsolvable. Rusty's quote: "Twenty years ago, she would have gotten away with murder," Louisa Commonwealth Attorney Rusty McGuire told Law&Crime in a phone interview Friday. "The victim may have fit the stereotype in the sense that he had never had much income, just did tree work and kind of looked a bit rough, and she's just this little old lady who said he attacked her, choked her, and she had no choice but to shoot him." == Go to == and enter your address to find out who's on your ballot, where to vote, and more. | Chris Lacivita | | You can never have enough Marines around. It is good to be working with the very capable and fellow veteran Chris Lacivita again. He is the senior advisor to the Trump campaign. God willing, we will win in November, swear in in January, and then continue doing the people's work in a Senate office when I become the first State Senator in history to represent Goochland County who actually lives in Goochland County. Thanks to you, we won Goochland County by a huge margin at the May 6 Convention! | Rally Virginia | | Rooz Dadabhoy and Rally Virginia are working hard to help qualified Republicans win in November. These folks worked tirelessly to help elect Governor Glenn Youngkin, Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, and Attorney General Jason Miyares. We are now all working hard to get a majority in the State Senate and the House of Delegates. It is very important we get Senator Siobhan Dunavant re-elected, and we help elect David Owen and Riley Shaia to the House of Delegates. As Governor Glenn Youngkin says, we "must lock arms" and win in November. I love you regardless of who you support, but I do not love bullying tactics. We all know politics is messy. In case you didn't know, there are two candidates running for Goochland Commonwealth Attorney. Upfront, I respect whatever choice you make and I have friends on both sides. Emotions are high and I've tried staying out of this thing, but it is getting ridiculous. These two candidates include the Republican incumbent Mike Caudill, now running as an independent, who is running against John Lumpkins, also running as an independent. It is our prerogative to endorse whoever we want, but so far I have not endorsed either candidate. That said, the same team of people running one campaign are the same team of people who ran my opponents campaign at the convention and the same people who thought it was a good idea to tell everyone I was a liberal democrat. Obviously people are smart and it didn't work, because we had a record win with 63% of the vote in a four way race on the first ballot. Unfortunately, these folks will say or do anything to get your vote because they are smarter than you. Go figure, they are now calling the current Republican incumbent commonwealth attorney a democrat, they are also saying he will defund the police, and they have called me on the phone and threatened to remove my signs because I told them I'm staying out of it and I said I will not endorse their candidate. How crazy can you get? By the way, I said no problem and we put those signs in another place. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want to know your thoughts
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c678494%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9zIDK1iQLX3ciaZMR%2fDdqw&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c678405%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5pOvWVmlMZMXgBOdWIHDNQ&sysid=1) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c678406%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f4HlefB7R9hQpgAirWgjNw&sysid=1)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c678407%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C1lbHXk%2fa6a9s8AIlRvjCQ&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|

name: Your America
subject: Unlocking the Untold Traits of the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24553%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CkqJ05Xvt0xbkqL5auGutg&sysid=1)
---
---
| | Dear Friend, [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24554%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=STn5TWTcqA4jpoesDAncNA&sysid=1)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24565%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aQ66HIvYybI4PiX1CIlPjA&sysid=1)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24565%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aQ66HIvYybI4PiX1CIlPjA&sysid=1)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Read/Act News
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.-XAQ8bc2_Ha_Qghzb9Q)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly-plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **"Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.**** ****You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews._C4-TloePmHO_LlGmDsmOQ)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://trk.readactnews.)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. ArnnPresident, Hillsdale CollegePursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: NEW Solar-Powered "King of Coolers" Never Needs Ice!
body:
This revolutionary fridge on wheels keeps your food and drinks ice cold.

**NEW Solar-Powered
"King of Coolers"
Never Needs Ice!** [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24562%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hN5yMJqX7egJMREGvw%2bRBA&sysid=1) **No More Soggy Food!** This revolutionary fridge on wheels keeps your food and drinks ice cold... **But it NEVER needs ice!** It may look like an ordinary cooler, but you've never seen anything like this... Instead of ice, it uses advanced technology to keep all your important food and drinks ice cold. So you'll never have to stop for ice every couple of hours... And you'll never have to dip your hands into soggy food or gross puddles of water. And since you'll never need ice, you'll have all that precious cooler space available for MORE of your favorite food and drinks. **And it's super flexible.** This revolutionary Solar Go-Fridge is **not JUST a cooler - it's a refrigerator, freezer, and deep freezer** all in one! It can work as a fridge for hot dogs and drinks, or as a freezer for ice cream, popsicles and frozen meats... And it can even go down to subzero temperatures! **The Solar Go-Fridge
Charges For FREE With
The Power of the Sun!** Unlike other run-of-the-mill coolers, your Solar Go-Fridge... **Charges for FREE in the Sun!** Yes, you can recharge your Solar Go-Fridge using the FREE power of the sun. After all, we couldn’t call it a "Solar" Go-Fridge if it wasn't solar powered... And that's why... **You get a FREE 40-Watt Solar Panel with your Solar Go-Fridge.** [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24563%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Vo7V0wou3WA%2bXwE9rXisNA&sysid=1) You can use your solar panel to power your Solar Go-Fridge on the go... So you can take it to campsites, sporting events, RV trips, tailgates, backyard BBQs, pool parties and so much more... Or use it to power your critical devices. It's like a mini power cell in its own right. It works with phones, tablets and your other critical electronic devices. Plus, if a tree falls on some power lines and cuts the power to your neighborhood, you don't have to worry about the food in your fridge spoiling. **Look What You Can Fit
In Your Solar Go-Fridge** Your Solar Go-Fridge can take any kind of frozen supplies with you. And when we say _any kind of supplies_ , we mean it. It has a small footprint, but has spacious capacity. **You get 42 quarts of space** for your critical items - that's like 46 cans or bottles of water. And no bulky ice bags! [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24564%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mCLIZZXUMXC7YCwhStXlAA&sysid=1) Its compact size and all-terrain wheels make it easy to throw in the trunk. Or to bring with you to tailgates. It's truly small, but mighty. Drinks, hot dogs, medicine and more. It can all fit in your Solar Go-Fridge. **[Limited Time] Get

"It was super fun to use. We were gone for four nights, and didn't have to get ice at all. Not having to deal with ice the whole time was amazing. I was worried that it wasn't big enough. But it held absolutely everything I was planning to take because I didn't have to put any ice in there. It didn't have to be as big as my regular cooler." **Randy M.**
"You cannot beat it. It is awesome. No running around, looking for drinks. No more opening up your drink and setting it on the tractor and coming back 20 minutes later and it's warm. Everything's cold. Everything's cold all the time. Just a wonderful, wonderful unit. I am a Type 1 diabetic. It's been keeping my insulin cold to the point where I don't worry about my insulin. I know it's good." **Damon H.**
"We all have lots of coolers. But this is a cooler extraordinaire. Not only is it a cooler, it's a fully-functioning refrigerator. It's great for me being a fisherman and an outdoor guy. I can put a bunch of fish in here and set it at freezing temperatures. And when I get home, my fish will stay frozen and I don't need any ice. It's a great tool. It's absolutely a must for campers and fisherman. It looks like a cooler, but it's actually a refrigerator which makes it a really special thing." **Lisa W.**
"You don't have to stop and get ice anymore. That was one thing I hated to do early in the morning when we had to leave to go out of town to play in a baseball tournament. We had to leave at 5 or 6 or sometimes 4:30 in the morning and had to stop to get ice for our cooler. So this is nice because you just have to set it on refrigerator mode and you get your cold drinks or whatever you put in your cooler. People are already taking pictures with it, trying to find out more information so they could get their own." **Lou H.**
"Please get one or two of them like I did. They will come in handy next time you have a power failure or going on a trip. I use mine whenever we travel or recently when we had a power failure a few weeks ago. You won't be sorry." [**Order Now To Lock In Your

This revolutionary fridge on wheels keeps your food and drinks ice cold... But it NEVER needs ice! It may look like an ordinary cooler, but you've never seen anything like this... Instead of ice, it uses advanced technology to keep all your important food and drinks ice cold. So you'll never have to stop for ice every couple of hours... And you'll never have to dip your hands into soggy food or gross puddles of water. And since you'll never need ice, you'll have all that precious cooler space available for MORE of your favorite food and drinks. And it's super flexible. This revolutionary Solar Go-Fridge is not JUST a cooler - it's a refrigerator, freezer, and deep freezer all in one! It can work as a fridge for hot dogs and drinks, or as a freezer for ice cream, popsicles and frozen meats... And it can even go down to subzero temperatures! The Solar Go-Fridge Charges For FREE With The Power of the Sun! Unlike other run-of-the-mill coolers, your Solar Go-Fridge... Charges for FREE in the Sun! Yes, you can recharge your Solar Go-Fridge using the FREE power of the sun. After all, we couldn’t call it a "Solar" Go-Fridge if it wasn't solar powered... And that's why... You get a FREE 40-Watt Solar Panel with your Solar Go-Fridge. You can use your solar panel to power your Solar Go-Fridge on the go... It's like a mini power cell in its own right. It works with phones, tablets and your other critical electronic devices. Plus, if a tree falls on some power lines and cuts the power to your neighborhood, you don't have to worry about the food in your fridge spoiling. name: Secure & Prosper
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjc0LTJmOWY3ZTcxYzQzNDRhZTRiY2Q4NjQzNDMxNTkxMjZmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvdGFrZS10aGUtbmF0aW9uYWwtc3VydmV5LW9uLXNvY2lhbGlzbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zb2NpYWxpc21zdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPNDMyMjkmc2M9MDAwODFOMDI0MklFV0RPREVFUSJ9/9QzI4QhexVeJ9rYitCxZHQ)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ -Hillsdale College's digest of liberty-author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'-a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for-and opposition to-socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjc0LTJmOWY3ZTcxYzQzNDRhZTRiY2Q4NjQzNDMxNTkxMjZmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvdGFrZS10aGUtbmF0aW9uYWwtc3VydmV5LW9uLXNvY2lhbGlzbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zb2NpYWxpc21zdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPNDMyMjkmc2M9MDAwODFOMDI0MklFV0RPREVFUSJ9/z3k657K4dlieTa6iBRZ2CA)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"-including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory-which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race-are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjc0LTJmOWY3ZTcxYzQzNDRhZTRiY2Q4NjQzNDMxNTkxMjZmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvdGFrZS10aGUtbmF0aW9uYWwtc3VydmV5LW9uLXNvY2lhbGlzbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zb2NpYWxpc21zdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPNDMyMjkmc2M9MDAwODFOMDI0MklFV0RPREVFUSJ9/83bdVFkLcxsjLazXy9WEPw)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember-**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. ArnnPresident, Hillsdale CollegePursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjc0LTJmOWY3ZTcxYzQzNDRhZTRiY2Q4NjQzNDMxNTkxMjZmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/Ey-3cdeOmgs6FIUAU3UGUg) to unsubscribe.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join Me in Standing Up for Women’s Sports and American Values
body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0qr70ooidr0k4bnoodjk8189s5dtncuodmqh0l0_rp22sh2s8i66p73chhm8or6cdh2bs)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmqpkehvak5db7reu4fv8t1nl4ag2tp1m8ig70e8_rp22sh2s8i66p73chhm8or6cdh2bs)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhbj6r99pc24vnhtf7ebm2g688d5emfv1qtefpvo_rp22sh2s8i66p73chhm8or6cdh2bs)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmjpkaeg1jca5qq56id7tmh4hdtjlop80nsv7nq8_rp22sh2s8i66p73chhm8or6cdh2bs)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

GOP Presidential
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through: Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths. A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country. A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action. Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America. Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come. Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States GOP Presidential 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Your America
subject: Citizenship requires vigilance
body:
Are you proud to be an American citizen?

| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24573%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XIw1L5V4hVpk8Ibx3oXCyg&sysid=1)
---
| |
Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you’re like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can’t say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can’t say the same thing even today. You don’t have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It’s one of our nation’s great achievements. But there’s a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That’s why today I hope you’ll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24574%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r%2bOwW2XDhVoYHXOBJzY6cw&sysid=1)**_
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24585%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S9Zc6w8yNGrkYLnfMbndcg&sysid=1)
---
| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal **of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses--free of charge. We already reach millions--we must reach hundreds of thousands more.
* **The second vital goal **is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal **is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that _ your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we’ll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24586%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0xLniD3IjCyMxC6UFxilxw&sysid=1)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you’ll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson’s book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America. _Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He’s also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, “In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure.” ** Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24587%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LKQ2GgBzHQn1R%2fP5GdeEhA&sysid=1)**
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c8341%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=DSzFKHVQCftWjtSnsHdvRQ&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24588%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KK2%2fkNkJk%2f6bGRcqVhE8MA&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24589%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yjtxO0ocd66B4tH8oikhNA&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c8341%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=DSzFKHVQCftWjtSnsHdvRQ&sysid=1)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b5be891d6c4449549ef19f1f4a433e2a&_e=BDB-Ixeu5qpws4yrBlbgKfyfalksn_ezB73UOE0U5OmQEgfTxvFFLi20dCyv_QjhonPTy4kT0JsX65sT6_oWGADjxO5g4jOBOuz7lbp9rdEKaa84DP3TDU9P1oEdzkpdZmL_bE0S3PF9CZ83ZEL6G4SH0VYpO8iu5Pc8ru45BOAoeeEWXaKdHUaeIdHV1EYAP4HhXvDNUmt6V5pmGX6aBTazQrA0cnI8gfiVo827KL2yeAIdlawSi_d0gYdRydK-g7qAfkVpJAtmBIhfZhGomInmxcbasPBm5AvS1Hbe2MZwQGzotDtl3YnF9fSQm0ZrkL-SJ4-zPJ4hwiDp8Wq2rh2CyKa5Iq3wjo9OzIMDe3LeqxM3C5cO3deI39yR95ih7s63F9qkqXdNfb83zD7IbR1Av5tfKnZ37ucXTTpU3gDd48M47hv2LR7CCXf_YRuo)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b5be891d6c4449549ef19f1f4a433e2a&_e=BDB-Ixeu5qpws4yrBlbgKfyfalksn_ezB73UOE0U5OmQEgfTxvFFLi20dCyv_QjhonPTy4kT0JsX65sT6_oWGADjxO5g4jOBOuz7lbp9rdEKaa84DP3TDU9P1oEdzkpdZmL_bE0S3PF9CZ83ZEL6G4SH0VYpO8iu5Pc8ru45BOAoeeEWXaKdHUaeIdHV1EYAP4HhXvDNUmt6V5pmGX6aBTazQrA0cnI8gfiVo827KL2yeAIdlawSi_d0gYdRydK-g7qAfkVpJAtmBIhfZhGomLSOFiphWSmQ0l7FIfo3jEyQUVV0TAAHpVzCvEP1Voxgk19Ltr3Ej1NrzWiVVTg3_MndRE68-b5qmgqlS1EDyLQvqc-XofglyYGWzh4-DfSci0horIb8_wcQEOM7Oe_HZm_lXzaZC07p7BrdiyxM_ZwmBo7POBgKR849YyANsS6N)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b5be891d6c4449549ef19f1f4a433e2a&_e=BDB-Ixeu5qpws4yrBlbgKfyfalksn_ezB73UOE0U5OmQEgfTxvFFLi20dCyv_QjhonPTy4kT0JsX65sT6_oWGADjxO5g4jOBOuz7lbp9rdEKaa84DP3TDU9P1oEdzkpdZmL_bE0S3PF9CZ83ZEL6G4SH0VYpO8iu5Pc8ru45BOAoeeEWXaKdHUaeIdHV1EYAP4HhXvDNUmt6V5pmGX6aBTazQrA0cnI8gfiVo827KL2yeAIdlawSi_d0gYdRydK-g7qAfkVpJAtmBIhfZhGomBN5hgXz4M4TFLOoKoFGA6RsLyuEHN4QszpCVeDpnZTPEKisYqY0CFJIDSEOKSjXUA_J3u_kSjdceknPch2qD0vjNQ32tygUuXhS_Wlu8OLiW8vsuZJ8TeZhe7l2lV0cyoNnNTy5t0ojyL7xRIPWcmE8F3EbgOJHL-FB0WaIG-h8)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b5be891d6c4449549ef19f1f4a433e2a&_e=BDB-Ixeu5qpws4yrBlbgKfyfalksn_ezB73UOE0U5OmQEgfTxvFFLi20dCyv_QjhonPTy4kT0JsX65sT6_oWGADjxO5g4jOBOuz7lbp9rdEKaa84DP3TDU9P1oEdzkpdZmL_bE0S3PF9CZ83ZEL6G4SH0VYpO8iu5Pc8ru45BOAoeeEWXaKdHUaeIdHV1EYAP4HhXvDNUmt6V5pmGX6aBTazQrA0cnI8gfiVo827KL2yeAIdlawSi_d0gYdRydK-g7qAfkVpJAtmBIhfZhGomHYPcf6-4jTJ9kbujAyip3oMWjlTWJEf-eOSvf0ljyGaHufKKfJCGJhRzkkGUs5Jgtt7n_u6n_8UJITp6YHRu4Y0V0PIzYM3c5rdjkqD6SwFFWtflCrQuWdqdRP5V3Ydy4wg0rZqWqjBkkewHXrcFO1_BLmmSRhocx2X_z15rBfk).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Unlocking the Untold Traits of the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=64897587bada4c2d9ceac9e3406d0057&_e=4NWN9HWjdxtSrbRu0e3hImxZaANUk4b5q9h14Izm8Qj3-FQxamNFyEcM8cAo-Mm0R8HV7Yr9eVzImrjhPojmxhfXsZVPwahd3D6xUvnqp_-E34_zpyhH7ociqIFqme4Jp_b5JIHm1AfzzDrr17aDy_-RNX4R_RJsTq2VEuxsFwutkGoIFXjGIKFElZODHA4_85JB8AOzigaxyDPUA2BiCkyaBp23pKuHu1ByNFv0f8ygN6Op0vC22lXTU3bEs2utv7oxJ2exaZEQYX_hrKAA0XhvX_nq8sWdH6f3HqJN9hX68yACjUEfAB9KpuRs7hPjm-aG_RPkRjRRslbDnHhgSu8OsrP9PxiDNHA3nPorQdzSmbpjCjmzZtaFzIBxIZAl5w3f1V3ka45_MnyxHFcx1A%3D%3D)

| | Dear Friend, [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=64897587bada4c2d9ceac9e3406d0057&_e=4NWN9HWjdxtSrbRu0e3hImxZaANUk4b5q9h14Izm8Qj3-FQxamNFyEcM8cAo-Mm0R8HV7Yr9eVzImrjhPojmxhfXsZVPwahd3D6xUvnqp_-E34_zpyhH7ociqIFqme4Jp_b5JIHm1AfzzDrr17aDy_-RNX4R_RJsTq2VEuxsFwutkGoIFXjGIKFElZODHA4_85JB8AOzigaxyDPUA2BiCkyaBp23pKuHu1ByNFv0f8z7ZOkNxUP4-J1Lqyewac1YN04NWUpSAD3ThEAoinTqYCxGDF45N_kCeBtqhliZ1QVbsMSvDC_UNmscuVWUIN8usgZzr2Ibtmz0WcF71iBWXwLRyfofTGGgYkpPZ09I07udvUN04TwwqSzbtI7UL_43gCWnUxruPuet1EjIyCuyMQ%3D%3D)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=64897587bada4c2d9ceac9e3406d0057&_e=4NWN9HWjdxtSrbRu0e3hImxZaANUk4b5q9h14Izm8Qj3-FQxamNFyEcM8cAo-Mm0R8HV7Yr9eVzImrjhPojmxhfXsZVPwahd3D6xUvnqp_-E34_zpyhH7ociqIFqme4Jp_b5JIHm1AfzzDrr17aDy_-RNX4R_RJsTq2VEuxsFwutkGoIFXjGIKFElZODHA4_85JB8AOzigaxyDPUA2BiCkyaBp23pKuHu1ByNFv0f8yXYwItUZqJ1-LvLpkQs3ljKKlZVwSir9wUTZ5loER02MXQFF-6VAnI39ZBiz3wNkR-6WRqQADxmw45u_zgMq1TGyAKxU-pn4O6gfSsj64OX9L6w7-4-IgNdW86lKehSQareeLJSCvzjwDqpN8vum18lbLhRjxwaVqSA77tA8CtNA%3D%3D)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=64897587bada4c2d9ceac9e3406d0057&_e=4NWN9HWjdxtSrbRu0e3hImxZaANUk4b5q9h14Izm8Qj3-FQxamNFyEcM8cAo-Mm0R8HV7Yr9eVzImrjhPojmxhfXsZVPwahd3D6xUvnqp_-E34_zpyhH7ociqIFqme4Jp_b5JIHm1AfzzDrr17aDy_-RNX4R_RJsTq2VEuxsFwutkGoIFXjGIKFElZODHA4_85JB8AOzigaxyDPUA2BiCkyaBp23pKuHu1ByNFv0f8zyixOPTuGknD_CTqK-K1hGGZK2JUr6se9njgJcUGBTa-qm41HwELNt_DodcGO3zvGxkm_k-eOvWB-Y8PkgIpuhCWjR3uG8dg0lZb5fsuBGpGgV5c5IVHi73oJoTnsGfk6DfpYH8G8To64GdskKjWhvGxQjPsZEYDu3fTu5CshqRg%3D%3D)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Final Hours to Make a Difference This Quarter
body:
Peter,

As the quarter draws closer, thank you for standing with me.

Whether we're battling socialist policies from Kevin Thomas, fighting against Laura Gillen's tax hikes, or navigating the complex issues at our borders, your support has been invaluable.

In my previous life as a cop, I learned to listen, understand, and be part of a team. I'm applying those lessons every day in Congress. I promise to continue being the voice of reason in a place that often lacks it.

With hours remaining, your support counts now more than ever.

Could you help us reach our end-of-quarter goal?

Click Here to Donate Now. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Final+Hours+To+Make+A+Difference+This+Quarter+Email]

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The Dying Citizen
body:
Are you proud to be an American citizen?

| | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75aca5eaab704f7eb82fd5f91738187d&_e=hBLR07cMn_JaHxd_hovAkL1gwfSZMTnzDgo8ExaLYs9epryzg9XBggR9Ha6KO6ESazwmtyi3j-AX_7DJ0sAaZwGPZd-pyunPYtrTn1E39jBoxoNfzyfgkfwZepLgI7_YJ0hOigzuatQQQ2owCIdeQpcPycBBy_I2DWzFPG-gHNIWM3CQrdIcrwJNo6O5SnFZkDJfOlsHbzTUBUzYEfZbNxw8KXjN9GZbqx08zff95JNS0dij8X6iyQeYUiPw-UN9y1_C9aQ4wTipU860jUMPE0_ENezJgQRjTsv243V9Ib8ePi5UlEK85OLFAI66fEc2M-R_WCg3040POkdgtOKNZ7F_BTzrzjbZJx0kNhzGxWGiKNSkGNfsuYgtKqKYqcpnzIEKomMFhkK3D4MsoGFu4dMmDHBaI6w56W7Sossm4JNOVbCvw7JJZqB9PIjdAxzV)
---
| |
Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you're like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can't say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can't say the same thing even today. You don't have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It's one of our nation's great achievements. But there's a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That's why today I hope you'll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75aca5eaab704f7eb82fd5f91738187d&_e=hBLR07cMn_JaHxd_hovAkL1gwfSZMTnzDgo8ExaLYs9epryzg9XBggR9Ha6KO6ESazwmtyi3j-AX_7DJ0sAaZwGPZd-pyunPYtrTn1E39jBoxoNfzyfgkfwZepLgI7_YJ0hOigzuatQQQ2owCIdeQpcPycBBy_I2DWzFPG-gHNIWM3CQrdIcrwJNo6O5SnFZkDJfOlsHbzTUBUzYEfZbNxw8KXjN9GZbqx08zff95JNS0dij8X6iyQeYUiPw-UN9y1_C9aQ4wTipU860jUMPE58noXag2ugcYAF5slD0KAshLtbksws0NCnRDz-wkFQ-DivMMqyvTfcmyfwj69RCh1M-alb5dMcKvfKHVIGyZGYsUNiHtwWScyX1ljEx8j7O7-CO9B6dIN4z1zGhNz4aOHYiWIqALGMAPm607LahAtF-j1ZxNCdkU7vo0POfPB2I)**_
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75aca5eaab704f7eb82fd5f91738187d&_e=hBLR07cMn_JaHxd_hovAkL1gwfSZMTnzDgo8ExaLYs9epryzg9XBggR9Ha6KO6ESazwmtyi3j-AX_7DJ0sAaZwGPZd-pyunPYtrTn1E39jBoxoNfzyfgkfwZepLgI7_YJ0hOigzuatQQQ2owCIdeQpcPycBBy_I2DWzFPG-gHNIWM3CQrdIcrwJNo6O5SnFZkDJfOlsHbzTUBUzYEfZbNxw8KXjN9GZbqx08zff95JNS0dij8X6iyQeYUiPw-UN9y1_C9aQ4wTipU860jUMPE_WDG_-7OFz_XUWfqSvoMxsfrPqU_3TzgngIcqXsquK_VOubFfmq61lR-VNmY13s-adzRM6UjchDkAUTXwIWPpicVXrN_VfJ-w0DjRhLdYM5KzWp6_p4wPGebove1Mr_vcplv7efKY6iem8MDSIgJhj97G4DNzaQTG8iWrtxDQFB)
---
| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal **of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses--free of charge. We already reach millions--we must reach hundreds of thousands more.
* **The second vital goal **is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal **is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that _ your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we'll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75aca5eaab704f7eb82fd5f91738187d&_e=hBLR07cMn_JaHxd_hovAkL1gwfSZMTnzDgo8ExaLYs9epryzg9XBggR9Ha6KO6ESazwmtyi3j-AX_7DJ0sAaZwGPZd-pyunPYtrTn1E39jBoxoNfzyfgkfwZepLgI7_YJ0hOigzuatQQQ2owCIdeQpcPycBBy_I2DWzFPG-gHNIWM3CQrdIcrwJNo6O5SnFZkDJfOlsHbzTUBUzYEfZbNxw8KXjN9GZbqx08zff95JNS0dij8X6iyQeYUiPw-UN9y1_C9aQ4wTipU860jUMPEyiasulYTbCY5qXaNX12isbcLPsItUoHwDD-Zp1CNhKkst3LhY2n37CPVyteMKgJzoTleW_eQZAVbdUWMd4ICMmkWti_7JhjY2oGSzDeWhKr9_NLjcWCaej7gWatoA1PxbXf_fL5cssfnkMa8RELkJnC0eZeBO5bXQa6IXXCOUKS)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you'll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson's book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America. _Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He's also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, "In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure. " ** Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75aca5eaab704f7eb82fd5f91738187d&_e=hBLR07cMn_JaHxd_hovAkL1gwfSZMTnzDgo8ExaLYs9epryzg9XBggR9Ha6KO6ESazwmtyi3j-AX_7DJ0sAaZwGPZd-pyunPYtrTn1E39jBoxoNfzyfgkfwZepLgI7_YJ0hOigzuatQQQ2owCIdeQpcPycBBy_I2DWzFPG-gHNIWM3CQrdIcrwJNo6O5SnFZkDJfOlsHbzTUBUzYEfZbNxw8KXjN9GZbqx08zff95JNS0dij8X6iyQeYUiPw-UN9y1_C9aQ4wTipU860jUMPE9d4j4fHsB7VxlYDh_B2EAFBxpkQ6bjR8eVlOeR79Cen-sMCTFCGVwKb1ATyhyYnKcyZjy14x3T6ctuNiiF-Jz6JhbUDT8_Q_TqFnXxXFymwWiR1d0KqMh-OVKQ5Ymanin9A_nr19o09r6rRCWqVeJo34yqPgZJf1iqDs06nWZhs)**

clean_body: Are you proud to be an American citizen? | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you're like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can't say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can't say the same thing even today. You don't have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It's one of our nation's great achievements. But there's a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain. | | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That's why today I hope you'll support our | | | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals. The first important goal of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through Imprimis , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses--free of charge. We already reach millions--we must reach hundreds of thousands more. The second vital goal is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses. The third critical goal is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum. And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must reach and teach millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that your support is critical to our success. With your help, we'll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. You can give safely and securely at this link: And for a gift of $100 or more, you'll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson's book, The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America. Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He's also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, "In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. This book and he are a treasure. " Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach ** | | | | | | Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _
