name: Full Mag News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8fb8cc7f07fe4f2a85098f58cd663e83&_e=YkAPHHlSEWWEeqW9EOQI8gKRqvPd0aF1XVrgny2X1-dKARRoZciZ55WwkWl6SNwqnjerU9wyZDWx_HlOY6-2m3nrmtnPoZHzjFqt1xNVd6M42CWADALmDZvruQnog2Xfp4zk0EfzEDvi6iIeh2nz6i4SVbH94k-dytRFKA9JEvDReQBuzo4CR1d8pI28hskDwXD0HqD7mLWo3uYGGgPVM4YyqvlcYabP2gg_BR6xoWukeihPNKLzMMaFXORFFs0XgwQRQlyDs4vcJZrdn-st3wFdvD8mPtwQJffIUB0R0hAnxAp72aKVbt3lqqwF572hXMRIh7aBw1Bw-CItTWkwYBupuM0GOXZVush_hK7AfWIn41zTr_8cOiz6P65jJDtjgBg8bNE4NNuiMn71_HNWVMcp5Jljvl-TBMYWVj3FbU7ocV44oCFBrxeq1MAXiegX)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8fb8cc7f07fe4f2a85098f58cd663e83&_e=YkAPHHlSEWWEeqW9EOQI8gKRqvPd0aF1XVrgny2X1-dKARRoZciZ55WwkWl6SNwqnjerU9wyZDWx_HlOY6-2m3nrmtnPoZHzjFqt1xNVd6M42CWADALmDZvruQnog2Xfp4zk0EfzEDvi6iIeh2nz6i4SVbH94k-dytRFKA9JEvDReQBuzo4CR1d8pI28hskDwXD0HqD7mLWo3uYGGgPVM4YyqvlcYabP2gg_BR6xoWukeihPNKLzMMaFXORFFs0XgwQRQlyDs4vcJZrdn-st37mOQQ8-gDcq6jht5ph5MGBOM6-jKVrMlUbWtHK8zrrCZuaVnDBWE9fxZZHkZ0b2R_eweKXzIlRfsqVzfrjMQl6Q9kkdkKXeXWwNqHI5WYegh5eFZIGXQd_IKvanfU0u8sgw6HXcaUJLUdZQcaEusqJQOVty4Wx8QyUIOVPgPx6G)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8fb8cc7f07fe4f2a85098f58cd663e83&_e=YkAPHHlSEWWEeqW9EOQI8gKRqvPd0aF1XVrgny2X1-dKARRoZciZ55WwkWl6SNwqnjerU9wyZDWx_HlOY6-2m3nrmtnPoZHzjFqt1xNVd6M42CWADALmDZvruQnog2Xfp4zk0EfzEDvi6iIeh2nz6i4SVbH94k-dytRFKA9JEvDReQBuzo4CR1d8pI28hskDwXD0HqD7mLWo3uYGGgPVM4YyqvlcYabP2gg_BR6xoWukeihPNKLzMMaFXORFFs0XgwQRQlyDs4vcJZrdn-st3zZQkqyQz4Paa0OHZFRg6USPnf77_NlHq1tgJUzFa4qOHCH1-eADUxAbuZ2H03c51esQ1lTjH40sJVaxSW-hS5OiYg-9_Wlro1sf2I1mCb2CWWTq0I0t2jdUfVJrGdvBXHxHXgyUd2R7rZbuZiOxTAd0CUk300dxzcY0Qd-8njic)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8fb8cc7f07fe4f2a85098f58cd663e83&_e=YkAPHHlSEWWEeqW9EOQI8gKRqvPd0aF1XVrgny2X1-dKARRoZciZ55WwkWl6SNwqnjerU9wyZDWx_HlOY6-2m3nrmtnPoZHzjFqt1xNVd6M42CWADALmDZvruQnog2Xfp4zk0EfzEDvi6iIeh2nz6i4SVbH94k-dytRFKA9JEvDReQBuzo4CR1d8pI28hskDwXD0HqD7mLWo3uYGGgPVM4YyqvlcYabP2gg_BR6xoWukeihPNKLzMMaFXORFFs0XgwQRQlyDs4vcJZrdn-st31itGRbxathsOVL7Hu6ZahaP9WFysztkyiZwR54r9x6V-9IfjGA_SUwuztA8S4HyrdWBATHvfP_jaAMCSJcqksnM37mpryHSUVR5A7F2jyke1r8rLJ-GAJi72-RXpQJzFNbz-YQfnYk_BVJukZDpqpC0PLHCGDInFEUPEsAKzi2D).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join Me in Standing Up for Women’s Sports and American Values
body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6d7cab32a0d948b1b8ffe89c0d77ab04&_e=oZPtytKPvDae5Z9jc_S_sAG5ifcj70T3o5Yvn6jeYE7ULUg9P1xe8763E43Y5JbMUgW5EWjjW6hvoMToudyOwA8FFkiANX8lTJQTAgxpwCgCDx83yJ2c6jTHg1BVhWLTt9yfy0nj1yz1Wil1NRgKnFaXPQil0byGKxjHGIW8mhYN-6zqjFynCJwshCxkyz9K-MZz6ThzQ4FEM4sBt-KjUHu1Ep-jpg-2Sc2-m5PNDtHw6DhC1VuPcO-CoG1-izAGFCjwdoH7-j9p6ot1SuCTCTJ11ZQdOGyCi7eATHGRj540mcQG7PZupfr74g265MUyhtSRXVEmQxZb2YVa438Tz-9NW1GUJwfDjV7WaK6N8no%3D)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6d7cab32a0d948b1b8ffe89c0d77ab04&_e=oZPtytKPvDae5Z9jc_S_sAG5ifcj70T3o5Yvn6jeYE7ULUg9P1xe8763E43Y5JbMUgW5EWjjW6hvoMToudyOwA8FFkiANX8lTJQTAgxpwCgCDx83yJ2c6jTHg1BVhWLTt9yfy0nj1yz1Wil1NRgKnFaXPQil0byGKxjHGIW8mhYN-6zqjFynCJwshCxkyz9K-MZz6ThzQ4FEM4sBt-KjUMdGWU87hUlvxQSMMiJaAU6htpvleP8LknQ6LsesALRhmJjGO-U4V0WuTvWeeDI7bPsRwnA4cMAzf0TVh75MXE4YpwImBzCtNtGtFksWGeHqs1XwRE_f07na9EbQoQaoBIZlB9s2eHD4wRG3M7qrt98%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6d7cab32a0d948b1b8ffe89c0d77ab04&_e=oZPtytKPvDae5Z9jc_S_sAG5ifcj70T3o5Yvn6jeYE7ULUg9P1xe8763E43Y5JbMUgW5EWjjW6hvoMToudyOwA8FFkiANX8lTJQTAgxpwCgCDx83yJ2c6jTHg1BVhWLTt9yfy0nj1yz1Wil1NRgKnFaXPQil0byGKxjHGIW8mhYN-6zqjFynCJwshCxkyz9K-MZz6ThzQ4FEM4sBt-KjUJSWSDUqWy84kUuU4d8eEWcHCcxEhC4DvyvbXdV2O0E2bC-alponr8bvqbwifcc6fnW-ZGzqhjpb_pYN-ab9-hR0xCssZsiGFtXb5h9ZfaE8NIbF85dy9lzuxT-qHCLcss0VE4jS8SemVIYhXNnTShs%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6d7cab32a0d948b1b8ffe89c0d77ab04&_e=oZPtytKPvDae5Z9jc_S_sAG5ifcj70T3o5Yvn6jeYE7ULUg9P1xe8763E43Y5JbMUgW5EWjjW6hvoMToudyOwA8FFkiANX8lTJQTAgxpwCgCDx83yJ2c6jTHg1BVhWLTt9yfy0nj1yz1Wil1NRgKnFaXPQil0byGKxjHGIW8mhYN-6zqjFynCJwshCxkyz9K-MZz6ThzQ4FEM4sBt-KjUOUz285eFu2zZMO_it5R95xuktWPoxm87Qg0tpkk44pxH0X86duPyJyo_24wynVt26K5lwCFyE8seq_T8Fj1O4mYJxxnGfSp_MjMrACSZw-hzUuUoHsH5S7cncUATRA359vO2P8un9zdFHcnhCCXVAM%3D)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell Congress to protect animals in abusive factory farms
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025112?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Animals are enduring HORRIFIC ABUSE in factory farms before being mercilessly slaughtered!**[_**Stop Congress from REVERSING the few animal protections that do exist!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025113?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** ** Pigs and chickens crammed into filthy crates and pens, some so small they can’t even turn around. They’re stored in massive, dark and dreary warehouses. Some may **never feel the sun** before they’re killed. It’s gruesome, Friend, but it’s reality. Some states have animal welfare laws that prohibit some of the cruelest practices on factory farms, but **Congress might REPEAL THESE LAWS!** [_**Friend, please help SAVE innocent animals from corporate cruelty and tell Congress to OPPOSE the EATS Act! >>**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025114?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025115?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
There are **ZERO federal laws protecting animals** on factory farms. The EATS Act, led by Republicans in Congress and Big Ag lobbyists, wouldn’t just continue that legacy, it would actually take us backwards. States have the right to restrict corporate-controlled factory farms from hurting animals. But Congress wants to overrule that.
It’s not just the animals in danger. Factory farms’ unsanitary, crowded conditions are **prime breeding grounds for bacteria and disease.** These threats can pass from animals to people and some scientists predict factory farms could be the **source of the next pandemic!** [_**Please,**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025116?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)_**[Friend, we need 398 more signatures from your area to reach our goal to Congress. Take just 30 seconds to send our pre-written message now!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025117?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**_
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025115?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Chloë Waterman
Climate-Friendly Food Senior Program Manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: An investigative report on Homelessness
body:
Caitlyn Axe, the author of an investigative report by the
Discovery Institute's Fix Homelessness project, used this week's
interview to highlight the failure of the King County Regional
Housing Authority's collaboration with local companies, costing
taxpayers nearly 10 times more to house homeless individuals than
non-profits could.

The team here at Shift WA has
been working to shift the political debate in Washington state
since 2013. We've spent the last decade providing people like you
with the facts and perspectives needed to hopefully make a
difference in your community. So, as always, we will help keep
you-up-to-date with an item or two of interest from your own
backyard. Read on...

This week's Newsmaker
Interview...
This week we talked with Andrea
Suarez, Founder and Executive Director of the non-profit
volunteer organization We Heart Seattle. In a very short time the
group has made a significant impact in cleaning up encampments
and helping people get off the streets. Created during the
height of the COVID pandemic in 2020 when homeless encampments
were filling Seattle's parks, sidewalks, and other public places,
We Heart Seattle challenged the status quo regarding how best to
help those struggling with drugs and homelessness. Along the
way, they have encountered protests by a small group of
extremists as volunteers have cleaned up encampments and
attempted to help those who were suffering. Read more...

This week's top story…
We assume part of Governor
Inslee's decision to take a carbon polluting flight to the U.N.
was to get away from the increasingly louder local noise over his
costly cap-and-tax scheme and the Washington Policy Center's case
that "Governor Inslee's office and others in his administration
are upset that we and others refer to the cost of the CO2
allowances in the law as a 'tax.' The governor's office and
others have resorted to some very convoluted language and logic
to avoid using that politically powerful word." Read more...

In case you missed it…
Leave it to the local paper to
put the finishing touches on the Democrat plan to let the courts
do their re-districting dirty work. That's the take from the
Yakima Herald editorial page, which writes that "(W)hatever
happens with the District 15 boundaries from here, somebody won't
be happy, so more suits or appeals could be in the works soon. We
wouldn't be surprised if the courts were still haggling over this
one when the next census comes around." However, the local paper
takes a dim view of the Dems' motivation for the lawsuit,
pointing out that "some Democrats - particularly those who live
west of the Cascade Range - seem confident that a clear Latino
majority in the 15th would automatically add a nice hue of blue
to Central Washington. But they're living in a fantasy world if
they take for granted that Latinos will lean left." Read more...

Governor Inslee's pennies can
sure add up...

DONATE

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift
Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of
your friends, you can click here to do so.

You can also stay up to date on
our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following
us on Facebook & Twitter.
If you believe you received this message
in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift
Washington, click to unsubscribe.

We set a goal of collecting 1,000,000 signatures by 9:00 AM tomorrow but we’re seriously behind and time is short. " We're sending out this last desperate plea in these final hours. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Defend The Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eebbce88425741058cd6fe0c3c5b03c3&_e=QRJ_tTQfofkc8-bjUllDGoPPJbKqA0TpykRls1ltuofHSqIiK7Umk6ZktYl_ZJx4tbXmlwHLS1nSJpy9nnYuDfa-LKNbm75FXFHWNgissDh9QEEavsw9mIohGXDBCPfaHTVTtB6GRlqezazf_Trgv0MvH5br9oMlPRT4ha5-QFH_UPPTRJuhAhb-tqujZr9Z6iaZhgYBfHvfQ-Whm9hBvxYX27F5hUOv_oxtIsAwUjQGs3My3GlBGGRPw8nMv9EldJubUlDzIHwM4WmEbqFCoLnpksPDDechKy4mAYVjCLmtnxTn1B1mTrNmzz7uMzbNcwDLbbsY1LbqV5PbD-NQmYAOhEQ67jMNRm8EpuCm4INVx3G916E3-rBuPJkWsS1hXTrlHG1HPOEG5h1nlZB3aRuv-H5lmksXvMePuwZ3yrtkbOCy9mx81Wl4b5952eZT)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eebbce88425741058cd6fe0c3c5b03c3&_e=QRJ_tTQfofkc8-bjUllDGoPPJbKqA0TpykRls1ltuofHSqIiK7Umk6ZktYl_ZJx4tbXmlwHLS1nSJpy9nnYuDfa-LKNbm75FXFHWNgissDh9QEEavsw9mIohGXDBCPfaHTVTtB6GRlqezazf_Trgv0MvH5br9oMlPRT4ha5-QFH_UPPTRJuhAhb-tqujZr9Z6iaZhgYBfHvfQ-Whm9hBvxYX27F5hUOv_oxtIsAwUjQGs3My3GlBGGRPw8nMv9EldJubUlDzIHwM4WmEbqFCoB5spk8lznkCB8Vql06NU5DEddMu2R8lURlbg2DSLnWwZKgMGwdnesOxrSx_KA5Zmw543H8a9dxibaOnh6ixqX-GaTmpYWBij4zHvYGNKM_FBZKmLlaMznXqpzSuwqeHibor8cMFkxqBc1toBBhIz6Wnym1ejnAzA1t4Zzc0vt4A)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eebbce88425741058cd6fe0c3c5b03c3&_e=QRJ_tTQfofkc8-bjUllDGoPPJbKqA0TpykRls1ltuofHSqIiK7Umk6ZktYl_ZJx4tbXmlwHLS1nSJpy9nnYuDfa-LKNbm75FXFHWNgissDh9QEEavsw9mIohGXDBCPfaHTVTtB6GRlqezazf_Trgv0MvH5br9oMlPRT4ha5-QFH_UPPTRJuhAhb-tqujZr9Z6iaZhgYBfHvfQ-Whm9hBvxYX27F5hUOv_oxtIsAwUjQGs3My3GlBGGRPw8nMv9EldJubUlDzIHwM4WmEbqFCoNHpf50IeUroxblmM--g_hLT-c8i_8ZAj_YggREFJpL-bliUlGkfsWa7WRbilLD0hZu66GP41sJe8i6sBG5UrReHgdPbaBaUVTz_ggBzrtZviOp9wGPP9WHD0_Pp5VJjKqxr16RAuRen688KCLdogh-fHo9GjYIL9YcmcRA-ZBFc)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eebbce88425741058cd6fe0c3c5b03c3&_e=QRJ_tTQfofkc8-bjUllDGoPPJbKqA0TpykRls1ltuofHSqIiK7Umk6ZktYl_ZJx4tbXmlwHLS1nSJpy9nnYuDfa-LKNbm75FXFHWNgissDh9QEEavsw9mIohGXDBCPfaHTVTtB6GRlqezazf_Trgv0MvH5br9oMlPRT4ha5-QFH_UPPTRJuhAhb-tqujZr9Z6iaZhgYBfHvfQ-Whm9hBvxYX27F5hUOv_oxtIsAwUjQGs3My3GlBGGRPw8nMv9EldJubUlDzIHwM4WmEbqFCoGfnzWGIA30cCeqJ29JfZ-0tUDy6TdHm1ct27NM1d6ULUUJzHdgtsg97CQKRepNv5apoL6Gg1JGAvntlrj0udBfYexeVTdU-qqHwC-44GuJkkpK2OcU9Ke1OjBfquUfCi5g1yVXM4qEZoTee-1rOFjlolX52PbvMl8EYeaHMBZfQ).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Citizenship requires vigilance
body:
Are you proud to be an American citizen?

| | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=95720f31225a4c22a9987c0ac6c81005&_e=4w7-cCdLixC0MXa5wrIzAyKfS1FARAjulbspBkoBVtaFSzAXgQ2xE6knnqtssANPf4es0mSSF2kDUk_UfpBbQHsdU8vfUNywog1oVeAr9LI66JH-46o_FUuxjsyRbciTdt6JL3T8qTiewuMPZeVqZw_qHPmG0QuTybERrqQlTLa-CXWrS0xHW7Mgry9YpDS7k5E1kKUQLTNIQv8MC9AWpjgszF3s_KOtmo9Ma3v2NtFcgt7cIkI6EGN7Y3I-5BXyRvUiM7Zp4i2oqsxIWV0EHxdgGbd9aIXyBKpeT1IZha_U-rSlqwLMxlbbpr27gh6s0KzmY5PqGlk1HIBTff83BmCT0Ab5dDfLTlYggR-UNLgdl-PhL1D6YlwF_dO33O5PC_5JOfhmHnhXMmvAj737DnUsdXA94jZm6Ch2ShCDaHuZFcIG5-zpFsSKIexQfGU2)
---
| |
Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you're like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can't say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can't say the same thing even today. You don't have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It's one of our nation's great achievements. But there's a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That's why today I hope you'll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=95720f31225a4c22a9987c0ac6c81005&_e=4w7-cCdLixC0MXa5wrIzAyKfS1FARAjulbspBkoBVtaFSzAXgQ2xE6knnqtssANPf4es0mSSF2kDUk_UfpBbQHsdU8vfUNywog1oVeAr9LI66JH-46o_FUuxjsyRbciTdt6JL3T8qTiewuMPZeVqZw_qHPmG0QuTybERrqQlTLa-CXWrS0xHW7Mgry9YpDS7k5E1kKUQLTNIQv8MC9AWpjgszF3s_KOtmo9Ma3v2NtFcgt7cIkI6EGN7Y3I-5BXyRvUiM7Zp4i2oqsxIWV0EHwzdukwTSDGft2UB2zeFumoQvzaj4B64lzF0Dz10mrb1E7V9Uf-XKgwDzQuh3bYMUWpkk5IWFjtnk2n-4PPFUBi4eXabDs0zrFzFWRJce_DnOaJg_ywe6_JJ9q4GeWxWmkGAci9PQ1ei2-alsND_8as001hUzC-WvtEd1Wg-8RW6)**_
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=95720f31225a4c22a9987c0ac6c81005&_e=4w7-cCdLixC0MXa5wrIzAyKfS1FARAjulbspBkoBVtaFSzAXgQ2xE6knnqtssANPf4es0mSSF2kDUk_UfpBbQHsdU8vfUNywog1oVeAr9LI66JH-46o_FUuxjsyRbciTdt6JL3T8qTiewuMPZeVqZw_qHPmG0QuTybERrqQlTLa-CXWrS0xHW7Mgry9YpDS7k5E1kKUQLTNIQv8MC9AWpjgszF3s_KOtmo9Ma3v2NtFcgt7cIkI6EGN7Y3I-5BXyRvUiM7Zp4i2oqsxIWV0EH3tNG2m1oweGOysRZOeXe-xa9fVSGxjF5n80u8dZx63SNg4u318fnUNX99rdaC83aCYjQFqMOpxwilaOpc6jBSo4KAyput7jiSU8mOV-KDDLkfGM8yWHLvf_4P1ZduBEGAbRk8ERymgpt3Uu6r5C9K-cvMkDqYPqs9c0Cv-YEHCE)
---
| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal **of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses--free of charge. We already reach millions--we must reach hundreds of thousands more.
* **The second vital goal **is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal **is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that _ your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we'll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=95720f31225a4c22a9987c0ac6c81005&_e=4w7-cCdLixC0MXa5wrIzAyKfS1FARAjulbspBkoBVtaFSzAXgQ2xE6knnqtssANPf4es0mSSF2kDUk_UfpBbQHsdU8vfUNywog1oVeAr9LI66JH-46o_FUuxjsyRbciTdt6JL3T8qTiewuMPZeVqZw_qHPmG0QuTybERrqQlTLa-CXWrS0xHW7Mgry9YpDS7k5E1kKUQLTNIQv8MC9AWpjgszF3s_KOtmo9Ma3v2NtFcgt7cIkI6EGN7Y3I-5BXyRvUiM7Zp4i2oqsxIWV0EH7EuWf5Tccs9-nmYFYt_gSTNjKnuwt2t8i04PMTTmO7K5tvEwIzM0molPFhKsFsTL-auOZVopcxeDyTpzwHZjlCBEtpc4vUsRfLuQsvoopSkDPp_etJOHL6tttKaCsOSFtnq04qukvQ7fAHhWg6A5hwl_8EypG06uHeVtnqg_F2C)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you'll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson's book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America. _Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He's also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, "In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure. " ** Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=95720f31225a4c22a9987c0ac6c81005&_e=4w7-cCdLixC0MXa5wrIzAyKfS1FARAjulbspBkoBVtaFSzAXgQ2xE6knnqtssANPf4es0mSSF2kDUk_UfpBbQHsdU8vfUNywog1oVeAr9LI66JH-46o_FUuxjsyRbciTdt6JL3T8qTiewuMPZeVqZw_qHPmG0QuTybERrqQlTLa-CXWrS0xHW7Mgry9YpDS7k5E1kKUQLTNIQv8MC9AWpjgszF3s_KOtmo9Ma3v2NtFcgt7cIkI6EGN7Y3I-5BXyRvUiM7Zp4i2oqsxIWV0EHxjSx_6sp6Y7JYWOySwr_LSWv3HXwxdz46hNenV9-WWXBEHt-9SrZlPb8GLHG7WHIB69fH6yKk7SA_Da3UB5C81tdjK17l0iVklQ8MVoqJ8kx4TUhNtsPSjfU8oxEZzwLosYYnjJS1JMUlDlZM98RsS_lxxABzJVbKngA99tmFJ6)**
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |

body:

Friend,

I have a plan to get America back on track as your next president.

**[Once you look this over, if this is the future you want to see, I am humbly asking you to join my team today with a generous donation of $5, $25, or even $47 or more today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6b84c90b034449c79175d9d6ed33ba09&_e=aI4u88uXE1Pm0KHDX13A-SZie6t5s7UqksUKnOXKMV0Gyzcf4IxcB4DjpsnAtWknVu2aZ6c1SHzZnJ82AZY9mZHf09zyN9Bdj0_LSwo9atig44rHrhJsA6IfbIWxG38UIFQCnnf9oDf52Ypsgqv3S4AHKhZCT0tvOQPMP3-ot3mFNw87ebv1MOQP2q7cMi3mZtX6ZG0Oy3y_cBohTQ53XIiMwQmSTyzKyb38KAYqAK5XVtIbUi8Wl0Fnexx1j2KwRcxKkSLfsz8XsZippjMcRAmJMtI12m4fZ_3TCjvXjxLTncVsIKKXoaRSxX911CDf5cnmdxkRbfakv7U24m6qhQ4Pov9YtqndQ6xwEsJhXixgYaHeCqiOql3DjNwoxl7Y71mKgBkwNLftc5MF_xY4F1MxFcnvWzIg3mDX7cpxwx4L8yX4yyRXGBYwBHjRFfg-o3xM0b-HuCrJAeRCDFGXO-_dhW94to4-qVazSA5vebEOUf3Pshnn7vIYvcJcXIhVp7U3pCOrMQ1Pf5jRuNpF7Baui8mFnUC88ib-SlgWhzXeaFFCXaNyPf8KGdbA8W4PBOAVipKauRrtqFJdeP7uQUWSD824Og7cwBs9lj1ZanU%3D "Once you look this over, if this is the future you want to see, I am humbly asking you to join my team today with a generous donation of $5, $25, or even $47 or more today. ")**

So, what are some of the things I would do as President to fix the mess our country's in?

_**When it comes to our economy**_ , we claw back the billions of unspent COVID dollars that are still out there.

_**Rather than 87,000 IRS agents going after middle America**_ , let's go after the hundreds of billions of dollars of COVID fraud that we know exist.

If 8% of our budget is interest, quit borrowing! _**Cut up the credit cards!**_

We will stop the spending, we will stop the borrowing, we will stop the earmarks. And I will veto any spending bill that doesn't take us back to pre-COVID levels.

**When it comes to education, there should be complete transparency in the classroom.** You, as parents, should NEVER have to wonder what is being taught to your kids in schools. You have every right to know what's happening!

We need to make sure that parents can decide which schools they want their kids to go to. No child should be educated based on where they are born and raised. They should be educated on the fact that they deserve a good education, and their parents should be able to help them find it.

**We will put vocational classes back in our high schools and we will build things in America again!** In South Carolina, we put apprenticeships all over our state so that our young kids could learn how to build things. Let's put them in every single high school so that our kids are building things for America.

**When it comes to our universities, we 'll tell them: you either take Chinese money or you take American money, but the days of taking both are over.** We will get that Chinese infiltration out of our universities once and for all.

**When it comes to crime, it's simple:** Have the backs of our law enforcement and take the numbers of our criminals.

_**We will bring law and order back!**_

When you look at our foreign policy situation, let's tell countries what we expect of them. Stop being reactionary! Let's start getting things back on track.

When I was at the UN, there were two things I knew that Russia, China, Iran, and our enemies never wanted America to have. They didn't want us to have _**a strong military**_ and they didn't want us to be _**energy independent.**_

_**We need to do both of those things!**_ Strong militaries don't start wars, strong militaries prevent wars.

When it comes to energy independence, no more going hat-in-hand to Saudi Arabia, no more getting dirty oil from Venezuela! Let's make sure we do things so that it's __**our American producers**__ supplying __**our American families.**__

_**When it comes to our enemies, we must stop giving money to countries that hate us!**_ Quit trying to buy friends, quit paying off our enemies!

_Last year we gave $50 billion in foreign aid._ Do you know who we gave it to? Pakistan, who harbored terrorists that tried to kill our soldiers. Iraq, that has Iranian influence that says death to America. Zimbabwe, the most anti-American African country out there. Belarus, who is holding hands with Russia in their war against Ukraine. We give money to Communist Cuba, who we named a state sponsor of terrorism.

And the one that is most embarrassing? **We give money to China! **

_How weak do we look? _

**When I am President, we will no longer give money to countries that hate America!**

We have the solutions. We know what it means to get things done.

But I need your help to win so we can get to work and right this ship!

**[Please join me in the fight to save our country by pitching in a generous donation today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6b84c90b034449c79175d9d6ed33ba09&_e=aI4u88uXE1Pm0KHDX13A-SZie6t5s7UqksUKnOXKMV0Gyzcf4IxcB4DjpsnAtWknVu2aZ6c1SHzZnJ82AZY9mZHf09zyN9Bdj0_LSwo9atig44rHrhJsA6IfbIWxG38UIFQCnnf9oDf52Ypsgqv3S4AHKhZCT0tvOQPMP3-ot3mFNw87ebv1MOQP2q7cMi3mZtX6ZG0Oy3y_cBohTQ53XIiMwQmSTyzKyb38KAYqAK5XVtIbUi8Wl0Fnexx1j2KwRcxKkSLfsz8XsZippjMcRAmJMtI12m4fZ_3TCjvXjxLTncVsIKKXoaRSxX911CDf5cnmdxkRbfakv7U24m6qhQ4Pov9YtqndQ6xwEsJhXixgYaHeCqiOql3DjNwoxl7Y71mKgBkwNLftc5MF_xY4F1MxFcnvWzIg3mDX7cpxwx4L8yX4yyRXGBYwBHjRFfg-o3xM0b-HuCrJAeRCDFGXO-LYisv1q-UhX3axKlm_lzTEMBQjbLXDoCD0TKMhb0N4dAraQc8YfrEJAZwwG1XPeOaU6EhjdIU-Qhhikdq_IpQhKC1bOoaGFRmFvV7NPLHkXlsz1csLq2RytzfrNd9KArpO_0JcZRpI0jTOrtJwaXo%3D "Please join me in the fight to save our country by pitching in a generous donation today.")** | | | [DONATE](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6b84c90b034449c79175d9d6ed33ba09&_e=aI4u88uXE1Pm0KHDX13A-SZie6t5s7UqksUKnOXKMV0Gyzcf4IxcB4DjpsnAtWknVu2aZ6c1SHzZnJ82AZY9mZHf09zyN9Bdj0_LSwo9atig44rHrhJsA6IfbIWxG38UIFQCnnf9oDf52Ypsgqv3S4AHKhZCT0tvOQPMP3-ot3mFNw87ebv1MOQP2q7cMi3mZtX6ZG0Oy3y_cBohTQ53XIiMwQmSTyzKyb38KAYqAK5XVtIbUi8Wl0Fnexx1j2KwRcxKkSLfsz8XsZippjMcRAmJMtI12m4fZ_3TCjvXjxLTncVsIKKXoaRSxX911CDf5cnmdxkRbfakv7U24m6qhQ4Pov9YtqndQ6xwEsJhXixgYaHeCqiOql3DjNwoxl7Y71mKgBkwNLftc5MF_xY4F1MxFcnvWzIg3mDX7cpxwx4L8yX4yyRXGBYwBHjRFfg-o3xM0b-HuCrJAeRCDFGXOy0jtE4zTfIbhkFTjADqNbuDNHZTcGUYt9ULoWRYT552uA_bEPot176aBaaQwIF-fprdWfT9ObYLhax2G1b07Kjwi0VYMh3JOliGBCTj6nNbtyejpBWi4u6HWUXM9_HMLBCUY3B50NttPLpskgvrJOo%3D)

Will you help me save her?

My very best,

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6b84c90b034449c79175d9d6ed33ba09&_e=aI4u88uXE1Pm0KHDX13A-SZie6t5s7UqksUKnOXKMV0Gyzcf4IxcB4DjpsnAtWkngFB5tHSmGkIQEU4rxHTRcxdlnTJ5eiygVjMTASMoq7WPz2fvh-pKfwVeSuToNcuMC8OLbX0jhJ_TddH5HoZHYbtVYgNyDd1FOFgdZgoGDlaVWTyoMMuWS4iHBQmEsa9e10CZThWy4owDW_TuEsF5DwKmCblggM5Uk4avHlqxM_A3uUE7VokyAeUAfCR5WjnCZjAS5QcjqxQsdz_Bc5glIdlzS-DZ3tc8K8dCgbm7oPevI03c6Ux1xrDC9CNRAaM_NeQT3OwJw47jBuAFFlhqi_zSTUqfNxwlGy18X-w88wsMiZ2NZVxxJ43fCNNKas5scUA6VrtzhgbV23zl5VISv1rTTM15PDgAxmqxMFlJ2VBJvk9HKRJ7sUALI_T6RXpFb-sCMiokKFMF4g5LKMPQpZiF1_-7J6qAjQiQ1PpWW8OGCwbu7UP-moEtjW5GGNU-Xb2AE9qCedz_JlxXB79eDNF0EL_l51E8GUv-IDrBvsN0yXEEhAhnSIXSqItJIz7czsislKFoO24BZe7sXuCrj8efz3IiQ4y_pDrQuwgKgOU6c8pBWxDWgKPzz8HSg1KG "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: Long but important | | | | | | Friend, I have a plan to get America back on track as your next president. "Once you look this over, if this is the future you want to see, I am humbly asking you to join my team today with a generous donation of $5, $25, or even $47 or more today. " So, what are some of the things I would do as President to fix the mess our country's in? When it comes to our economy , we claw back the billions of unspent COVID dollars that are still out there. Rather than 87,000 IRS agents going after middle America , let's go after the hundreds of billions of dollars of COVID fraud that we know exist. If 8% of our budget is interest, quit borrowing! Cut up the credit cards! We will stop the spending, we will stop the borrowing, we will stop the earmarks. And I will veto any spending bill that doesn't take us back to pre-COVID levels. When it comes to education, there should be complete transparency in the classroom. You, as parents, should NEVER have to wonder what is being taught to your kids in schools. You have every right to know what's happening! We need to make sure that parents can decide which schools they want their kids to go to. No child should be educated based on where they are born and raised. They should be educated on the fact that they deserve a good education, and their parents should be able to help them find it. We will put vocational classes back in our high schools and we will build things in America again! In South Carolina, we put apprenticeships all over our state so that our young kids could learn how to build things. Let's put them in every single high school so that our kids are building things for America. When it comes to our universities, we 'll tell them: you either take Chinese money or you take American money, but the days of taking both are over. We will get that Chinese infiltration out of our universities once and for all. When it comes to crime, it's simple: Have the backs of our law enforcement and take the numbers of our criminals. We will bring law and order back! When you look at our foreign policy situation, let's tell countries what we expect of them. Stop being reactionary! Let's start getting things back on track. When I was at the UN, there were two things I knew that Russia, China, Iran, and our enemies never wanted America to have. They didn't want us to have a strong military and they didn't want us to be energy independent. We need to do both of those things! Strong militaries don't start wars, strong militaries prevent wars. When it comes to energy independence, no more going hat-in-hand to Saudi Arabia, no more getting dirty oil from Venezuela! Let's make sure we do things so that it's our American producers supplying our American families. When it comes to our enemies, we must stop giving money to countries that hate us! Quit trying to buy friends, quit paying off our enemies! Last year we gave $50 billion in foreign aid. Do you know who we gave it to? Pakistan, who harbored terrorists that tried to kill our soldiers. Iraq, that has Iranian influence that says death to America. Zimbabwe, the most anti-American African country out there. Belarus, who is holding hands with Russia in their war against Ukraine. We give money to Communist Cuba, who we named a state sponsor of terrorism. And the one that is most embarrassing? We give money to China! How weak do we look? When I am President, we will no longer give money to countries that hate America! We have the solutions. We know what it means to get things done. But I need your help to win so we can get to work and right this ship! "Please join me in the fight to save our country by pitching in a generous donation today." | | | "I need your support to fund my campaign and win!" We've got a country to save, Friend. Will you help me save her? My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: Our movement is making history.

body:
|

Friend,
Thanks to your unwavering support and dedication, we've achieved monumental victories in our pursuit of fair representation. The shining beacon of our progress burns brightest in the heart of Alabama, where we anchored our efforts and bore witness to the immense power of our collective resolve and the will of the people.
[**Will you chip into All On The Line to help us keep up the fight?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70725368/430197217/-1989437795?refcode=20231001_AOTL_P_EHHA1_Green&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4NTVhNTBiLTUyNjAtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CEXIckm_NVnxg19MyKPLOERMoiEpz7JJb_x3kMPWuzU=)
[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70725370/430197232/-1989437795?refcode=20231001_AOTL_P_EHHA1_Green&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4NTVhNTBiLTUyNjAtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CEXIckm_NVnxg19MyKPLOERMoiEpz7JJb_x3kMPWuzU=)
---
Recently, federal district judges declared that the legislature's proposed congressional map in Alabama was a woefully insufficient remedy to the illegal gerrymandering that has existed there for far too long. This decision marks a monumental stride towards fair representation, and **it sends an unambiguous message -- attempts to diminish our rights as voters will be met with unyielding resistance.**
But, my friends, our work is far from done. In Georgia, for example, the fight for fairness continues on as we confront gerrymandered maps that dilute the voting power of communities of color. Our affiliate stands at the forefront of these critical redistricting challenges.
Meanwhile, in Ohio, the shadow of truly epic gerrymandering looms ominously. **Let me be unequivocal: we will not stand for unfair maps and the blatant disregard of Ohio voters.** The voices of Ohioans and voters nationwide should not be drowned out by political anti-democracy maneuvering. We demand fairness, transparency, and a process that venerates the core principles of our democracy.
[**Will you make a donation to All On The Line to help us keep up our momentum against gerrymandering?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70725373/430197234/-1989437795?refcode=20231001_AOTL_P_EHHA1_Green&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4NTVhNTBiLTUyNjAtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CEXIckm_NVnxg19MyKPLOERMoiEpz7JJb_x3kMPWuzU=)

[DONATE $250](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70725393/430197280/-1989437795?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20231001_AOTL_P_EHHA1_Green&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4NTVhNTBiLTUyNjAtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CEXIckm_NVnxg19MyKPLOERMoiEpz7JJb_x3kMPWuzU=) | [Another Amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70725400/430197285/-1989437795?refcode=20231001_AOTL_P_EHHA1_Green&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4NTVhNTBiLTUyNjAtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CEXIckm_NVnxg19MyKPLOERMoiEpz7JJb_x3kMPWuzU=)
Whether it's mobilizing Ohio voters, securing a win in Alabama, or standing firm in the courts of Georgia, our movement is making history. However, there remains much work ahead. We need your unwavering support to ensure that every American's right to fair representation is safeguarded.
Your support has proven to be critical to our fight year after year. And with your continuous support, I firmly believe we will forge a future where every voice resonates, where every vote holds weight, and where our democracy authentically mirrors the people it serves.
**[Help us continue driving change that will echo through the ages. Make a donation to All On The Line today. ➡️](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70725403/430197293/-1989437795?refcode=20231001_AOTL_P_EHHA1_Green&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4NTVhNTBiLTUyNjAtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CEXIckm_NVnxg19MyKPLOERMoiEpz7JJb_x3kMPWuzU=)**
\-- Eric H. Holder, Jr.

name: NCPD
subject: Friend, my police officer son is facing 99 years in prison...
body:
[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j0Fv8jAMQH-Ne6OK7dShhxzg4-sOkzhN0zhmSVjLkrW0sIr9-gnGdrWfnp9dHlK3v1gwayBquzABEfAKiI67OY_nQ358WKxet4ujbHN1XdI_IDpdhvhH3iVlzK5L16nZFME6cfsYimhRakFhw1i0NsZqSb6KUmkMLBLqeikBnWhkX7MpOkuKGJVCJCbGUlQUxWZptBIUTaDV7VDpcHbj2Pe59H0ukm1Pp2G6FTVAzTz25cfZp3iefnDfZ6Dm3grUfAI15J_fxb-E9gu4uX3PG70-PP2vdroYbRjmLqVuEgNavf1avgMAAP__MSlbDg) | [Unsubscribe](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8kDFvwjAQhX_NZSPync05DB6gNB0qMXVhdBKnGMU42Iki_n0FTbu-e_ru07NhHHz_MKAPQHTxXQYikHsgup-XkOZr-PzY7JvT5s6nsH0e6Q2Ipsfo_psrpHTB-uGZ6mPRGcu2d13hDPKOkaWWWFyMs8yNcj1ipQUiWnZ9q6Rtnd3ZSleFNyRIohCIJEliycKxkLrSSjCyIlDi9ai0uNiUYgxlG0MxmMs0jfllVAPVS4rlbW4HN-ffehsDUL26AtV5bnKb_Dj5eMtA9Xxbk8aBrF9TyKM6XL_et2dVJNONix8Gn1mDEt9_yJ8AAAD__wPLYh8)
| | | [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j82umzAQhZ9m2BnZY9e-LFjcFtFFpey7ivwzSVxhIMaI5u0rp-huz3wzZz6b1ineXj2Y74D4iGEDRJCfgPj8faS8_0m_frJPd2FPfUnf6hB_AGJ5rfRFnkdaSjZONTVDE3qr7Y1CQ73QnRZaGimaR6-MddJwo4U1neh816F1jn8Qv3XSedPEHjlKwbkQKFGKVnPSXJoPo7gWWiEo_i5qrThszsuSWr-kZuofpazb-6MRcNzI75laO1NYSiUAx9mvAXAMjhUMjBJTmtHfAnLclj17uvolEMghOFZRRklpx7hQgHov6fqfAjnMfjqjRCHuCeTg8pl4m1Yb7zPIoQSsFZwjq0JV7IQK5bp0ZNnkPqxHnKa4aQOK399ufkn_AgAA__96sHu4)
---
| | Friend, My name is Clara Gaitan, and I was so proud of my son Alex when he graduated from the police academy. But our dream of Alex serving as a police officer has become our family’s nightmare. **_Alex is facing 99 years in prison for catching a dangerous criminal!_** As a mother, I’m beside myself. You won’t believe how this miscarriage of justice came about. Back in March 2021, Alex was dispatched for an unknown urgent call for service. When Alex arrived at the address, he recognized he’d been there before on previous calls. The first time Alex had been there, he had to fight an inhumanly strong young man who was a drug user. Even with two other officers, it was nearly impossible to subdue the suspect. Only a non-lethal Taser worked, but not before the suspect injured an officer. However, on this day, **THREE** other officers had been dispatched to the scene, so they had a better chance of subduing the suspect. When Alex caught up with his fellow officers, he saw all three officers on the ground, struggling to bring the suspect under control. Alex told him to stop resisting, then grabbed his upper torso and put him on the ground. **Even on the ground with****FOUR AGAINST ONE****, the suspect had inhuman strength, as if he were on drugs.** Alex knew the suspect’s pain tolerance was so high that fist strikes would not work and could injure Alex. So Alex followed his training and used his police-issued baton to get the suspect to comply and lie fully on the ground. While on the ground, the suspect continued to resist the officers and their attempts to get him in handcuffs. So Alex decided to use his non-lethal Taser to get the suspect’s compliance. The Taser deployment worked, and the suspect stopped resisting the police officers. The danger was over, and Alex would come home that night. The possibility of your loved one not surviving their shift is a reality that every police family lives with, especially today when criminals are willing to fight officers. So we thought that was the end of it... **_but we were wrong._** Almost two years later, the local anti-cop, socialist District Attorney dropped a bombshell and indicted Alex for aggravated assault... ...even though it was the suspect who resisted arrest and decided it was a good idea to fight four police officers. Alex could be imprisoned for up to **99 years** if convicted. **_That’s outrageous!_** The good news is Alex has the moral support of his department, his Chief of Police, and hundreds of his Brothers and Sisters in Blue across the country. But, Friend, as you well know, cops don’t get paid a ton for the sacrifices they make and the dangers they put themselves in to keep us all safe. As a result of these attacks on my son, we’re facing a mountain of legal bills that could bury us — and send Alex to prison for up to 99 years! So when Jim Fotis and the National Center for Police Defense (NCPD), a 501(c)3 non-profit charity, offered to help us, it was like God was answering our prayers.
---
[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j82umzAQhZ9m2BnZY9e-LFjcFtFFpey7ivwzSVxhIMaI5u0rp-huz3wzZz6b1ineXj2Y74D4iGEDRJCfgPj8faS8_0m_frJPd2FPfUnf6hB_AGJ5rfRFnkdaSjZONTVDE3qr7Y1CQ73QnRZaGimaR6-MddJwo4U1neh816F1jn8Qv3XSedPEHjlKwbkQKFGKVnPSXJoPo7gWWiEo_i5qrThszsuSWr-kZuofpazb-6MRcNzI75laO1NYSiUAx9mvAXAMjhUMjBJTmtHfAnLclj17uvolEMghOFZRRklpx7hQgHov6fqfAjnMfjqjRCHuCeTg8pl4m1Yb7zPIoQSsFZwjq0JV7IQK5bp0ZNnkPqxHnKa4aQOK399ufkn_AgAA__96sHu4)
---
Founded by Jim Fotis, an Army veteran and retired police officer from New York, the NCPD has been instrumental in taking the lead to stand up for police officers Sheriff Joe Arpaio (“America’s Toughest Sheriff”), Tulsa’s Police Officer Betty Shelby, New York Cops Anthony Federico and Hugh Barry Jr., Michigan’s Mark Bessner, and many more. The NCPD is a 100% hard-hitting organization of police officers (retired and active) and defense attorneys who know what Alex has been through and what it takes to see his case to victory. Friend, now that you know that Alex is being railroaded for safely subduing a dangerous suspect, let me ask you point blank: **[Will you help Alex today by making a tax-deductible gift of $10, $15, $20, $25 or more to the NCPD to help them fund Alex’s defense?](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j82umzAQhZ9m2BnZY9e-LFjcFtFFpey7ivwzSVxhIMaI5u0rp-huz3wzZz6b1ineXj2Y74D4iGEDRJCfgPj8faS8_0m_frJPd2FPfUnf6hB_AGJ5rfRFnkdaSjZONTVDE3qr7Y1CQ73QnRZaGimaR6-MddJwo4U1neh816F1jn8Qv3XSedPEHjlKwbkQKFGKVnPSXJoPo7gWWiEo_i5qrThszsuSWr-kZuofpazb-6MRcNzI75laO1NYSiUAx9mvAXAMjhUMjBJTmtHfAnLclj17uvolEMghOFZRRklpx7hQgHov6fqfAjnMfjqjRCHuCeTg8pl4m1Yb7zPIoQSsFZwjq0JV7IQK5bp0ZNnkPqxHnKa4aQOK399ufkn_AgAA__96sHu4) ** Alex’s legal defense will cost over $150,000, and he doesn’t have the money to pay for it. _Alex needs your help!_ Make no mistake, a shameful pattern of anti-police sentiment and cop-hating rhetoric has swept America over the past decade. Alex’s exoneration at trial is critical to restoring the integrity of policing in America. This “war on cops” is not a joke. It’s for real. And now, they’re coming after my Alex. **[Please, as the loving mother of an honorable and honest cop, I beg you to lend us a hand by donating $10, $15, $20, $25 or even $50 or $100 today.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j82umzAQhZ9m2BnZY9e-LFjcFtFFpey7ivwzSVxhIMaI5u0rp-huz3wzZz6b1ineXj2Y74D4iGEDRJCfgPj8faS8_0m_frJPd2FPfUnf6hB_AGJ5rfRFnkdaSjZONTVDE3qr7Y1CQ73QnRZaGimaR6-MddJwo4U1neh816F1jn8Qv3XSedPEHjlKwbkQKFGKVnPSXJoPo7gWWiEo_i5qrThszsuSWr-kZuofpazb-6MRcNzI75laO1NYSiUAx9mvAXAMjhUMjBJTmtHfAnLclj17uvolEMghOFZRRklpx7hQgHov6fqfAjnMfjqjRCHuCeTg8pl4m1Yb7zPIoQSsFZwjq0JV7IQK5bp0ZNnkPqxHnKa4aQOK399ufkn_AgAA__96sHu4) ** From the bottom of my heart, and on behalf of my son Alex and all law enforcement personnel and their families, I thank you. With gratitude,

Clara Gaitan P.S. Alex is the kindest, bravest, most honest police officer you could ever meet. He is the joy of our family and a highly respected member of the law enforcement community.
**[Please help my family prove his innocence by supporting his legal defense with your generous, 100% tax-deductible donation of $10, $15, $20, $25, $50, $100 or more to the National Center for Police Defense today.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j82umzAQhZ9m2BnZY9e-LFjcFtFFpey7ivwzSVxhIMaI5u0rp-huz3wzZz6b1ineXj2Y74D4iGEDRJCfgPj8faS8_0m_frJPd2FPfUnf6hB_AGJ5rfRFnkdaSjZONTVDE3qr7Y1CQ73QnRZaGimaR6-MddJwo4U1neh816F1jn8Qv3XSedPEHjlKwbkQKFGKVnPSXJoPo7gWWiEo_i5qrThszsuSWr-kZuofpazb-6MRcNzI75laO1NYSiUAx9mvAXAMjhUMjBJTmtHfAnLclj17uvolEMghOFZRRklpx7hQgHov6fqfAjnMfjqjRCHuCeTg8pl4m1Yb7zPIoQSsFZwjq0JV7IQK5bp0ZNnkPqxHnKa4aQOK399ufkn_AgAA__96sHu4)** I pray you will do your best, as Alex has always done as a son and a police officer.
---
[SUPPORT NOW](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j82umzAQhZ9m2BnZY9e-LFjcFtFFpey7ivwzSVxhIMaI5u0rp-huz3wzZz6b1ineXj2Y74D4iGEDRJCfgPj8faS8_0m_frJPd2FPfUnf6hB_AGJ5rfRFnkdaSjZONTVDE3qr7Y1CQ73QnRZaGimaR6-MddJwo4U1neh816F1jn8Qv3XSedPEHjlKwbkQKFGKVnPSXJoPo7gWWiEo_i5qrThszsuSWr-kZuofpazb-6MRcNzI75laO1NYSiUAx9mvAXAMjhUMjBJTmtHfAnLclj17uvolEMghOFZRRklpx7hQgHov6fqfAjnMfjqjRCHuCeTg8pl4m1Yb7zPIoQSsFZwjq0JV7IQK5bp0ZNnkPqxHnKa4aQOK399ufkn_AgAA__96sHu4)
---

Almost two years later, the local anti-cop, socialist District Attorney dropped a bombshell and indicted Alex for aggravated assault... ...even though it was the suspect who resisted arrest and decided it was a good idea to fight four police officers. Alex could be imprisoned for up to 99 years if convicted. That’s outrageous! The good news is Alex has the moral support of his department, his Chief of Police, and hundreds of his Brothers and Sisters in Blue across the country. But, Friend, as you well know, cops don’t get paid a ton for the sacrifices they make and the dangers they put themselves in to keep us all safe. As a result of these attacks on my son, we’re facing a mountain of legal bills that could bury us — and send Alex to prison for up to 99 years! So when Jim Fotis and the National Center for Police Defense (NCPD), a 501(c)3 non-profit charity, offered to help us, it was like God was answering our prayers. Founded by Jim Fotis, an Army veteran and retired police officer from New York, the NCPD has been instrumental in taking the lead to stand up for police officers Sheriff Joe Arpaio (“America’s Toughest Sheriff”), Tulsa’s Police Officer Betty Shelby, New York Cops Anthony Federico and Hugh Barry Jr., Michigan’s Mark Bessner, and many more. The NCPD is a 100% hard-hitting organization of police officers (retired and active) and defense attorneys who know what Alex has been through and what it takes to see his case to victory. Friend, now that you know that Alex is being railroaded for safely subduing a dangerous suspect, let me ask you point blank: Alex’s legal defense will cost over $150,000, and he doesn’t have the money to pay for it. Alex needs your help! Make no mistake, a shameful pattern of anti-police sentiment and cop-hating rhetoric has swept America over the past decade. Alex’s exoneration at trial is critical to restoring the integrity of policing in America. This “war on cops” is not a joke. It’s for real. And now, they’re coming after my Alex. From the bottom of my heart, and on behalf of my son Alex and all law enforcement personnel and their families, I thank you. With gratitude, Clara Gaitan P.S. Alex is the kindest, bravest, most honest police officer you could ever meet. He is the joy of our family and a highly respected member of the law enforcement community. I pray you will do your best, as Alex has always done as a son and a police officer. | | The National Center for Police Defense is a 501c3 Charitable Institution. All Contributions are Tax-Deductible. National Center for Police Defense 10521 Judicial Drive Suite 200 Fairfax, VA 22030

Fellow American,

**TRUTH.** There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them:

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.
| [** CHIP IN IF YOU BELIEVE IN THE TRUTH **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b5ead27315a745d9b7668ae6b56ec58a&_e=GXChZxK65HkdYscB5DVmhS3dLNty7pB9ueRncMBx4Ne_LQZds1d7s3M59WVTzou7fMntulxU8w6xbCrTuBaE10fBCw2iaJroBiEB6azYDAhSNcE1p2JM6_mJusf-LcP4jCZWfW5WX0GVou956jssxH_aduoZHq7Z0uSo4xsWIVBt1oRLv8jxdEMpIfmZgBoqp_NaW3DxxtiGU6M6qyurZRb3vnE5_vxy2qobhDpQjGpjkqNhQ8OebBq2fd2Xwo_51xJxn7iUIbjZPBA2zf-hG0mdYj6NK5r62S2aq8tKqmMkAmH3leqHhqoe7vQPCTaBpp0LcC7zhqC5vkEX9-H4i8KC32KjBYWp2rhXyC4CjGK0wy4EXdyI7PVwtNS4GvhvY4JRwJ_CmRoWJGywFYjdEg%3D%3D)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

subject: 700 years in jail

1️⃣ **_New Hampshire:_ The Board of Education voteds to allow extreme conservative curriculum in public schools**
In New Hampshire, state officials approved the inclusion of a controversial curriculum for public schools. subject: Register Now: Let Connecticut Work
body:
Support our friends at Yankee Institute and Get Connecticut Working Again | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7e449c2e21db/be-brave-do-something-upcoming-events-13544928?e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
|
---
**Let Connecticut****Work Conference**
|
---

**Why Your Attendance Matters** Small and medium-sized businesses are crucial to Connecticut’s health and well-being. They are job creators and taxpayers — without them, our state cannot prosper.
Big businesses can afford new taxes and new regulations; when they can’t, they hire expensive lobbyists to fight their battles. None of this is true for small and medium-sized businesses — the backbone of our communities. Where do they turn? **At Yankee Institute, we have long fought to give a voice to the voiceless in Connecticut. And that means not just individuals but the small and medium-sized businesses that make our economy work.** Yankee Institute’s common sense solutions drive positive legislative results, backed by a principled commitment to free enterprise. But it takes all of us to “Let Connecticut Work!” Come meet other Connecticut businesspeople and policymakers. Be part of a community uniting to make our state a more vibrant place for businesses. This is your chance to be heard!
**Lets Support Yankee Institute and their great work!**
**SEE YOU THURSDAY**
| [Register for the Conference ](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=0a1f64bf9a&e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| [Register for the Conference ](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=22c6dfe3ac&e=8763c56857)
---
|
---

###
2WINCT is partnered with Freedom Project USA to build a coalition of conservatives across Connecticut. We are committed to Constitutional principles that will reflect in our mission of recruiting and developing strong, conservative candidates; identifying and fighting for key issues that impinge on our freedoms; and to create branding and messaging programs that illustrate our values as citizens of Connecticut.
Founded in 2019, Freedom Project USA’s mission is to defend liberty and free market principles. We advocate, involve, and educate lawmakers, job creators, and the American public about free market principles, personal responsibility, and economic freedom to allow everyone equal opportunity to pursue success.
###

subject: To: President Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
show your thanks
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53764?t=6&akid=10814%2E878179%2EqiefHE) We can’t believe how much Biden has done for our country, so we’re sending him a HUGE card to thank him for his hard work!

[**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53764?t=7&akid=10814%2E878179%2EqiefHE) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53764?t=8&akid=10814%2E878179%2EqiefHE)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I’m so grateful.

**Dear President Biden,

I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!

**Despite MAGA turmoil, over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs for the people.**

I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, but it is always the right thing to do.

So as the 2024 race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country!

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53764?t=9&akid=10814%2E878179%2EqiefHE)** | [SPACE RUNNING OUT: Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53764?t=10&akid=10814%2E878179%2EqiefHE)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10814%2E878179%2EqiefHE). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10814%2E878179%2EqiefHE).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=10814%2E878179%2EqiefHE) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=10814%2E878179%2EqiefHE). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=10814%2E878179%2EqiefHE)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=10814%2E878179%2EqiefHE)

Ever since I broke the news to my supporters, I've been shaking in my boots because this fundraising push was supposed to obliterate every fundraising worry this campaign's had for months, and contributions have just totally undermined our expectations.

Ever since I broke the news to my supporters, I've been shaking in my boots because this fundraising push was supposed to obliterate every fundraising worry this campaign's had for months, and contributions have just totally undermined our expectations. I 'm going to make this short, the data folks have crunched the numbers and we need at least 300 more contributions by MIDNIGHT to reach our projections. | Best, John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. Peter,
October is Breast Cancer Awareness Month. 1 in 8 women will have breast cancer in their lifetime. Each year 240,000 women are diagnosed with breast cancer. Tragically, every year 42,000 women will die from breast cancer.
*
In
2019,
people
paid
higher
out-of-pocket
costs
for
breast
cancer
care
than
they
did
for
any

cancer
care
—
a
total
of
$3.14
billion
[https://www.breastcancer.org/managing-life/covering-cost-of-care/cost-of-care-report]
.

[https://www.breastcancer.org/managing-life/covering-cost-of-care/cost-of-care-report]
.

Freedom Virginia is committed to fighting for more affordable access to medical treatment, prescription drugs, and more. Anyone suffering from illness should be able to get life saving treatments, no matter the cost.

clean_body: [] Peter, October is Breast Cancer Awareness Month. 1 in 8 women will have breast cancer in their lifetime. Each year 240,000 women are diagnosed with breast cancer. Tragically, every year 42,000 women will die from breast cancer. In 2019, people paid higher out-of-pocket costs for breast cancer care than they did for any other type of cancer care — a total of $3.14 billion [] . People who are diagnosed with breast cancer at a younger age, who have no health insurance, who have a lower income, or who are Black or Hispanic are among those most likely to experience financial hardship [] . A majority of cancer patients and survivors find it difficult to afford care, and 37% say it is difficult to pay [] for the prescription drugs and treatments associated with their care. Cancer patients and survivors face treatment obstacles due to costs as well as coverage issues. 60% have taken steps to reduce costs [] and nearly half have faced delays or difficulties accessing their prescribed medication or treatment for insurance-related reasons. Freedom Virginia is committed to fighting for more affordable access to medical treatment, prescription drugs, and more. Anyone suffering from illness should be able to get life saving treatments, no matter the cost. Join us this month of October in pledging to keep prescription drug costs low. [] Sign the pledge here [] Thank you for your support, Freedom Virginia [] [] [] Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc. subject: Capitol Report October 1, 2023

body:
Higher court considers challenge to law targeting homelessness | | | |
---
| | |
# Capitol Report
October 1, 2023
---
|
---
| **Higher court considers challenge to law targeting homelessness** Attorneys for a Springfield homeless shelter urged the Missouri Supreme Court on Sept. 27 to strike down a state law criminalizing camping or sleeping on state property and imposing other regulations on the homeless, citing procedural flaws in its passage. The court will issue a ruling at a later date.

As originally filed in the 2022 legislative session, House Bill 1606 was limited to tweaking laws governing county financial statements. By the time of its final passage, lawmakers expanded it to about 20 different provisions loosely relating to “political subdivisions.”

In arguments before the Supreme Court, attorneys for The Gathering Tree and other advocates for the homeless said HB 1606 violates state constitutional provisions requiring legislation to be limited to a single subject that’s clearly reflected in a bill’s title and isn’t changed from its original purpose. They argued the homeless restrictions have nothing to do with the bill’s original purpose of county financial statements or its other provisions, including adjusting county coroners’ salaries, prohibiting mandatory COVID-19 vaccinations for public workers and exempting the upcoming World Cup soccer games in Kansas City from sales taxes. A Cole County judge had previously sided with the state and ruled HB 1606 is constitutionally valid.

The Republican-controlled General Assembly enacted HB 1606 over the objections of groups that work with the homeless, who predicted it would cause more hardships for homeless people without alleviating the problem. In addition to making it a Class C misdemeanor punishable by up to 15 days in jail and a $750 fine to sleep or camp on state-owned property, the bill also requires cities to use state funding for homeless programs for temporary camps instead of permanent housing. It also calls for denying state funding to cities with homelessness rates higher than the state average, thus stripping resources from communities with the greatest need.

After the bill’s passage, Missouri Department of Mental Health Director Valerie Huhn wrote to Gov. Mike Parson warning him of the concerns with HB 1606, but Parson, a Republican, signed it into law anyway. The case is _Jonathan Byrd, et al., v. State of Missouri_
---
|
---
| **Judge rewrites ballot language for abortion rights initiative** A Cole County judge on Sept. 25 rewrote the official ballot language for initiative petitions seeking to enshrine abortion rights in the Missouri Constitution, blocking Republican Secretary of State Jay Aschroft’s attempt to falsely portray the effort as allowing “dangerous, unregulated, and unrestricted abortions from conception to live birth,” among other deceptive descriptions.

In a separate but related ruling issued the same day, the judge also rejected efforts by two Republican lawmakers to drastically inflate the proposals’ official cost estimates. Both cases are expected to be appealed the Missouri Court of Appeals Western District and ultimately go to the state Supreme Court for final adjudication.

In response to the U.S. Supreme Court’s rightwing majority eliminating the federal right to abortion last year, advocates of reproductive rights are seeking to amend the state constitution to restore the right in Missouri. The advocates initially filed 11 different versions of their proposed constitutional amendment but later narrowed it down to six for the purpose of challenging Ashcroft’s deceptive ballot language. Only one version will be circulated for signatures once the litigation surrounding the matter is settled.

Circuit Judge Jon Beetem, also a Republican, found 13 separate phrases representing about three-fourths of Ashcroft’s ballot language to be “problematic in that they are either argumentative or do not fairly describe the purposes or probable effect of the initiative.”

Beetem’s replacement ballot language for all six versions begins by stating the measures would “establish a right to make decisions about reproductive health care, including abortion and contraceptives, with any governmental interference of that right presumed invalid.”

The second case, brought by state Sen. Mary Elizabeth Coleman, R-Arnold, and state Rep. Hannah Kelly, R-Mountain Grove, challenged the fiscal estimates prepared for the measures by State Treasurer Scott Fitzpatrick. Fitzpatrick, also a Republican, concluded they would result in no increased expenses for state agencies and a minimal cost increase for local governments.

Coleman and Kelly wanted the estimates rewritten to falsely claim the measures would cost the state in excess of $12 billion a year in lost revenue. Beetem ruled the lawmakers failed to meet their burden of proving Fitzpatrick’s estimates are insufficient or unfair and that the evidence supported the auditor’s conclusions.

The ballot language case is _Dr. Anna Fitz-James v. John R. Ashcroft_ ; the fiscal estimate case is _Hannah Kelly, et al., v. Scott Fitzpatrick, et al._
---
|
---
| **2023 SENATE BILLS**
[_**SB 63**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=6a8b02ccd9&e=a088917f89) \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions

[_**SB 64**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=5ccf677a6a&e=a088917f89) \- Enacts new law relating to wage range inquiries by employees and prospective employees

[**SB 65**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=152d65b30d&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons

[_**SB 145**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=72f157056d&e=a088917f89) \- Creates certificates of exemplary conduct and good moral character issued by circuit courts

[_**SB 146**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=2978c63f19&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to compensation for wrongful convictions

[_**SB 147**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=4a654f9d4f&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility

[_**SB 215**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=42f3d31efc&e=a088917f89) \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution

[**_SB 216_**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=f6481c89b8&e=a088917f89) \- Designates "James W Brooks Memorial Highway" in St. Louis City and St. Louis County

**[_SB 217_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=65ce207ea5&e=a088917f89) **\- Creates the offense of unlawful possession by a minor

[_**SB 270**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=cb505a03dc&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines

[**SB 363**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=d84109f1e1&e=a088917f89) \- Specifies that the St. Louis City school board shall fill any vacancy that occurs in such school board outside of the normal election cycle

[_**SJR 21**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=f5f4e120ec&e=a088917f89) \- Authorizes counties to freeze the real property assessed values of certain senior citizens

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=6237cc732a&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.
---
|
