| **SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES** Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit [Safe Connections](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=610b143678&e=a088917f89) or call _314-531-2003_.

You can also contact [ALIVE](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=d1ba7242c4&e=a088917f89) at _314-993-2777_.

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|
---
| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=d5e9d0c2ed&e=a088917f89).

clean_body: Higher court considers challenge to law targeting homelessness | | | | | | | Capitol Report October 1, 2023 | | Higher court considers challenge to law targeting homelessness Attorneys for a Springfield homeless shelter urged the Missouri Supreme Court on Sept. 27 to strike down a state law criminalizing camping or sleeping on state property and imposing other regulations on the homeless, citing procedural flaws in its passage. The court will issue a ruling at a later date. As originally filed in the 2022 legislative session, House Bill 1606 was limited to tweaking laws governing county financial statements. By the time of its final passage, lawmakers expanded it to about 20 different provisions loosely relating to “political subdivisions.” In arguments before the Supreme Court, attorneys for The Gathering Tree and other advocates for the homeless said HB 1606 violates state constitutional provisions requiring legislation to be limited to a single subject that’s clearly reflected in a bill’s title and isn’t changed from its original purpose. They argued the homeless restrictions have nothing to do with the bill’s original purpose of county financial statements or its other provisions, including adjusting county coroners’ salaries, prohibiting mandatory COVID-19 vaccinations for public workers and exempting the upcoming World Cup soccer games in Kansas City from sales taxes. A Cole County judge had previously sided with the state and ruled HB 1606 is constitutionally valid. The Republican-controlled General Assembly enacted HB 1606 over the objections of groups that work with the homeless, who predicted it would cause more hardships for homeless people without alleviating the problem. In addition to making it a Class C misdemeanor punishable by up to 15 days in jail and a $750 fine to sleep or camp on state-owned property, the bill also requires cities to use state funding for homeless programs for temporary camps instead of permanent housing. It also calls for denying state funding to cities with homelessness rates higher than the state average, thus stripping resources from communities with the greatest need. After the bill’s passage, Missouri Department of Mental Health Director Valerie Huhn wrote to Gov. Mike Parson warning him of the concerns with HB 1606, but Parson, a Republican, signed it into law anyway. The case is Jonathan Byrd, et al., v. State of Missouri | | Judge rewrites ballot language for abortion rights initiative A Cole County judge on Sept. 25 rewrote the official ballot language for initiative petitions seeking to enshrine abortion rights in the Missouri Constitution, blocking Republican Secretary of State Jay Aschroft’s attempt to falsely portray the effort as allowing “dangerous, unregulated, and unrestricted abortions from conception to live birth,” among other deceptive descriptions. In a separate but related ruling issued the same day, the judge also rejected efforts by two Republican lawmakers to drastically inflate the proposals’ official cost estimates. Both cases are expected to be appealed the Missouri Court of Appeals Western District and ultimately go to the state Supreme Court for final adjudication. In response to the U.S. Supreme Court’s rightwing majority eliminating the federal right to abortion last year, advocates of reproductive rights are seeking to amend the state constitution to restore the right in Missouri. The advocates initially filed 11 different versions of their proposed constitutional amendment but later narrowed it down to six for the purpose of challenging Ashcroft’s deceptive ballot language. Only one version will be circulated for signatures once the litigation surrounding the matter is settled. Circuit Judge Jon Beetem, also a Republican, found 13 separate phrases representing about three-fourths of Ashcroft’s ballot language to be “problematic in that they are either argumentative or do not fairly describe the purposes or probable effect of the initiative.” Beetem’s replacement ballot language for all six versions begins by stating the measures would “establish a right to make decisions about reproductive health care, including abortion and contraceptives, with any governmental interference of that right presumed invalid.” The second case, brought by state Sen. Mary Elizabeth Coleman, R-Arnold, and state Rep. Hannah Kelly, R-Mountain Grove, challenged the fiscal estimates prepared for the measures by State Treasurer Scott Fitzpatrick. Fitzpatrick, also a Republican, concluded they would result in no increased expenses for state agencies and a minimal cost increase for local governments. Coleman and Kelly wanted the estimates rewritten to falsely claim the measures would cost the state in excess of $12 billion a year in lost revenue. Beetem ruled the lawmakers failed to meet their burden of proving Fitzpatrick’s estimates are insufficient or unfair and that the evidence supported the auditor’s conclusions. The ballot language case is Dr. Anna Fitz-James v. John R. Ashcroft ; the fiscal estimate case is Hannah Kelly, et al., v. Scott Fitzpatrick, et al. | | 2023 SENATE BILLS \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions \- Enacts new law relating to wage range inquiries by employees and prospective employees \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons \- Creates certificates of exemplary conduct and good moral character issued by circuit courts \- Creates provisions relating to compensation for wrongful convictions \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution \- Designates "James W Brooks Memorial Highway" in St. Louis City and St. Louis County \- Creates the offense of unlawful possession by a minor \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines \- Specifies that the St. Louis City school board shall fill any vacancy that occurs in such school board outside of the normal election cycle \- Authorizes counties to freeze the real property assessed values of certain senior citizens | | "Signed By Governor" | "Truly Agreed Bills" | | | | | HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19). SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing. Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and . | _**"I'm just a bill on Capitol Hill"**_
Remember the Schoolhouse Rock song _I'm Just a Bill_?

If not, watch the fun 3-minute video here:
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OgVKvqTItto](https://arwlv.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b591f4023583355f43a683ac&id=ad3fd2458f&e=23eca40478).

Our Government Affairs Attorneys are going to get a little more in depth than little Bill in the Schoolhouse Rock. But we are hoping it will be just as fun! Join us to learn about the 2023 Nevada Legislative session, have fun with your fellow Republicans, win prizes, and enjoy a great dinner.
_**Get your ticket now!**_

# **REMINDER
OCTOBER MONTHLY MEETING**
**Tuesday, October 10th, 2023
5:30 PM - 8:00 PM
Red Rock Country Club** The Active Republican Women of Las Vegas (ARW) invites you to our October monthly meeting.

Did you have a chance to stay up to date with all the new legislation in Nevada from the 2023 session? If not, no worries! ARW will have two expert Government Affairs Attorneys that were in Carson City during the legislative session provide us with a summary. Don't miss out on all the key updates!

Not only are they going to get us caught up on all the legislative updates, they will also explain the process and how we can get involved to support or oppose legislation in the future. **_Get your ticket now!_**
---

Wednesday, November 15th, 2023
_Invites will be sent soon!_

name: Katie Porter
subject: Just an email to say thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
More than 15,000 people chipped in over the past week.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=30636%2E3422442%2EpHBJSE)
Team, thank you so much for helping us reach our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. Time and time again, I’m so proud to prove that we don’t need corporate PACs and federal lobbyists to meet these goals and power our campaign.
In the past week alone, more than 15,000 people stepped up and joined our team. That’s an incredible number, and I don’t take a single contribution for granted.
Onward to Election Day,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAM01_1_TY_20231001_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=30636_3422442_pHBJSE&akid=30636%2E3422442%2EpHBJSE)**

body:

# [Sign: "Happy 99th birthday, President Carter!" (Today!) >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c833a07-c314-46cf-8d85-215684be9285/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Today is President Jimmy Carter's 99th birthday! This is a huge milestone for an incredible person and we'd like him know how much we appreciate him! 20,000 people have already send messages, and more are coming in. You can read them and add your own (if you haven't already) right here: [**Add your message to President Carter's birthday card >> **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d08894e-6a2b-454d-bc37-80daec8ddd75/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) President Carter dedicated his life to serving our country and combating injustice. He has worked tirelessly to better the lives of others around the world. We think he deserves a wonderful birthday celebration, complete with a card full of signatures from across the country. [**Sign your name to wish President Carter a happy 99th birthday >> **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2a74fe7-fde3-45c8-8d3c-166ce0876e72/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Maya C. (Fair Fight)
subject: Three reasons I’m reaching out:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
Whether you’ve spoken out for pro-democracy laws and against voter suppression, or chipped in when you can, I want to thank you. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70745546/430266878/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231001_f_ty_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNhMWFiZS03ZTYwLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XkfkbZIZyUdxfzYC9gEXJQfOu_cOTlUAlucxNtXaqwA=&emci=e90ef748-dc5e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=b2ca1abe-7e60-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | Hey, It’s Maya — the new Deputy Executive Director of Fair Fight. I’m reaching out today for a few reasons:
1. I want to introduce myself (hi! 👋),
2. I want to thank you for all your support, and
3. I want to give you an update on our election work.

I’m new to this role, but I’ve been on the Fair Fight team for the past year and a half. The work of protecting and expanding the freedom to vote is deeply important to me and my family, because some people who look like us — and who speak primarily Spanish — were effectively blocked from voting until 1975. It wasn’t until then (only two years before I was born!) that the Voting Rights Act was amended to protect language minorities. Dismantling that kind of disenfranchisement is the work of generations, and I’m honored to be a part of it. In my time at Fair Fight, I’ve seen firsthand how powerful it is when supporters like you come together to help make elections freer and fairer. Whether you’ve spoken out for pro-democracy laws and against voter suppression, or chipped in when you can, I want to thank you. **This pro-voter movement is stronger because of you.** Now, I also want to lay out exactly what’s at stake in the upcoming 2023 and 2024 election cycles and what Fair Fight’s doing to prepare. In this November’s state and local elections, voters have a say in a whole slate of issues that directly impact our families and our communities. And in next year’s election cycle, voters across the country will cast their ballots for our next president. Less than six months from now, Georgians will be voting in the presidential primary election. And one year from now, they’ll be preparing to vote in the general election. There’s a lot of uncertainty about how next year’s election cycle will go, but what we know to be true is this: **Georgia will be a key swing state, and Peach State voters could determine the outcome of the presidential election.** So right now, the Fair Fight team is putting the pedal to the metal to elect pro-democracy candidates up and down the ballot and guarantee that eligible voters can access the ballot box. I’m grateful for supporters like you who will be there every step of the way, making our voter education and mobilization efforts possible. Stay tuned for future updates! Thanks, Maya
she/her/ella
Deputy Executive Director, Fair Fight P.S. — If you’re determined to protect free and fair elections, and if it makes sense for you today, please consider making a contribution to Fair Fight: | _[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70745547/430266882/1358700588?amount=20}&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231001_f_ty_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNhMWFiZS03ZTYwLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XkfkbZIZyUdxfzYC9gEXJQfOu_cOTlUAlucxNtXaqwA=)_

name: Wesley Bell
subject: Where we landed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
I appreciate your support. I just got a final end-of-quarter update from my finance team and Peter: Thank you.

Hitting our $50,000 FEC end-of-quarter goal is only the beginning. The race to defeat Josh Hawley won’t be easy, but with your support, it is possible. I say it to my team all the time, “nobody runs for office alone,” and your continued support of this grassroots campaign is the reason why.

**Your belief in our cause inspires me to fight tirelessly for our shared values and aspirations. Without supporters like you, change wouldn't be possible.**

Thank you,

Wesley Bell

clean_body: I appreciate your support. I just got a final end-of-quarter update from my finance team and Peter: Thank you. Hitting our $50,000 FEC end-of-quarter goal is only the beginning. The race to defeat Josh Hawley won’t be easy, but with your support, it is possible. I say it to my team all the time, “nobody runs for office alone,” and your continued support of this grassroots campaign is the reason why. Your belief in our cause inspires me to fight tirelessly for our shared values and aspirations. Without supporters like you, change wouldn't be possible. Thank you, Wesley Bell | = = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI 7253 WATSON RD #1115, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
From the bottom of my heart

| Y’all – there is nothing more humbling than having other people put their faith in you. I’ve felt that more than ever since we launched our campaign for U.S. Senate. Over the past month, I’ve had to ask so much of you — including for your financial support. Thousands of folks have stepped up. I’m not courting deep-pocketed corporate lobbyists here — our grassroots team is made up of everyday people like you. I know that many of us have to consider carefully where our money goes. Earning your support means even more to me because of it. I’ll have more to ask of you before this campaign is over, y’all. I won’t deny it. But right now, I just want to say thank you. I couldn’t do this without you. And I’m so glad to know you’re in the fight with me. All my best, Gloria
---
Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
---
Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible.
Gloria for Tennessee
73 White Bridge Rd #103-353
Nashville, TN 37205

Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives. Please, consider making a . Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a. to request fewer emails. Click here to . | |

subject: Youngkin’s up to something…
body:
We can’t let Gov. Youngkin and extreme Republicans gain any more power. Will you step up to help elect state Democrats in 49 days and beyond? | | |
---
| | **Virginia’s Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin:**
Tried to restrict access to the ballot box.
Proposed a budget that gives the ultra-wealthy massive tax handouts.
Pushed an _extreme_ abortion ban that threatens doctors with jail time.
Backed numerous bills targeting the LGBTQ+ community.
Raised nearly **_$19 million_** this cycle from right-wing donors.

**This is the Governor of battleground Virginia.**
* * *
You’ve heard about this November’s competitive elections in Virginia, but we can’t stress enough how important they really are. The people of the commonwealth have lived under Gov. Youngkin’s extreme agenda for far too long, but in just 37 days, we finally have a chance to turn things around. **The truth is:** Glenn Youngkin’s despicable agenda will be the reality for the next two years if we don’t reclaim the House and defend our Senate majority. We’re only _three seats away_ from flipping the state House – it’s within arms reach! [Losing in Virginia means handing Republicans even more power to pass anti-democratic legislation and potentially roll back recent voting rights advancements. clean_body: We can’t let Gov. Youngkin and extreme Republicans gain any more power. Will you step up to help elect state Democrats in 49 days and beyond? | | | | | Virginia’s Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin: Tried to restrict access to the ballot box. Proposed a budget that gives the ultra-wealthy massive tax handouts. Pushed an extreme abortion ban that threatens doctors with jail time. Backed numerous bills targeting the LGBTQ+ community. Raised nearly $19 million this cycle from right-wing donors. This is the Governor of battleground Virginia. You’ve heard about this November’s competitive elections in Virginia, but we can’t stress enough how important they really are. The people of the commonwealth have lived under Gov. Youngkin’s extreme agenda for far too long, but in just 37 days, we finally have a chance to turn things around. The truth is: Glenn Youngkin’s despicable agenda will be the reality for the next two years if we don’t reclaim the House and defend our Senate majority. We’re only three seats away from flipping the state House – it’s within arms reach! | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | With the help of grassroots donations last year, we were able to flip four chambers and expand Democratic power in ultra-competitive states. Now we have a chance to flip the Virginia House and defend our critical Senate majority, but it all relies on the support we build right now. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Kicking and screaming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
People will get paychecks and MTG threw a tantrum on the way out. Win-win.
#
This is a major win for the American people.
We avoided the government shutdown that otherwise would have started today.
More Democrats voted to keep the Government open in the House than Republicans, despite the fact that Republicans hold the majority. We dragged the Republican Party kicking and screaming across the finish line to keep the Government open to fund schools and pay servicemembers.
**This near shut down reinforced that there are no moderates in the Republican Party.** There are just different degrees of fealty to Donald Trump. Republicans ran around the House floor like a 🤖roomba🤖 until they found a door that Democrats opened to avoid this shutdown.
Alexandria will always call out Republicans for their chaos and destruction and fight for the policies that our country needs.
[Will you rush a $5 contribution right now to support our movement for progressive change and help Alexandria continue to hold the Republican Party accountable to their actions? Every single contribution will send a powerful message that our movement is stronger than their chaos.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231001.Vn1KjZ&refcode=em20231001-5084-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5084%2E2526796%2ExCaIVg)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231001.Vn1KjZ&refcode=em20231001-5084-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=5084%2E2526796%2ExCaIVg)**
Thank you for being a part of this movement,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20231001?refcode=em20231001-5084-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=21&refcode2=5084_2526796_xCaIVg&akid=5084%2E2526796%2ExCaIVg)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20231001-5084-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=22&akid=5084%2E2526796%2ExCaIVg)**

name: Ronna McDaniel
subject: This is only for YOU, Peter

name: Matthew Lucci
subject: Announcing the Take Our Country Back Tour
body:
Hi!

If this is your first time reading the weekly Lucci Letter, welcome! It’s
great to have you on the team as we campaign to Take Our Country Back in
Texas’ 25th US Congressional District. I'd love to hear from you, so hit
"reply" and let me know what's on your mind!

My wife and I visited with the Bluff Dale Conservatives on Tuesday. I
highlighted the importance of securing our border, fighting the fentanyl
crisis, and electing America-First conservatives up and down the ballot. As
promised, I stayed to answer questions until they turned the lights out.
[image: Bluff Dale 1.PNG]
Speaking with Friends at Bluff Dale Conservatives

On Wednesday, we hosted a watch party in Burleson for the 2nd Presidential
Debate. In spite of some technical difficulties, we had a good crowd of
eager conservatives join us for dinner and a conversation with Dr. Ben Voth
<https://benvoth.com/>, a world-champion debate coach from SMU. Thank you
to everyone who came out to show support!
[image: e04c0129f5ff4de1aaf0e9968f0bf8a9.jpeg]
Debate Watch Party with Dr. Ben Voth

Like I mentioned last week, multiple organizations have offered to host a
debate between Roger and I. We’ve reached out to him, and spoken with his
team when they come to our events, but Roger Williams refuses to engage in
a debate on the issues that matter to us in TX-25. After 12 years in
Congress, maybe he thinks he’s too good for us. It’s time that we elect a
new representative and Take Our Country Back from elitist career
politicians.

We just entered a new fundraising period, so we’re about to ramp up our
fundraising efforts this quarter. Our goal is $138,000 for this quarter,
which includes literature for door-knocking and yard signs for voters to
show their support. We could really use your help to get there. Could you chip
in $25 <https://secure.winred.com/lucci-for-congress/donate-today>to help
us connect with voters and Take Our Country Back?

Next week, we’ll be kicking off our Take Our Country Back Tour. I’ll be
spending 12 days crisscrossing the district, visiting voters in all 13
counties and over 30 towns in Texas’ 25th Congressional District. My team
and I will be stopping at events and businesses every day.

If there’s an event that you think I should attend or if you’d like to host
a meet and greet with some friends, just reply and let me know! We’re
building the schedule and trying to meet with as many conservatives,
grassroots leaders, and Republican voters as we can.

[image: Fundraising Letter 1.png]
You're invited to our October 17th fundraiser!

Thank you for not just supporting this campaign, but standing up for the
future of our country.

God Bless You!
[image: Matthew Lucci Signature.png]

*PS- If you'd like to unsubscribe, just reply and let me know.*

--
*--*
*Matthew Lucci for Congress TX-25*
LucciForTexas@gmail.com

name: Team Casey
subject: We just wanted to say thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=813%2E552475%2EKc1AcQ)
Peter,
We know you've heard from us a lot over the past week, and we wanted to quickly say -- **_thank you._**
Bob Casey is in the U.S. Senate fighting for working families across our Commonwealth. It's thanks to grassroots supporters like you that he's able to stand up for Pennsylvanians every day.
Whether he's working to lower health care costs for seniors, defend our right to collectively bargain, take on China to protect American workers and jobs, or ensure Pennsylvanians have access to Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security -- Bob has spent his life fighting against the ultra-wealthy and special interests that threaten Pennsylvania's hardworking people.
**The bottom line is, Bob won't back down from any fight for communities across our Commonwealth.** There's so much on the line for Pennsylvania's families, and Bob is ready to keep delivering results for Pennsylvania in the Senate.
But with all eyes on Pennsylvania as a must-win battleground for Democrats to hold both the White House AND the Senate majority in 2024, Bob is gearing up for the toughest re-election fight of his career.
With your support, we'll keep Bob fighting for working families and protect PA's Senate seat.
So Peter, thanks again. We're glad you're a part of our team.
-- Team Casey
P.S. We have a tough road ahead, **[so if you can chip in to our campaign to help us get a head start on our October fundraising goal, thank you!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231001-1?refcode=em20231001-1&refcode2=813_552475_Kc1AcQ&akid=813%2E552475%2EKc1AcQ)**

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=813%2E552475%2EKc1AcQ)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=813%2E552475%2EKc1AcQ)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Endangered monarch caterpillars are losing their only food source
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025153?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | This is **HORRIFYING** , Friend, and we’re not talking about the spooky season. Bayer-Monsanto is _**DECEIVING**_ their customers and **selling them LIES!** Roundup, the notorious weedkiller, is a **TOXIC** pesticide that has undisclosed risks for both pollinators and people. Here’s the rundown: the main ingredient in Roundup is called **glyphosate** , and it is dangerous to our beloved monarch butterflies. The toxic chemical is _decimating_ baby monarch caterpillars’ only food source-- _**milkweed.**_ Without proper nourishment, hungry monarch caterpillars will die of **STARVATION**. Friend, monarch butterflies are **_already endangered_** which means they do not have much time left. Their populations are PLUMMETING -- with some estimates showing population **_declines of up to 95%_** since the 1990’s. Bayer-Monsanto knows the danger that lies in this toxic pesticide and even **_MANIPULATED_** science to keep Roundup stocked and selling. [**_Will you allow this greedy megacorporation to continue misleading consumers and putting our precious pollinators at risk? Add your name to our petition >>_**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025154?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025155?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Monarch butterflies are not the only ones at risk-- _**we are, too!**_ Glyphosate has been linked to severe health concerns, like _**hormone disruption, shortened pregnancy and even cancer**_ \-- with children being the most AT RISK!
The threat of glyphosate can go _beyond_ consumers of Roundup. As you read this, the harmful substance is being sprayed on lawns, gardens, and parks. While families are gathering in backyards for celebrations, children are playing outdoors on swing sets, and gardeners are caring for their vibrant flowerbeds—they are being _**EXPOSED**_ to this toxic chemical.
_**So why is Bayer-Monsanto still producing and distributing an unsafe product?**_ We’re asking environmentalists like you to DEMAND an end to their deception and reckless conduct. [**_Please, Friend, consumers deserve honest and safe products that do not put helpless pollinators and people at risk. Sign the petition before 11:59pm TONIGHT to STOP Bayer-Monsanto from selling toxic Roundup immediately!_**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025156?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2025155?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for protecting pollinators, people, and the planet.
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: I'm blown away
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This team stepped up for our first end-of-quarter. Thank you.
Team—our first quarter of the campaign is in the books, and let me tell you, I am blown away.

Not only did we hit our ambitious $100,000 goal—we surpassed it. In the first three months of this must-win campaign, thousands of folks stepped up to retake our House majority next November.

When our fundraising numbers are made public for the first time in just a few days, everyone will be able to see that this grassroots team has what it takes to defeat Mike Lawler and his MAGA Republican allies in Congress.

Team, I’m so honored to have your support in this critical fight. While Lawler is counting on corporate PACs to power this campaign, I’m proud to be powered by the people.

So, thank you once again for coming through. I'm as committed as ever to flipping NY-17, retaking our House majority, and making progress for everyday people in the lower Hudson Valley.

Yours,

Mondaire
| Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. name: Clara Gaitan
subject: Friend: My police officer son is facing 99 years in prison...
body:
[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8jz1PwzAQQH_NeWtkn7_qwQNQGaEKJgZgc2KbGtlNmrSNyq9HDYX17undO1-HktPFgr4HxF0OEyACvwPEw_tcx9NX3T6uapCrg3qp8rrEB0A8Xob4T94kTaw-l-tUb0iwXvkUA4mWKaOY0RoF2dkWpdAqpRYZ40mwwMNahbY1ax2oCJRkixQ5o5QhUiZNo6QyBiOnqkuJthEEXQ41ns1-HPu-Nl1fSbG743GYliIH6Oaxb_anrsTT9It3fQV0t1ZAdwZ039vXOezleZLA3fI936CKT28f22cy2jDMuZQ8KQ2Cfv5ZfgIAAP__Ljhc8A) | [Unsubscribe](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8kMFOwzAQRL9mc2tkjxO7PvgAVEGogjNwSx2HGtl1aieK-veopXCdHb19mj5OwY8XQ-qRgKMfCgEkHgg4f6wxL99x_7yJQ7s5y7fYXo94ImC-TO6_eYfULvY-XFO1qwbTy350Q-UMl1pyrRSa6mjahgtA8EbocWzglNJKDU5u-dZaBVTegEFwxjjAeKtr2Uqt4QSTdhzZwVHDbo_qnq99zinF2qZYBXOc56ncjDpCt-ZUnxYb3FJ-6zZFQnd3JXRlORSb_TT7dCqEbjndk4Mj0d2mEDtI9_L-uX-tshmm1Yfgi1TUsK8_5E8AAAD__8SIYiU)
| | | [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j72OnjAQRZ9m6IzsMRhcUCRBpIiUPtXKP-P9HGFgjRHZt48gKO2ZM3PnmrTNMXwO0H0FxFf0OyCC_AKIH7_OlI_f6cd3lnzLPtTP1F5D_AaI5XOj_-ZzpKZk4nzRbqz8YJQJ5CsahNJK6K7DpnoNAVVve9e50FvRBtlgL0hb3-tgvQhdFQfkKAXnApGLVteqVVojSa5cCNwSNPwOqo04Tc7rmmq3pmoeXqVs-_3RBDjt5I5MtVnIr-UyAKfFbR5w8pYV9IwSaxSjPwXktK9HdvTmVk8gR2_ZpTJKjbKMCw2ojpLe_lkgx8XND0rk45FAjjY_xJm0mfi-gByLxyuCc2R3IY7ykQrla-nMTZUHv51xnuOuOmj4-93NrelvAAAA__9HjX19)
---
| | Friend, My name is Clara Gaitan, and I was so proud of my son Alex when he graduated from the police academy. But our dream of Alex serving as a police officer has become our family’s nightmare. **_Alex is facing 99 years in prison for catching a dangerous criminal!_** As a mother, I’m beside myself. You won’t believe how this miscarriage of justice came about. Back in March 2021, Alex was dispatched for an unknown urgent call for service. When Alex arrived at the address, he recognized he’d been there before on previous calls. The first time Alex had been there, he had to fight an inhumanly strong young man who was a drug user. Even with two other officers, it was nearly impossible to subdue the suspect. Only a non-lethal Taser worked, but not before the suspect injured an officer. However, on this day, **THREE** other officers had been dispatched to the scene, so they had a better chance of subduing the suspect. When Alex caught up with his fellow officers, he saw all three officers on the ground, struggling to bring the suspect under control. Alex told him to stop resisting, then grabbed his upper torso and put him on the ground. **Even on the ground with****FOUR AGAINST ONE****, the suspect had inhuman strength, as if he were on drugs.** Alex knew the suspect’s pain tolerance was so high that fist strikes would not work and could injure Alex. So Alex followed his training and used his police-issued baton to get the suspect to comply and lie fully on the ground. While on the ground, the suspect continued to resist the officers and their attempts to get him in handcuffs. So Alex decided to use his non-lethal Taser to get the suspect’s compliance. The Taser deployment worked, and the suspect stopped resisting the police officers. The danger was over, and Alex would come home that night. The possibility of your loved one not surviving their shift is a reality that every police family lives with, especially today when criminals are willing to fight officers. So we thought that was the end of it... **_but we were wrong._** Almost two years later, the local anti-cop, socialist District Attorney dropped a bombshell and indicted Alex for aggravated assault... ...even though it was the suspect who resisted arrest and decided it was a good idea to fight four police officers. Alex could be imprisoned for up to **99 years** if convicted. **_That’s outrageous!_** The good news is Alex has the moral support of his department, his Chief of Police, and hundreds of his Brothers and Sisters in Blue across the country. But, Friend, as you well know, cops don’t get paid a ton for the sacrifices they make and the dangers they put themselves in to keep us all safe. As a result of these attacks on my son, we’re facing a mountain of legal bills that could bury us — and send Alex to prison for up to 99 years! So when Jim Fotis and the National Center for Police Defense (NCPD), a 501(c)3 non-profit charity, offered to help us, it was like God was answering our prayers.
---
[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j72OnjAQRZ9m6IzsMRhcUCRBpIiUPtXKP-P9HGFgjRHZt48gKO2ZM3PnmrTNMXwO0H0FxFf0OyCC_AKIH7_OlI_f6cd3lnzLPtTP1F5D_AaI5XOj_-ZzpKZk4nzRbqz8YJQJ5CsahNJK6K7DpnoNAVVve9e50FvRBtlgL0hb3-tgvQhdFQfkKAXnApGLVteqVVojSa5cCNwSNPwOqo04Tc7rmmq3pmoeXqVs-_3RBDjt5I5MtVnIr-UyAKfFbR5w8pYV9IwSaxSjPwXktK9HdvTmVk8gR2_ZpTJKjbKMCw2ojpLe_lkgx8XND0rk45FAjjY_xJm0mfi-gByLxyuCc2R3IY7ykQrla-nMTZUHv51xnuOuOmj4-93NrelvAAAA__9HjX19)
---
Founded by Jim Fotis, an Army veteran and retired police officer from New York, the NCPD has been instrumental in taking the lead to stand up for police officers Sheriff Joe Arpaio (“America’s Toughest Sheriff”), Tulsa’s Police Officer Betty Shelby, New York Cops Anthony Federico and Hugh Barry Jr., Michigan’s Mark Bessner, and many more. The NCPD is a 100% hard-hitting organization of police officers (retired and active) and defense attorneys who know what Alex has been through and what it takes to see his case to victory. Friend, now that you know that Alex is being railroaded for safely subduing a dangerous suspect, let me ask you point blank: **[Will you help Alex today by making a tax-deductible gift of $10, $15, $20, $25 or more to the NCPD to help them fund Alex’s defense?](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j72OnjAQRZ9m6IzsMRhcUCRBpIiUPtXKP-P9HGFgjRHZt48gKO2ZM3PnmrTNMXwO0H0FxFf0OyCC_AKIH7_OlI_f6cd3lnzLPtTP1F5D_AaI5XOj_-ZzpKZk4nzRbqz8YJQJ5CsahNJK6K7DpnoNAVVve9e50FvRBtlgL0hb3-tgvQhdFQfkKAXnApGLVteqVVojSa5cCNwSNPwOqo04Tc7rmmq3pmoeXqVs-_3RBDjt5I5MtVnIr-UyAKfFbR5w8pYV9IwSaxSjPwXktK9HdvTmVk8gR2_ZpTJKjbKMCw2ojpLe_lkgx8XND0rk45FAjjY_xJm0mfi-gByLxyuCc2R3IY7ykQrla-nMTZUHv51xnuOuOmj4-93NrelvAAAA__9HjX19) ** Alex’s legal defense will cost over $150,000, and he doesn’t have the money to pay for it. _Alex needs your help!_ Make no mistake, a shameful pattern of anti-police sentiment and cop-hating rhetoric has swept America over the past decade. Alex’s exoneration at trial is critical to restoring the integrity of policing in America. This “war on cops” is not a joke. It’s for real. And now, they’re coming after my Alex. **[Please, as the loving mother of an honorable and honest cop, I beg you to lend us a hand by donating $10, $15, $20, $25 or even $50 or $100 today.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j72OnjAQRZ9m6IzsMRhcUCRBpIiUPtXKP-P9HGFgjRHZt48gKO2ZM3PnmrTNMXwO0H0FxFf0OyCC_AKIH7_OlI_f6cd3lnzLPtTP1F5D_AaI5XOj_-ZzpKZk4nzRbqz8YJQJ5CsahNJK6K7DpnoNAVVve9e50FvRBtlgL0hb3-tgvQhdFQfkKAXnApGLVteqVVojSa5cCNwSNPwOqo04Tc7rmmq3pmoeXqVs-_3RBDjt5I5MtVnIr-UyAKfFbR5w8pYV9IwSaxSjPwXktK9HdvTmVk8gR2_ZpTJKjbKMCw2ojpLe_lkgx8XND0rk45FAjjY_xJm0mfi-gByLxyuCc2R3IY7ykQrla-nMTZUHv51xnuOuOmj4-93NrelvAAAA__9HjX19) ** From the bottom of my heart, and on behalf of my son Alex and all law enforcement personnel and their families, I thank you. With gratitude,

Clara Gaitan P.S. Alex is the kindest, bravest, most honest police officer you could ever meet. He is the joy of our family and a highly respected member of the law enforcement community.
**[Please help my family prove his innocence by supporting his legal defense with your generous, 100% tax-deductible donation of $10, $15, $20, $25, $50, $100 or more to the National Center for Police Defense today.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j72OnjAQRZ9m6IzsMRhcUCRBpIiUPtXKP-P9HGFgjRHZt48gKO2ZM3PnmrTNMXwO0H0FxFf0OyCC_AKIH7_OlI_f6cd3lnzLPtTP1F5D_AaI5XOj_-ZzpKZk4nzRbqz8YJQJ5CsahNJK6K7DpnoNAVVve9e50FvRBtlgL0hb3-tgvQhdFQfkKAXnApGLVteqVVojSa5cCNwSNPwOqo04Tc7rmmq3pmoeXqVs-_3RBDjt5I5MtVnIr-UyAKfFbR5w8pYV9IwSaxSjPwXktK9HdvTmVk8gR2_ZpTJKjbKMCw2ojpLe_lkgx8XND0rk45FAjjY_xJm0mfi-gByLxyuCc2R3IY7ykQrla-nMTZUHv51xnuOuOmj4-93NrelvAAAA__9HjX19)** I pray you will do your best, as Alex has always done as a son and a police officer.
---
[SUPPORT NOW](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j72OnjAQRZ9m6IzsMRhcUCRBpIiUPtXKP-P9HGFgjRHZt48gKO2ZM3PnmrTNMXwO0H0FxFf0OyCC_AKIH7_OlI_f6cd3lnzLPtTP1F5D_AaI5XOj_-ZzpKZk4nzRbqz8YJQJ5CsahNJK6K7DpnoNAVVve9e50FvRBtlgL0hb3-tgvQhdFQfkKAXnApGLVteqVVojSa5cCNwSNPwOqo04Tc7rmmq3pmoeXqVs-_3RBDjt5I5MtVnIr-UyAKfFbR5w8pYV9IwSaxSjPwXktK9HdvTmVk8gR2_ZpTJKjbKMCw2ojpLe_lkgx8XND0rk45FAjjY_xJm0mfi-gByLxyuCc2R3IY7ykQrla-nMTZUHv51xnuOuOmj4-93NrelvAAAA__9HjX19)

Hi friends,

I’ve just taken a new role as Matt Dolan’s Deputy Finance Director for his US Senate campaign here in Ohio, so I wanted to introduce myself.

My job becomes challenging when I have to inform candidates of their missed goals, and **_unfortunately, we missed Matt’s Quarter 3 Fundraising goal._** We know the holiday season is around the corner, and everyone is busy, but I would REALLY appreciate it if you could donate to our campaign.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: My parents came to America with almost no money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
But they believed in the power of opportunity
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7d926cd545bc4cebbb5f76228a308ec5&_e=vV_6BHn-GvzcOyIKxqsD71bYzk7WZe1j5wKF22v0OKGIh6qm6pChEYgbiMVNIUsOqX2Av3eZR8aKV2W7ThavTpKhd5g8P7HTHtiwdHYiEzCdqvsz2V4dD_mcvVpwBTNuHcVchSiSCBvOX7yO2RZP05Uh5UB_EKHDH38avx5m3pIH7T50JpC6v8t1YLH9x4qewMLjpLx1pgdGHK_TSUlVD8oEWs-X4bIxepK42tHydp8KFQKyDuIRqQmRmyUVcbOx9EEfMr2jqMjNhhLLZbmFsVC6Dti3Hiy0wFBxILJpCZ4v4Fv8pQYwcL07JHQkIo08cB_SxaUGCaaZDkbcY0w60N8UbRA9UfB4KG--IdQ1XLAEt0IU05rCvVZNwHVR95XjTbGimszrExhZMPWUAtqrBD015juaUKWj1ifsL9cFCkNE21QIOMMFBGlG9Xw6qs6a)

Fellow American,

Our political leaders are obsessed with grievance and victimhood. [**Not me.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7d926cd545bc4cebbb5f76228a308ec5&_e=vV_6BHn-GvzcOyIKxqsD71bYzk7WZe1j5wKF22v0OKGIh6qm6pChEYgbiMVNIUsOqX2Av3eZR8aKV2W7ThavTpKhd5g8P7HTHtiwdHYiEzCdqvsz2V4dD_mcvVpwBTNuHcVchSiSCBvOX7yO2RZP05Uh5UB_EKHDH38avx5m3pIH7T50JpC6v8t1YLH9x4qewMLjpLx1pgdGHK_TSUlVD8oEWs-X4bIxepK42tHydp8KFQKyDuIRqQmRmyUVcbOx9EEfMr2jqMjNhhLLZbmFsVC6Dti3Hiy0wFBxILJpCZ7OouBzs4LltB-9c8xRByywpgx4xmX1FqyDwgPr1JocBmxsqi8vBnjr0Nk2w8j3w0a-h4pLoTcPvRaolpULeFVb09U1xmheNkkxV6Vs5frNFAAeGWXlCCFBdYUGd33uclArwGaCQuNUJnLX2289NoJQ)

My parents immigrated to this country with almost no money in their pockets, **but they believed in the power of opportunity.** They worked hard and raised two kids with a focus on education and achievement. _That’s how you get ahead in America._

The woke Leftists that run Washington, DC, are obsessed with race, gender, and sexuality. They’ve told us to celebrate our diversity and differences so much that we’ve forgotten all the ideals that unite us as Americans. _I’m running for President to change that._

Fellow American, in order to shake the far-Left’s grip on our society, we have [_**to take back the White House AND the Senate Majority**_](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7d926cd545bc4cebbb5f76228a308ec5&_e=vV_6BHn-GvzcOyIKxqsD71bYzk7WZe1j5wKF22v0OKGIh6qm6pChEYgbiMVNIUsOqX2Av3eZR8aKV2W7ThavTpKhd5g8P7HTHtiwdHYiEzCdqvsz2V4dD_mcvVpwBTNuHcVchSiSCBvOX7yO2RZP05Uh5UB_EKHDH38avx5m3pIH7T50JpC6v8t1YLH9x4qewMLjpLx1pgdGHK_TSUlVD8oEWs-X4bIxepK42tHydp8KFQKyDuIRqQmRmyUVcbOx9EEfMr2jqMjNhhLLZbmFsVC6Dti3Hiy0wFBxILJpCZ6BZy96e3QYqq420lR-9jENkydvPAt8lVIw3uzRBnqOhMCa0_aYtzyNhV6QK152MrLCMHB58Y2YnxQwDxUTkPdBEDVn-60d5UkcoSwPzGGSNbN882LJzamUDcvf0ZgepNcrguJ53TGFnmNLVDQkgDge) in next year’s elections. I know you’re up for the challenge, so I’m asking that you contribute today to help me and other America First candidates win in 2024.

[**Chip in ANY AMOUNT to ensure we TAKE OUR COUNTRY BACK from the Radical Left next November. >>**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7d926cd545bc4cebbb5f76228a308ec5&_e=vV_6BHn-GvzcOyIKxqsD71bYzk7WZe1j5wKF22v0OKGIh6qm6pChEYgbiMVNIUsOqX2Av3eZR8aKV2W7ThavTpKhd5g8P7HTHtiwdHYiEzCdqvsz2V4dD_mcvVpwBTNuHcVchSiSCBvOX7yO2RZP05Uh5UB_EKHDH38avx5m3pIH7T50JpC6v8t1YLH9x4qewMLjpLx1pgdGHK_TSUlVD8oEWs-X4bIxepK42tHydp8KFQKyDuIRqQmRmyUVcbOx9EEfMr2jqMjNhhLLZbmFsVC6Dti3Hiy0wFBxILJpCZ4ixXVSQgylOo_OvOt2yP6u75m3vYigJXUnHC8q7ubupt0xtSB1diVWXh2QNViqoKFugsjo37WnuVNY7DF9hVSeWpsSJn_yvsTx5JvIsXF52pV2m6bCNSSazrEwvrKjRe6detXpwXG76ERrj1K3U-YR)

clean_body: But they believed in the power of opportunity Fellow American, Our political leaders are obsessed with grievance and victimhood. My parents immigrated to this country with almost no money in their pockets, but they believed in the power of opportunity. They worked hard and raised two kids with a focus on education and achievement. That’s how you get ahead in America. The woke Leftists that run Washington, DC, are obsessed with race, gender, and sexuality. They’ve told us to celebrate our diversity and differences so much that we’ve forgotten all the ideals that unite us as Americans. I’m running for President to change that. Fellow American, in order to shake the far-Left’s grip on our society, we have in next year’s elections. I know you’re up for the challenge, so I’m asking that you contribute today to help me and other America First candidates win in 2024.
